Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yu-Hsiang Chen, Wei-Jer Chang, Christian Kotulla, Thomas Keutgens, Steffen Runde, Tobias Moers, Christoph Klas, Wei Zhan, Masayoshi Tomizuka, Yi-Ting Chen

Enhancing Navigation Efficiency of Quadruped Robots via Leveraging Personal Transportation Platforms

Abstract (English): Quadruped robots face limitations in long-range navigation efficiency due to their reliance on legs. To ameliorate the limitations, we introduce a Reinforcement Learning-based Active Transporter Riding method (\textit{RL-ATR}), inspired by humans' utilization of personal transporters, including Segways. The \textit{RL-ATR} features a transporter riding policy and two state estimators. The policy devises adequate maneuvering strategies according to transporter-specific control dynamics, while the estimators resolve sensor ambiguities in non-inertial frames by inferring unobservable robot and transporter states. Comprehensive evaluations in simulation validate proficient command tracking abilities across various transporter-robot models and reduced energy consumption compared to legged locomotion. Moreover, we conduct ablation studies to quantify individual component contributions within the \textit{RL-ATR}. This riding ability could broaden the locomotion modalities of quadruped robots, potentially expanding the operational range and efficiency.

摘要（中文）: 四足机器人在长距离导航效率方面面临着因依赖腿部移动而产生的局限性。为了缓解这些局限性，我们引入了一种基于强化学习的主动式运输车骑行方法（\textit{RL-ATR}），其灵感来源于人类使用个人运输工具，包括赛格威。 \textit{RL-ATR} 包含一个运输车骑行策略和两个状态估计器。该策略根据特定于运输车的控制动力学设计适当的操纵策略，而状态估计器通过推断不可观测的机器人和运输车状态来解决非惯性系中的传感器模糊性。 仿真环境中的全面评估验证了该方法在各种运输车-机器人模型上的高效指令跟踪能力，并且相比于靠腿行走，其能量消耗更低。此外，我们进行了消融研究，以量化\textit{RL-ATR}中各个组成部分的贡献。这种骑行能力可以拓宽四足机器人的运动模式，从而有可能扩大其操作范围和效率。

TLDR: This paper introduces a reinforcement learning based method for quadruped robots to ride personal transporters (like Segways) to improve navigation efficiency and reduce energy consumption during long-range navigation.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种基于强化学习的方法，使四足机器人能够乘坐个人交通工具（如赛格威）以提高导航效率，并减少长距离导航过程中的能源消耗。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Minsung Yoon, Sung-Eui Yoon

Learning-based Adaptive Control of Quadruped Robots for Active Stabilization on Moving Platforms

Abstract (English): A quadruped robot faces balancing challenges on a six-degrees-of-freedom moving platform, like subways, buses, airplanes, and yachts, due to independent platform motions and resultant diverse inertia forces on the robot. To alleviate these challenges, we present the Learning-based Active Stabilization on Moving Platforms (\textit{LAS-MP}), featuring a self-balancing policy and system state estimators. The policy adaptively adjusts the robot's posture in response to the platform's motion. The estimators infer robot and platform states based on proprioceptive sensor data. For a systematic training scheme across various platform motions, we introduce platform trajectory generation and scheduling methods. Our evaluation demonstrates superior balancing performance across multiple metrics compared to three baselines. Furthermore, we conduct a detailed analysis of the \textit{LAS-MP}, including ablation studies and evaluation of the estimators, to validate the effectiveness of each component.

摘要（中文）: 四足机器人在六自由度运动平台上（如地铁、公共汽车、飞机和游艇）上面临平衡挑战，这是由于平台独立的运动和机器人承受的由此产生的各种惯性力造成的。为了缓解这些挑战，我们提出了基于学习的运动平台主动稳定方法（\textit{LAS-MP}），其特点是自平衡策略和系统状态估计器。该策略可自适应地调整机器人的姿态以响应平台的运动。估计器基于本体感受传感器数据推断机器人和平台的状态。为了在各种平台运动中实现系统的训练方案，我们引入了平台轨迹生成和调度方法。我们的评估表明，与三个基线相比，该方法在多个指标上具有卓越的平衡性能。此外，我们对\textit{LAS-MP}进行了详细的分析，包括消融研究和对估计器的评估，以验证每个组件的有效性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a learning-based active stabilization method ( extit{LAS-MP}) for quadruped robots on moving platforms, using adaptive posture control and state estimation to improve balancing performance. The system is trained with a novel platform trajectory generation scheme and validated through experiments against baselines.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于学习的主动稳定方法 ( extit{LAS-MP})，用于在移动平台上四足机器人的主动稳定。该方法通过自适应姿态控制和状态估计来提升平衡性能，通过新型的平台轨迹生成方案进行训练，并通过实验验证了其性能优于baseline。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Minsung Yoon, Heechan Shin, Jeil Jeong, Sung-Eui Yoon

Collision Detection with Analytical Derivatives of Contact Kinematics

Abstract (English): Differentiable contact kinematics are essential for gradient-based methods in robotics, yet the mapping from robot state to contact distance, location, and normal becomes non-smooth in degenerate configurations of shapes with zero or undefined curvature. We address this inherent limitation by selectively regularizing such geometries into strictly convex implicit representations, restoring uniqueness and smoothness of the contact map. Leveraging this geometric regularization, we develop iDCOL, an implicit differentiable collision detection and contact kinematics framework. iDCOL represents colliding bodies using strictly convex implicit surfaces and computes collision detection and contact kinematics by solving a fixed-size nonlinear system derived from a geometric scaling-based convex optimization formulation. By applying the Implicit Function Theorem to the resulting system residual, we derive analytical derivatives of the contact kinematic quantities. We develop a fast Newton-based solver for iDCOL and provide an open-source C++ implementation of the framework. The robustness of the approach is evaluated through extensive collision simulations and benchmarking, and applicability is demonstrated in gradient-based kinematic path planning and differentiable contact physics, including multi-body rigid collisions and a soft-robot interaction example.

摘要（中文）: 可微接触运动学对于机器人学中基于梯度的方法至关重要，然而，在具有零曲率或未定义曲率的形状的退化构型中，从机器人状态到接触距离、位置和法线的映射变得非光滑。我们通过选择性地将此类几何体正则化为严格凸隐式表示来解决这个固有限制，从而恢复接触映射的唯一性和光滑性。利用这种几何正则化，我们开发了iDCOL，一个隐式可微碰撞检测和接触运动学框架。iDCOL使用严格凸隐式表面表示碰撞物体，并通过求解一个基于几何缩放凸优化公式导出的固定大小非线性系统来计算碰撞检测和接触运动学。通过将隐函数定理应用于所得的系统残差，我们推导出接触运动学量的解析导数。我们开发了一个快速的基于牛顿法的iDCOL求解器，并提供了该框架的开源C++实现。通过广泛的碰撞仿真和基准测试评估了该方法的鲁棒性，并在基于梯度的运动学路径规划和可微接触物理中展示了其适用性，包括多体刚体碰撞和一个软机器人交互示例。

TLDR: This paper introduces iDCOL, a differentiable collision detection framework using strictly convex implicit surfaces for robot state to contact distance, location, and normal mapping, enabling gradient-based methods in robotics, path planning, and differentiable physics. They address non-smooth mappings in degenerate configurations through implicit function theorem and geometric regularization.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一个可微分碰撞检测框架iDCOL，它使用严格凸隐式表面来实现机器人状态到接触距离、位置和法线的映射，从而实现机器人技术、路径规划和可微分物理中的基于梯度的方法。 他们通过隐函数定理和几何正则化解决了退化配置中的非平滑映射。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Anup Teejo Mathew, Anees Peringal, Daniele Caradonna, Frederic Boyer, Federico Renda

A thin and soft optical tactile sensor for highly sensitive object perception

Abstract (English): Tactile sensing is crucial in robotics and wearable devices for safe perception and interaction with the environment. Optical tactile sensors have emerged as promising solutions, as they are immune to electromagnetic interference and have high spatial resolution. However, existing optical approaches, particularly vision-based tactile sensors, rely on complex optical assemblies that involve lenses and cameras, resulting in bulky, rigid, and alignment-sensitive designs. In this study, we present a thin, compact, and soft optical tactile sensor featuring an alignment-free configuration. The soft optical sensor operates by capturing deformation-induced changes in speckle patterns generated within a soft silicone material, thereby enabling precise force measurements and texture recognition via machine learning. The experimental results show a root-mean-square error of 40 mN in the force measurement and a classification accuracy of 93.33% over nine classes of textured surfaces, including Mahjong tiles. The proposed speckle-based approach provides a compact, easily fabricated, and mechanically compliant platform that bridges optical sensing with flexible shape-adaptive architectures, thereby demonstrating its potential as a novel tactile-sensing paradigm for soft robotics and wearable haptic interfaces.

摘要（中文）: 触觉感知对于机器人和可穿戴设备安全地感知环境并与之交互至关重要。光学触觉传感器因其不受电磁干扰且具有高空间分辨率，已成为一种很有前景的解决方案。然而，现有的光学方法，尤其是基于视觉的触觉传感器，依赖于包含透镜和摄像头的复杂光学组件，导致其设计笨重、刚硬且对准敏感。在本研究中，我们提出了一种薄型、紧凑、柔软的光学触觉传感器，具有免对准的配置。该软光学传感器通过捕获软硅材料内产生的散斑图案中由形变引起的的变化来进行工作，从而能够通过机器学习实现精确的力测量和纹理识别。实验结果表明，力测量的均方根误差为 40 mN，在九类纹理表面（包括麻将牌）上的分类准确率为 93.33%。所提出的基于散斑的方法提供了一个紧凑、易于制造且机械上柔顺的平台，将光学传感与灵活的形状自适应架构桥接起来，从而展示了其作为软机器人和可穿戴触觉界面新型触觉感知范例的潜力。

TLDR: This paper presents a thin, soft, and alignment-free optical tactile sensor based on speckle pattern analysis for force measurement and texture recognition, demonstrating promising results for soft robotics and wearable haptic interfaces.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于散斑图案分析的薄型、柔软且免对准的光学触觉传感器，用于力测量和纹理识别，为软体机器人和可穿戴触觉界面展示了良好的前景。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Yanchen Shen, Kohei Tsuji, Haruto Koizumi, Jiseon Hong, Tomoaki Niiyama, Hiroyuki Kuwabara, Hayato Ishida, Jun Hiramitsu, Mitsuhito Mase, Satoshi Sunada

Depth Completion in Unseen Field Robotics Environments Using Extremely Sparse Depth Measurements

Abstract (English): Autonomous field robots operating in unstructured environments require robust perception to ensure safe and reliable operations. Recent advances in monocular depth estimation have demonstrated the potential of low-cost cameras as depth sensors; however, their adoption in field robotics remains limited due to the absence of reliable scale cues, ambiguous or low-texture conditions, and the scarcity of large-scale datasets. To address these challenges, we propose a depth completion model that trains on synthetic data and uses extremely sparse measurements from depth sensors to predict dense metric depth in unseen field robotics environments. A synthetic dataset generation pipeline tailored to field robotics enables the creation of multiple realistic datasets for training purposes. This dataset generation approach utilizes textured 3D meshes from Structure from Motion and photorealistic rendering with novel viewpoint synthesis to simulate diverse field robotics scenarios. Our approach achieves an end-to-end latency of 53 ms per frame on a Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin, enabling real-time deployment on embedded platforms. Extensive evaluation demonstrates competitive performance across diverse real-world field robotics scenarios.

摘要（中文）: 在非结构化环境中作业的自主田野机器人需要稳健的感知能力，以确保安全可靠的运行。单目深度估计的最新进展已证明低成本相机作为深度传感器的潜力；然而，由于缺乏可靠的尺度线索、模糊或低纹理环境，以及大规模数据集的稀缺，其在田野机器人领域的应用仍然受到限制。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种深度补全模型，该模型在合成数据上进行训练，并使用来自深度传感器的极稀疏测量值来预测未知田野机器人环境中密集的度量深度。针对田野机器人定制的合成数据集生成流程，能够创建多个逼真的数据集用于训练目的。这种数据集生成方法利用来自运动结构重建的纹理三维网格和具有新型视点合成的光写实渲染来模拟多样化的田野机器人场景。我们的方法在Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin上实现了每帧53毫秒的端到端延迟，使其能够在嵌入式平台上进行实时部署。广泛的评估表明，该方法在各种真实世界的田野机器人场景中表现出具有竞争力的性能。

TLDR: This paper introduces a depth completion model trained on synthetic data with sparse depth measurements for robust perception in field robotics, achieving real-time performance on embedded platforms and demonstrating competitive results in real-world scenarios.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种深度补全模型，该模型通过合成数据和稀疏深度测量进行训练，以实现野外机器人技术的鲁棒感知。该模型在嵌入式平台上实现了实时性能，并在实际场景中表现出良好的竞争力。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Marco Job, Thomas Stastny, Eleni Kelasidi, Roland Siegwart, Michael Pantic

HUSKY: Humanoid Skateboarding System via Physics-Aware Whole-Body Control

Abstract (English): While current humanoid whole-body control frameworks predominantly rely on the static environment assumptions, addressing tasks characterized by high dynamism and complex interactions presents a formidable challenge. In this paper, we address humanoid skateboarding, a highly challenging task requiring stable dynamic maneuvering on an underactuated wheeled platform. This integrated system is governed by non-holonomic constraints and tightly coupled human-object interactions. Successfully executing this task requires simultaneous mastery of hybrid contact dynamics and robust balance control on a mechanically coupled, dynamically unstable skateboard. To overcome the aforementioned challenges, we propose HUSKY, a learning-based framework that integrates humanoid-skateboard system modeling and physics-aware whole-body control. We first model the coupling relationship between board tilt and truck steering angles, enabling a principled analysis of system dynamics. Building upon this, HUSKY leverages Adversarial Motion Priors (AMP) to learn human-like pushing motions and employs a physics-guided, heading-oriented strategy for lean-to-steer behaviors. Moreover, a trajectory-guided mechanism ensures smooth and stable transitions between pushing and steering. Experimental results on the Unitree G1 humanoid platform demonstrate that our framework enables stable and agile maneuvering on skateboards in real-world scenarios. The project page is available on https://husky-humanoid.github.io/.

摘要（中文）: 尽管当前的人形机器人全身控制框架主要依赖于静态环境假设，但处理以高度动态性和复杂交互为特征的任务，依旧是一项艰巨的挑战。在本文中，我们研究了人形机器人滑板，这是一项极具挑战性的任务，需要在欠驱动的轮式平台上进行稳定的动态操控。这个集成系统受非完整约束和紧密耦合的人-物交互作用支配。成功执行此任务需要同时掌握混合接触动力学，并在机械耦合、动态不稳定的滑板上实现鲁棒的平衡控制。为了克服上述挑战，我们提出了一种基于学习的框架HUSKY，它集成了人形机器人-滑板系统建模和物理感知的全身控制。我们首先对板倾斜和转向桥角度之间的耦合关系进行建模，从而能够对系统动力学进行有原则的分析。在此基础上，HUSKY 利用对抗性运动先验（AMP）来学习类似人类的推动动作，并采用一种物理引导的、面向航向的策略用于倾斜转向行为。此外，轨迹引导机制确保了推动和转向之间平滑和稳定的过渡。在宇树G1人形机器人平台上的实验结果表明，我们的框架能够在真实场景中实现滑板上稳定和灵活的操控。项目页面可在https://husky-humanoid.github.io/上找到。

TLDR: The paper presents HUSKY, a learning-based framework for controlling a humanoid robot on a skateboard, addressing the challenges of dynamic maneuvering and human-object interaction through physics-aware whole-body control and adversarial motion priors.

简要说明: 该论文提出了HUSKY，一个基于学习的框架，用于控制人形机器人在滑板上的运动。该框架通过物理感知的全身控制和对抗运动先验，解决了动态操纵和人机交互的挑战。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jinrui Han, Dewei Wang, Chenyun Zhang, Xinzhe Liu, Ping Luo, Chenjia Bai, Xuelong Li

Hierarchical Proportion Models for Motion Generation via Integration of Motion Primitives

Abstract (English): Imitation learning (IL) enables robots to acquire human-like motion skills from demonstrations, but it still requires extensive high-quality data and retraining to handle complex or long-horizon tasks. To improve data efficiency and adaptability, this study proposes a hierarchical IL framework that integrates motion primitives with proportion-based motion synthesis. The proposed method employs a two-layer architecture, where the upper layer performs long-term planning, while a set of lower-layer models learn individual motion primitives, which are combined according to specific proportions. Three model variants are introduced to explore different trade-offs between learning flexibility, computational cost, and adaptability: a learning-based proportion model, a sampling-based proportion model, and a playback-based proportion model, which differ in how the proportions are determined and whether the upper layer is trainable. Through real-robot pick-and-place experiments, the proposed models successfully generated complex motions not included in the primitive set. The sampling-based and playback-based proportion models achieved more stable and adaptable motion generation than the standard hierarchical model, demonstrating the effectiveness of proportion-based motion integration for practical robot learning.

摘要（中文）: 模仿学习(IL) 使机器人能够从示范中获取类人运动技能，但仍然需要大量高质量数据并重新训练才能处理复杂或长时域任务。为了提高数据效率和适应性，本研究提出了一种分层 IL 框架，该框架集成了运动基元和基于比例的运动合成。所提出的方法采用双层架构，其中上层进行长期规划，而一组下层模型学习个体运动基元，这些运动基元根据特定比例进行组合。引入了三种模型变体，以探索学习的灵活性、计算成本和适应性之间的不同权衡：一种基于学习的比例模型，一种基于采样的比例模型，以及一种基于回放的比例模型，它们在比例的确定方式以及上层是否可训练方面有所不同。通过真实的机器人拾取放置实验，所提出的模型成功生成了基元集中未包含的复杂运动。基于采样的比例模型和基于回放的比例模型比标准分层模型实现了更稳定和更具适应性的运动生成，证明了基于比例的运动集成在实际机器人学习中的有效性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a hierarchical imitation learning framework that combines motion primitives using proportion-based motion synthesis for improved data efficiency and adaptability in robot motion generation, demonstrating success in real-robot pick-and-place tasks.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种分层模仿学习框架，该框架结合了基于比例的运动合成的运动原语，以提高机器人运动生成中的数据效率和适应性，并在真实的机器人抓取放置任务中取得了成功。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yu-Han Shu, Toshiaki Tsuji, Sho Sakaino

A Unified Candidate Set with Scene-Adaptive Refinement via Diffusion for End-to-End Autonomous Driving

Abstract (English): End-to-end autonomous driving is increasingly adopting a multimodal planning paradigm that generates multiple trajectory candidates and selects the final plan, making candidate-set design critical. A fixed trajectory vocabulary provides stable coverage in routine driving but often misses optimal solutions in complex interactions, while scene-adaptive refinement can cause over-correction in simple scenarios by unnecessarily perturbing already strong vocabulary trajectories.We propose CdDrive, which preserves the original vocabulary candidates and augments them with scene-adaptive candidates generated by vocabulary-conditioned diffusion denoising. Both candidate types are jointly scored by a shared selection module, enabling reliable performance across routine and highly interactive scenarios. We further introduce HATNA (Horizon-Aware Trajectory Noise Adapter) to improve the smoothness and geometric continuity of diffusion candidates via temporal smoothing and horizon-aware noise modulation. Experiments on NAVSIM v1 and NAVSIM v2 demonstrate leading performance, and ablations verify the contribution of each component. Code: https://github.com/WWW-TJ/CdDrive.

摘要（中文）: 以下是摘要的中文翻译： 端到端自动驾驶正日益采用多模态规划范式，该范式生成多个轨迹候选方案并选择最终方案，因此候选集设计至关重要。固定的轨迹词汇在日常驾驶中提供稳定的覆盖，但在复杂交互中常常错过最优解，而场景自适应细化可能会不必要地扰动已经表现良好的词汇轨迹，从而导致简单场景中的过度修正。我们提出了CdDrive，它保留了原始的词汇候选方案，并使用由词汇条件扩散去噪生成的场景自适应候选方案来增强它们。两种候选类型由共享的选择模块联合评分，从而在日常驾驶和高度交互场景中实现可靠的性能。我们进一步引入了HATNA（视野感知轨迹噪声适配器），通过时间平滑和视野感知噪声调制来提高扩散候选方案的平滑性和几何连续性。在NAVSIM v1和NAVSIM v2上的实验表明了领先的性能，消融实验验证了每个组成部分的贡献。代码：https://github.com/WWW-TJ/CdDrive。

TLDR: The paper introduces CdDrive, a multimodal autonomous driving planning system that combines a fixed trajectory vocabulary with scene-adaptive candidates generated by diffusion denoising, achieving state-of-the-art performance in complex driving scenarios.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了CdDrive，一个多模态自动驾驶规划系统，它结合了固定的轨迹词汇表和通过扩散去噪生成的场景自适应候选轨迹，在复杂的驾驶场景中实现了最先进的性能。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhengfei Wu, Shuaixi Pan, Shuohan Chen, Shuo Yang, Yanjun Huang

Training and Simulation of Quadrupedal Robot in Adaptive Stair Climbing for Indoor Firefighting: An End-to-End Reinforcement Learning Approach

Abstract (English): Quadruped robots are used for primary searches during the early stages of indoor fires. A typical primary search involves quickly and thoroughly looking for victims under hazardous conditions and monitoring flammable materials. However, situational awareness in complex indoor environments and rapid stair climbing across different staircases remain the main challenges for robot-assisted primary searches. In this project, we designed a two-stage end-to-end deep reinforcement learning (RL) approach to optimize both navigation and locomotion. In the first stage, the quadrupeds, Unitree Go2, were trained to climb stairs in Isaac Lab's pyramid-stair terrain. In the second stage, the quadrupeds were trained to climb various realistic indoor staircases in the Isaac Lab engine, with the learned policy transferred from the previous stage. These indoor staircases are straight, L-shaped, and spiral, to support climbing tasks in complex environments. This project explores how to balance navigation and locomotion and how end-to-end RL methods can enable quadrupeds to adapt to different stair shapes. Our main contributions are: (1) A two-stage end-to-end RL framework that transfers stair-climbing skills from abstract pyramid terrain to realistic indoor stair topologies. (2) A centerline-based navigation formulation that enables unified learning of navigation and locomotion without hierarchical planning. (3) Demonstration of policy generalization across diverse staircases using only local height-map perception. (4) An empirical analysis of success, efficiency, and failure modes under increasing stair difficulty.

摘要（中文）: 四足机器人被用于室内火灾早期阶段的初步搜索。典型的初步搜索包括在危险条件下快速且彻底地寻找受害者，并监控易燃材料。然而，在复杂的室内环境中保持情境感知以及快速攀爬不同的楼梯仍然是机器人辅助初步搜索的主要挑战。在这个项目中，我们设计了一种两阶段的端到端深度强化学习（RL）方法来优化导航和运动。在第一阶段，四足机器人Unitree Go2在Isaac Lab的金字塔楼梯地形中进行楼梯攀爬训练。在第二阶段，四足机器人在Isaac Lab引擎中进行各种真实室内楼梯的攀爬训练，使用的策略是从前一阶段迁移而来。这些室内楼梯包括直梯、L型梯和螺旋梯，以支持在复杂的环境中进行攀爬任务。该项目探索了如何平衡导航和运动，以及端到端强化学习方法如何使四足机器人适应不同的楼梯形状。我们的主要贡献是：（1）一个两阶段的端到端强化学习框架，该框架将楼梯攀爬技能从抽象的金字塔地形迁移到真实的室内楼梯拓扑结构。（2）一种基于中心线的导航公式，该公式实现了导航和运动的统一学习，无需分层规划。（3）展示了仅使用局部高度图感知在各种楼梯上进行策略泛化的能力。（4）对成功率、效率以及在楼梯难度增加情况下的失效模式进行实证分析。

TLDR: This paper presents a two-stage end-to-end reinforcement learning approach for training quadruped robots to climb various realistic indoor staircases using only local height-map perception, demonstrating policy generalization across diverse stair shapes.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种两阶段端到端强化学习方法，用于训练四足机器人仅使用局部高度图感知来攀爬各种逼真的室内楼梯，展示了策略在不同楼梯形状上的泛化能力。

Authors: Baixiao Huang, Baiyu Huang, Yu Hou

Kino-PAX$^+$: Near-Optimal Massively Parallel Kinodynamic Sampling-based Motion Planner

Abstract (English): Sampling-based motion planners (SBMPs) are widely used for robot motion planning with complex kinodynamic constraints in high-dimensional spaces, yet they struggle to achieve \emph{real-time} performance due to their serial computation design. Recent efforts to parallelize SBMPs have achieved significant speedups in finding feasible solutions; however, they provide no guarantees of optimizing an objective function. We introduce Kino-PAX$^{+}$, a massively parallel kinodynamic SBMP with asymptotic near-optimal guarantees. Kino-PAX$^{+}$ builds a sparse tree of dynamically feasible trajectories by decomposing traditionally serial operations into three massively parallel subroutines. The algorithm focuses computation on the most promising nodes within local neighborhoods for propagation and refinement, enabling rapid improvement of solution cost. We prove that, while maintaining probabilistic $δ$-robust completeness, this focus on promising nodes ensures asymptotic $δ$-robust near-optimality. Our results show that Kino-PAX$^{+}$ finds solutions up to three orders of magnitude faster than existing serial methods and achieves lower solution costs than a state-of-the-art GPU-based planner.

摘要（中文）: 基于采样的运动规划器(SBMPs)广泛应用于高维空间中具有复杂动力学约束的机器人运动规划，然而，由于其串行计算设计，难以实现\emph{实时}性能。最近并行化SBMPs的尝试在寻找可行解方面取得了显著的加速；但是，它们不能保证优化目标函数。我们引入了Kino-PAX$^{+}$，一种具有渐近近最优保证的大规模并行动力学SBMP。Kino-PAX$^{+}$通过将传统的串行操作分解为三个大规模并行子程序来构建一个动态可行轨迹的稀疏树。该算法将计算集中在局部邻域内最有希望的节点上，以用于传播和细化，从而能够快速改善解决方案成本。我们证明，在保持概率$δ$-鲁棒完整性的同时，这种对有希望节点的关注确保了渐近$δ$-鲁棒近最优性。我们的结果表明，Kino-PAX$^{+}$找到解决方案的速度比现有的串行方法快三个数量级，并且达到了比最先进的基于GPU的规划器更低的解决方案成本。

TLDR: Kino-PAX$^+$ is a massively parallel kinodynamic sampling-based motion planning algorithm that achieves near-optimal solutions significantly faster and with lower costs compared to existing methods. The algorithm focuses computation on promising nodes, ensuring asymptotic near-optimality while maintaining probabilistic completeness.

简要说明: Kino-PAX$^+$ 是一种大规模并行运动规划算法，它能够以显著更快的速度和更低的成本实现近乎最优的解决方案，优于现有方法。 该算法专注于有望节点的计算，在保持概率完备性的同时确保渐近近乎最优。

Authors: Nicolas Perrault, Qi Heng Ho, Morteza Lahijanian

Simulating Human Audiovisual Search Behavior

Abstract (English): Locating a target based on auditory and visual cues$\unicode{x2013}$such as finding a car in a crowded parking lot or identifying a speaker in a virtual meeting$\unicode{x2013}$requires balancing effort, time, and accuracy under uncertainty. Existing models of audiovisual search often treat perception and action in isolation, overlooking how people adaptively coordinate movement and sensory strategies. We present Sensonaut, a computational model of embodied audiovisual search. The core assumption is that people deploy their body and sensory systems in ways they believe will most efficiently improve their chances of locating a target, trading off time and effort under perceptual constraints. Our model formulates this as a resource-rational decision-making problem under partial observability. We validate the model against newly collected human data, showing that it reproduces both adaptive scaling of search time and effort under task complexity, occlusion, and distraction, and characteristic human errors. Our simulation of human-like resource-rational search informs the design of audiovisual interfaces that minimize search cost and cognitive load.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 基于听觉和视觉线索定位目标——例如在拥挤的停车场中找到一辆汽车或在虚拟会议中识别发言者——需要在不确定性下平衡努力、时间和准确性。现有的视听搜索模型通常孤立地处理感知和动作，忽略了人们如何自适应地协调运动和感觉策略。我们提出了Sensonaut，一个具身视听搜索的计算模型。核心假设是，人们以他们认为最有效地提高定位目标机会的方式部署他们的身体和感觉系统，在感知约束下权衡时间和努力。我们的模型将其形式化为部分可观察性下的资源理性决策问题。我们使用新收集的人类数据验证了该模型，表明它再现了在任务复杂性、遮挡和干扰下搜索时间和努力的自适应缩放，以及典型的人类错误。我们对类人资源理性搜索的模拟为视听界面的设计提供了信息，该界面旨在最小化搜索成本和认知负荷。

TLDR: The paper introduces Sensonaut, a computational model of embodied audiovisual search, validated with human data, that treats search as a resource-rational decision-making problem. The model aims to inform the design of more efficient audiovisual interfaces.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一个名为Sensonaut的具身视听搜索计算模型，通过人类数据验证，将搜索视为一种资源合理的决策问题。该模型旨在为更高效的视听界面设计提供信息。

Authors: Hyunsung Cho, Xuejing Luo, Byungjoo Lee, David Lindlbauer, Antti Oulasvirta

Bimanual High-Density EMG Control for In-Home Mobile Manipulation by a User with Quadriplegia

Abstract (English): Mobile manipulators in the home can enable people with cervical spinal cord injury (cSCI) to perform daily physical household tasks that they could not otherwise do themselves. However, paralysis in these users often limits access to traditional robot control interfaces such as joysticks or keyboards. In this work, we introduce and deploy the first system that enables a user with quadriplegia to control a mobile manipulator in their own home using bimanual high-density electromyography (HDEMG). We develop a pair of custom, fabric-integrated HDEMG forearm sleeves, worn on both arms, that capture residual neuromotor activity from clinically paralyzed degrees of freedom and support real-time gesture-based robot control. Second, by integrating vision, language, and motion planning modules, we introduce a shared autonomy framework that supports robust and user-driven teleoperation, with particular benefits for navigation-intensive tasks in home environments. Finally, to demonstrate the system in the wild, we present a twelve-day in-home user study evaluating real-time use of the wearable EMG interface for daily robot control. Together, these system components enable effective robot control for performing activities of daily living and other household tasks in a real home environment.

摘要（中文）: 用于家庭环境的移动操作臂能够帮助患有颈椎脊髓损伤(cSCI)的人们完成他们原本无法独立完成的日常体力家务。然而，这些用户的瘫痪通常限制了他们对传统机器人控制界面的访问，例如操纵杆或键盘。在这项工作中，我们介绍并部署了首个系统，该系统使四肢瘫痪的用户能够使用双手高密度肌电图(HDEMG)在自己的家中控制移动操作臂。我们开发了一对定制的、织物集成的HDEMG前臂袖套，分别佩戴在双臂上，以捕捉来自临床瘫痪自由度的残余神经运动活动，并支持基于手势的实时机器人控制。其次，通过集成视觉、语言和运动规划模块，我们引入了一个共享自主框架，该框架支持稳健且用户驱动的远程操作，尤其是在家庭环境中进行导航密集型任务时具有优势。最后，为了在实际环境中演示该系统，我们展示了一项为期十二天的居家用户研究，评估了可穿戴EMG界面用于日常机器人控制的实时使用情况。总之，这些系统组件能够有效地控制机器人，从而在真实的家庭环境中执行日常生活活动和其他家务。

TLDR: This paper presents a bimanual HDEMG control system for a mobile manipulator, enabling a user with quadriplegia to perform in-home tasks through shared autonomy. A twelve-day in-home user study demonstrates the feasibility of real-time control for daily living activities.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种双手动高密度肌电控制系统，用于移动操作臂，使四肢瘫痪的用户能够通过共享自主性执行家庭任务。一项为期12天的家庭用户研究证明了实时控制日常生活的可行性。

Authors: Jehan Yang, Eleanor Hodgson, Cindy Sun, Zackory Erickson, Doug Weber

Efficient Estimation of Kernel Surrogate Models for Task Attribution

Abstract (English): Modern AI agents such as large language models are trained on diverse tasks -- translation, code generation, mathematical reasoning, and text prediction -- simultaneously. A key question is to quantify how each individual training task influences performance on a target task, a problem we refer to as task attribution. The direct approach, leave-one-out retraining, measures the effect of removing each task, but is computationally infeasible at scale. An alternative approach that builds surrogate models to predict a target task's performance for any subset of training tasks has emerged in recent literature. Prior work focuses on linear surrogate models, which capture first-order relationships, but miss nonlinear interactions such as synergy, antagonism, or XOR-type effects. In this paper, we first consider a unified task weighting framework for analyzing task attribution methods, and show a new connection between linear surrogate models and influence functions through a second-order analysis. Then, we introduce kernel surrogate models, which more effectively represent second-order task interactions. To efficiently learn the kernel surrogate, we develop a gradient-based estimation procedure that leverages a first-order approximation of pretrained models; empirically, this yields accurate estimates with less than $2\%$ relative error without repeated retraining. Experiments across multiple domains -- including math reasoning in transformers, in-context learning, and multi-objective reinforcement learning -- demonstrate the effectiveness of kernel surrogate models. They achieve a $25\%$ higher correlation with the leave-one-out ground truth than linear surrogates and influence-function baselines. When used for downstream task selection, kernel surrogate models yield a $40\%$ improvement in demonstration selection for in-context learning and multi-objective reinforcement learning benchmarks.

摘要（中文）: 现代人工智能代理，例如大型语言模型，接受多样化任务的训练，这些任务包括翻译、代码生成、数学推理和文本预测等。一个关键问题是量化每个单独的训练任务如何影响目标任务的性能，我们将这个问题称为任务归因。直接的方法，即留一法重训练，衡量移除每个任务的影响，但在规模上是计算不可行的。一种替代方法，即构建替代模型来预测任何训练任务子集的目标任务性能，已出现在最近的文献中。先前的工作侧重于线性替代模型，其捕获一阶关系，但忽略了非线性交互，例如协同、对抗或异或效应。在本文中，我们首先考虑一个统一的任务加权框架来分析任务归因方法，并通过二阶分析展示了线性替代模型和影响函数之间的新联系。然后，我们引入了核替代模型，其更有效地表示了二阶任务交互。为了有效地学习核替代模型，我们开发了一种基于梯度的估计过程，该过程利用了预训练模型的一阶近似；经验表明，这产生了准确的估计，且相对误差小于2%，而无需重复重训练。跨多个领域的实验——包括Transformer中的数学推理、上下文学习和多目标强化学习——证明了核替代模型的有效性。与线性替代模型和影响函数基线相比，它们与留一法真值的相关性高出25%。当用于下游任务选择时，核替代模型在上下文学习和多目标强化学习基准测试中，使演示选择的性能提升了40%。

TLDR: This paper introduces kernel surrogate models for efficient task attribution in AI agents trained on multiple tasks, demonstrating improved accuracy and performance in downstream tasks like in-context learning and multi-objective reinforcement learning compared to linear surrogates.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了用于AI agent中高效任务归因的核代理模型，这些AI agent在多个任务上进行训练，与线性代理相比，在上下文学习和多目标强化学习等下游任务中表现出更高的准确性和性能。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhenshuo Zhang, Minxuan Duan, Hongyang R. Zhang

Reward Redistribution for CVaR MDPs using a Bellman Operator on L-infinity

Abstract (English): Tail-end risk measures such as static conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) are used in safety-critical applications to prevent rare, yet catastrophic events. Unlike risk-neutral objectives, the static CVaR of the return depends on entire trajectories without admitting a recursive Bellman decomposition in the underlying Markov decision process. A classical resolution relies on state augmentation with a continuous variable. However, unless restricted to a specialized class of admissible value functions, this formulation induces sparse rewards and degenerate fixed points. In this work, we propose a novel formulation of the static CVaR objective based on augmentation. Our alternative approach leads to a Bellman operator with: (1) dense per-step rewards; (2) contracting properties on the full space of bounded value functions. Building on this theoretical foundation, we develop risk-averse value iteration and model-free Q-learning algorithms that rely on discretized augmented states. We further provide convergence guarantees and approximation error bounds due to discretization. Empirical results demonstrate that our algorithms successfully learn CVaR-sensitive policies and achieve effective performance-safety trade-offs.

摘要（中文）: 尾部风险度量，例如静态条件风险价值(CVaR)，被应用于安全攸关型应用中以预防罕见但灾难性的事件。与风险中性目标不同，收益的静态CVaR依赖于整个轨迹，而无法在潜在的马尔可夫决策过程中进行递归贝尔曼分解。一种经典解决方法依赖于使用连续变量进行状态增强。然而，除非限制在特定种类的容许价值函数中，否则这种公式会导致稀疏奖励和退化的不动点。 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于增强的静态CVaR目标的新公式。 我们的替代方法产生一个具有以下特性的贝尔曼算子：(1) 稠密的每步奖励；(2) 在有界价值函数的完整空间上的收缩性质。基于这个理论基础，我们开发了基于离散化增强状态的风险规避价值迭代和无模型Q学习算法。 我们进一步提供了收敛性保证和由于离散化产生的近似误差界限。 实验结果表明，我们的算法成功地学习了CVaR敏感策略并实现了有效的性能-安全权衡。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel Bellman operator formulation for static CVaR optimization in MDPs, addressing the limitations of existing approaches by providing dense rewards and contraction properties, which are then used to develop risk-averse RL algorithms with convergence guarantees.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新型Bellman算子公式，用于马尔可夫决策过程中的静态条件风险价值（CVaR）优化。该方法通过提供密集奖励和收缩特性，克服了现有方法的局限性，进而开发了具有收敛保证的风险规避型强化学习算法。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Aneri Muni, Vincent Taboga, Esther Derman, Pierre-Luc Bacon, Erick Delage

Search-R2: Enhancing Search-Integrated Reasoning via Actor-Refiner Collaboration

Abstract (English): Search-integrated reasoning enables language agents to transcend static parametric knowledge by actively querying external sources. However, training these agents via reinforcement learning is hindered by the multi-scale credit assignment problem: existing methods typically rely on sparse, trajectory-level rewards that fail to distinguish between high-quality reasoning and fortuitous guesses, leading to redundant or misleading search behaviors. To address this, we propose Search-R2, a novel Actor-Refiner collaboration framework that enhances reasoning through targeted intervention, with both components jointly optimized during training. Our approach decomposes the generation process into an Actor, which produces initial reasoning trajectories, and a Meta-Refiner, which selectively diagnoses and repairs flawed steps via a 'cut-and-regenerate' mechanism. To provide fine-grained supervision, we introduce a hybrid reward design that couples outcome correctness with a dense process reward quantifying the information density of retrieved evidence. Theoretically, we formalize the Actor-Refiner interaction as a smoothed mixture policy, proving that selective correction yields strict performance gains over strong baselines. Extensive experiments across various general and multi-hop QA datasets demonstrate that Search-R2 consistently outperforms strong RAG and RL-based baselines across model scales, achieving superior reasoning accuracy with minimal overhead.

摘要（中文）: 搜索集成推理使语言智能体能够通过主动查询外部资源来超越静态参数知识。然而，通过强化学习训练这些智能体受到多尺度信用分配问题的阻碍：现有方法通常依赖于稀疏的、轨迹级别的奖励，无法区分高质量的推理和偶然的猜测，导致冗余或误导性的搜索行为。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Search-R2，一种新颖的Actor-Refiner协作框架，通过有针对性的干预来增强推理，其中两个组件在训练期间共同优化。我们的方法将生成过程分解为一个Actor，产生初始推理轨迹，以及一个Meta-Refiner，它通过“剪切和再生”机制选择性地诊断和修复错误的步骤。为了提供细粒度的监督，我们引入了一种混合奖励设计，将结果正确性与一个密集的流程奖励相结合，该奖励量化了检索到的证据的信息密度。从理论上讲，我们将Actor-Refiner交互形式化为一个平滑的混合策略，证明选择性纠正能够产生优于强基线的性能提升。在各种通用和多跳问答数据集上的大量实验表明，Search-R2在各种模型规模上始终优于强大的RAG和基于RL的基线，以最小的开销实现了卓越的推理准确性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Search-R2, an Actor-Refiner framework that enhances search-integrated reasoning by selectively correcting flawed reasoning steps using a hybrid reward system, leading to performance gains on multi-hop QA tasks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Search-R2，一个 Actor-Refiner 框架，它通过使用混合奖励系统选择性地纠正有缺陷的推理步骤来增强搜索集成推理，从而在多跳 QA 任务中获得性能提升。

Novelty: (8/10)

Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Bowei He, Minda Hu, Zenan Xu, Hongru Wang, Licheng Zong, Yankai Chen, Chen Ma, Xue Liu, Pluto Zhou, Irwin King

Can LLMs Do Rocket Science? Exploring the Limits of Complex Reasoning with GTOC 12

Abstract (English): Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency in code generation and general reasoning, yet their capacity for autonomous multi-stage planning in high-dimensional, physically constrained environments remains an open research question. This study investigates the limits of current AI agents by evaluating them against the 12th Global Trajectory Optimization Competition (GTOC 12), a complex astrodynamics challenge requiring the design of a large-scale asteroid mining campaign. We adapt the MLE-Bench framework to the domain of orbital mechanics and deploy an AIDE-based agent architecture to autonomously generate and refine mission solutions. To assess performance beyond binary validity, we employ an "LLM-as-a-Judge" methodology, utilizing a rubric developed by domain experts to evaluate strategic viability across five structural categories. A comparative analysis of models, ranging from GPT-4-Turbo to reasoning-enhanced architectures like Gemini 2.5 Pro, and o3, reveals a significant trend: the average strategic viability score has nearly doubled in the last two years (rising from 9.3 to 17.2 out of 26). However, we identify a critical capability gap between strategy and execution. While advanced models demonstrate sophisticated conceptual understanding, correctly framing objective functions and mission architectures, they consistently fail at implementation due to physical unit inconsistencies, boundary condition errors, and inefficient debugging loops. We conclude that, while current LLMs often demonstrate sufficient knowledge and intelligence to tackle space science tasks, they remain limited by an implementation barrier, functioning as powerful domain facilitators rather than fully autonomous engineers.

摘要（中文）: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码生成和通用推理方面展现出卓越的能力，然而，它们在高维、物理约束环境下进行自主多阶段规划的能力仍然是一个开放的研究问题。本研究通过评估当前AI智能体在第十二届全球轨迹优化竞赛（GTOC 12）中的表现，来考察它们的局限性，这是一项复杂的航天动力学挑战，需要设计大规模的小行星采矿活动。我们针对轨道力学领域调整了MLE-Bench框架，并部署了基于AIDE智能体的架构，以自主生成和优化任务解决方案。为了评估超出二元有效性的性能，我们采用了一种“LLM-即-裁判”的方法，利用领域专家开发的评分细则来评估五个结构类别的战略可行性。对模型的比较分析，包括GPT-4-Turbo到推理强化的架构，如Gemini 2.5 Pro和o3，揭示了一个显著的趋势：平均战略可行性得分在过去两年几乎翻了一番（从9.3提升到26分中的17.2分）。然而，我们发现战略和执行之间存在关键的能力差距。虽然先进模型表现出复杂的概念理解，能够正确地构建目标函数和任务架构，但由于物理单位不一致、边界条件错误和低效的调试循环，它们在实施方面始终失败。我们得出结论：虽然目前的LLMs通常表现出足够的知识和智能来处理空间科学任务，但它们仍然受到实施障碍的限制，其功能更像是强大的领域促进者，而不是完全自主的工程师。

TLDR: This paper evaluates LLMs on the complex astrodynamics problem of the GTOC 12 asteroid mining campaign, finding that while LLMs can formulate strategies, they struggle with physical implementation due to unit inconsistencies and debugging limitations.

简要说明: 本文评估了大型语言模型在GTOC 12小行星采矿竞赛这一复杂的航天动力学问题上的表现，发现虽然LLM可以制定策略，但由于单位不一致和调试限制，它们在物理实施方面存在困难。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Iñaki del Campo, Pablo Cuervo, Victor Rodriguez-Fernandez, Roberto Armellin, Jack Yarndley

An Approximate Ascent Approach To Prove Convergence of PPO

Abstract (English): Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) is among the most widely used deep reinforcement learning algorithms, yet its theoretical foundations remain incomplete. Most importantly, convergence and understanding of fundamental PPO advantages remain widely open. Under standard theory assumptions we show how PPO's policy update scheme (performing multiple epochs of minibatch updates on multi-use rollouts with a surrogate gradient) can be interpreted as approximated policy gradient ascent. We show how to control the bias accumulated by the surrogate gradients and use techniques from random reshuffling to prove a convergence theorem for PPO that sheds light on PPO's success. Additionally, we identify a previously overlooked issue in truncated Generalized Advantage Estimation commonly used in PPO. The geometric weighting scheme induces infinite mass collapse onto the longest $k$-step advantage estimator at episode boundaries. Empirical evaluations show that a simple weight correction can yield substantial improvements in environments with strong terminal signal, such as Lunar Lander.

摘要（中文）: 近端策略优化(PPO)是最广泛使用的深度强化学习算法之一，但其理论基础仍然不完整。最重要的是，PPO的收敛性和对PPO根本优势的理解仍然很大程度上是未知的。在标准理论假设下，我们展示了PPO的策略更新方案（在具有代理梯度的多用途轨迹数据上执行多个epoch的小批量更新）如何被解释为近似策略梯度上升。我们展示了如何控制由代理梯度累积的偏差，并使用随机重排技术来证明PPO的收敛定理，从而阐明PPO的成功。此外，我们发现了PPO中常用的截断广义优势估计的一个先前被忽略的问题。几何加权方案会导致无限质量崩溃，集中在episode边界的最长$k$步优势估计器上。经验评估表明，简单的权重校正可以在具有强终端信号的环境（例如Lunar Lander）中产生显着改进。

TLDR: This paper provides a theoretical convergence proof for PPO using an approximate policy gradient ascent interpretation and identifies/corrects an issue with truncated Generalized Advantage Estimation at episode boundaries, leading to empirical improvements.

简要说明: 本文使用近似策略梯度上升解释为PPO提供了理论收敛证明，并识别/纠正了episode边界处截断的广义优势估计的问题，从而带来了经验上的改进。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Leif Doering, Daniel Schmidt, Moritz Melcher, Sebastian Kassing, Benedikt Wille, Tilman Aach, Simon Weissmann

Knowledge Model Prompting Increases LLM Performance on Planning Tasks

Abstract (English): Large Language Models (LLM) can struggle with reasoning ability and planning tasks. Many prompting techniques have been developed to assist with LLM reasoning, notably Chain-of-Thought (CoT); however, these techniques, too, have come under scrutiny as LLMs' ability to reason at all has come into question. Borrowing from the domain of cognitive and educational science, this paper investigates whether the Task-Method-Knowledge (TMK) framework can improve LLM reasoning capabilities beyond its previously demonstrated success in educational applications. The TMK framework's unique ability to capture causal, teleological, and hierarchical reasoning structures, combined with its explicit task decomposition mechanisms, makes it particularly well-suited for addressing language model reasoning deficiencies, and unlike other hierarchical frameworks such as HTN and BDI, TMK provides explicit representations of not just what to do and how to do it, but also why actions are taken. The study evaluates TMK by experimenting on the PlanBench benchmark, focusing on the Blocksworld domain to test for reasoning and planning capabilities, examining whether TMK-structured prompting can help language models better decompose complex planning problems into manageable sub-tasks. Results also highlight significant performance inversion in reasoning models. TMK prompting enables the reasoning model to achieve up to an accuracy of 97.3\% on opaque, symbolic tasks (Random versions of Blocksworld in PlanBench) where it previously failed (31.5\%), suggesting the potential to bridge the gap between semantic approximation and symbolic manipulation. Our findings suggest that TMK functions not merely as context, but also as a mechanism that steers reasoning models away from their default linguistic modes to engage formal, code-execution pathways in the context of the experiments.

摘要（中文）: 大型语言模型（LLM）在推理能力和规划任务方面可能表现不佳。许多提示技巧已被开发用于辅助 LLM 推理，其中最著名的是思维链（CoT）技术；然而，随着 LLM 是否具备推理能力的问题受到质疑，这些技术也受到了严格审查。本文借鉴认知科学和教育科学领域的研究，探讨了任务-方法-知识（TMK）框架是否能在教育应用中取得成功的基础上，进一步提高 LLM 的推理能力。TMK 框架能够捕捉因果、目的论和分层推理结构，并具有显式的任务分解机制，这使其特别适合解决语言模型推理缺陷。与其他分层框架（如 HTN 和 BDI）不同，TMK 不仅提供了关于做什么和如何做的显式表示，还提供了采取行动的原因。本研究通过 PlanBench 基准测试对 TMK 进行评估，重点关注 Blocksworld 领域，以测试推理和规划能力，并考察 TMK 结构化提示是否能帮助语言模型更好地将复杂规划问题分解为可管理的子任务。结果还突出了推理模型中的显著性能反转。TMK 提示使得推理模型在不透明的符号任务（PlanBench 中 Blocksworld 的随机版本）上，实现了高达97.3\% 的准确率，而之前其准确率仅为 31.5\%，这表明其有潜力弥合语义近似和符号操作之间的差距。我们的研究结果表明，TMK 不仅作为上下文信息发挥作用，而且还作为一种机制，引导推理模型远离其默认的语言模式，从而在实验背景下激活正式的、代码执行的路径。

TLDR: This paper introduces Knowledge Model Prompting (specifically the TMK framework) to improve LLM performance on planning tasks, demonstrating significant accuracy improvements on the PlanBench benchmark's Blocksworld domain.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种知识模型提示方法（特别是TMK框架），以提高LLM在规划任务中的性能，并在PlanBench基准测试的Blocksworld领域中展示了显著的准确性提升。

Novelty: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Erik Goh, John Kos, Ashok Goel

Memora: A Harmonic Memory Representation Balancing Abstraction and Specificity

Abstract (English): Agent memory systems must accommodate continuously growing information while supporting efficient, context-aware retrieval for downstream tasks. Abstraction is essential for scaling agent memory, yet it often comes at the cost of specificity, obscuring the fine-grained details required for effective reasoning. We introduce Memora, a harmonic memory representation that structurally balances abstraction and specificity. Memora organizes information via its primary abstractions that index concrete memory values and consolidate related updates into unified memory entries, while cue anchors expand retrieval access across diverse aspects of the memory and connect related memories. Building on this structure, we employ a retrieval policy that actively exploits these memory connections to retrieve relevant information beyond direct semantic similarity. Theoretically, we show that standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Knowledge Graph (KG)-based memory systems emerge as special cases of our framework. Empirically, Memora establishes a new state-of-the-art on the LoCoMo and LongMemEval benchmarks, demonstrating better retrieval relevance and reasoning effectiveness as memory scales.

摘要（中文）: 代理记忆系统必须容纳持续增长的信息，同时支持高效的、上下文感知的检索，以用于下游任务。抽象对于扩展代理记忆至关重要，但它通常以牺牲特异性为代价，掩盖了有效推理所需的精细细节。我们引入了Memora，一种结构性地平衡抽象和特异性的谐波记忆表示。Memora通过其主要抽象来组织信息，这些抽象索引具体的记忆值并将相关更新合并为统一的记忆条目，同时提示锚点扩展了跨记忆不同方面的检索访问，并将相关记忆连接起来。在此结构的基础上，我们采用一种检索策略，该策略主动利用这些记忆连接来检索超出直接语义相似性的相关信息。理论上，我们表明标准的检索增强生成（RAG）和基于知识图谱（KG）的记忆系统是我们框架的特例。在实验上，Memora在LoCoMo和LongMemEval基准测试上建立了新的最先进水平，证明了随着记忆规模的扩大，更好的检索相关性和推理有效性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Memora, a novel memory representation that balances abstraction and specificity for improved retrieval relevance and reasoning effectiveness in agents, achieving state-of-the-art results on LoCoMo and LongMemEval.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Memora，一种新的记忆表示方法，它平衡了抽象性和特异性，从而提高了智能体检索的相关性和推理的有效性，并在LoCoMo和LongMemEval上取得了最先进的结果。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Menglin Xia, Xuchao Zhang, Shantanu Dixit, Paramaguru Harimurugan, Rujia Wang, Victor Ruhle, Robert Sim, Chetan Bansal, Saravan Rajmohan

Periodic Regularized Q-Learning

Abstract (English): In reinforcement learning (RL), Q-learning is a fundamental algorithm whose convergence is guaranteed in the tabular setting. However, this convergence guarantee does not hold under linear function approximation. To overcome this limitation, a significant line of research has introduced regularization techniques to ensure stable convergence under function approximation. In this work, we propose a new algorithm, periodic regularized Q-learning (PRQ). We first introduce regularization at the level of the projection operator and explicitly construct a regularized projected value iteration (RP-VI), subsequently extending it to a sample-based RL algorithm. By appropriately regularizing the projection operator, the resulting projected value iteration becomes a contraction. By extending this regularized projection into the stochastic setting, we establish the PRQ algorithm and provide a rigorous theoretical analysis that proves finite-time convergence guarantees for PRQ under linear function approximation.

摘要（中文）: 在强化学习 (RL) 中，Q-学习是一种基本算法，其收敛性在表格型设置下得到保证。然而，该收敛性保证在线性函数逼近下并不成立。为了克服这一限制，一项重要的研究方向引入了正则化技术，以确保函数逼近下的稳定收敛。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的算法，即周期性正则化 Q-学习 (PRQ)。我们首先在投影算子的层面上引入正则化，并显式地构建了一个正则化投影值迭代 (RP-VI)，随后将其扩展到基于采样的 RL 算法。通过适当地正则化投影算子，所得到的投影值迭代变成一个收缩。通过将这种正则化投影扩展到随机设置中，我们建立了 PRQ 算法，并提供了严格的理论分析，证明了 PRQ 在线性函数逼近下的有限时间收敛保证。

TLDR: This paper introduces Periodic Regularized Q-Learning (PRQ), a Q-learning algorithm with a regularized projection operator that provably converges in finite-time under linear function approximation, addressing limitations of standard Q-learning.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种周期正则化Q学习（PRQ）算法，该算法具有正则化的投影算子，可以在线性函数逼近下实现有限时间内的收敛，从而解决了标准Q学习的局限性。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Hyukjun Yang, Han-Dong Lim, Donghwan Lee

LPS-Bench: Benchmarking Safety Awareness of Computer-Use Agents in Long-Horizon Planning under Benign and Adversarial Scenarios

Abstract (English): Computer-use agents (CUAs) that interact with real computer systems can perform automated tasks but face critical safety risks. Ambiguous instructions may trigger harmful actions, and adversarial users can manipulate tool execution to achieve malicious goals. Existing benchmarks mostly focus on short-horizon or GUI-based tasks, evaluating on execution-time errors but overlooking the ability to anticipate planning-time risks. To fill this gap, we present LPS-Bench, a benchmark that evaluates the planning-time safety awareness of MCP-based CUAs under long-horizon tasks, covering both benign and adversarial interactions across 65 scenarios of 7 task domains and 9 risk types. We introduce a multi-agent automated pipeline for scalable data generation and adopt an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation protocol to assess safety awareness through the planning trajectory. Experiments reveal substantial deficiencies in existing CUAs' ability to maintain safe behavior. We further analyze the risks and propose mitigation strategies to improve long-horizon planning safety in MCP-based CUA systems. We open-source our code at https://github.com/tychenn/LPS-Bench.

摘要（中文）: 与真实计算机系统交互的计算机使用代理(CUAs)能够执行自动化任务，但面临严峻的安全风险。模糊指令可能触发有害行为，恶意用户可以操纵工具执行以达到其恶意目的。现有基准测试大多关注短时程或基于GUI的任务，评估执行时错误，而忽略了预测规划时风险的能力。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了LPS-Bench，一个用于评估基于MCP的CUAs在长时程任务下的规划时安全意识的基准测试，涵盖了七个任务领域的65个场景和九种风险类型的良性和对抗性交互。我们引入了一个多代理自动化管线，用于可扩展的数据生成，并采用LLM-as-a-judge评估协议，通过规划轨迹来评估安全意识。实验表明，现有CUAs在维持安全行为的能力方面存在显著缺陷。我们进一步分析了风险，并提出了缓解策略，以提高基于MCP的CUA系统中长时程规划的安全性。我们已在https://github.com/tychenn/LPS-Bench开源了我们的代码。

TLDR: The paper introduces LPS-Bench, a new benchmark for evaluating the safety awareness of computer-use agents (CUAs) in long-horizon planning tasks under benign and adversarial scenarios.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了LPS-Bench，一个新的基准测试，用于评估计算机使用代理（CUA）在良性和对抗性场景下，长时程规划任务中的安全意识。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tianyu Chen, Chujia Hu, Ge Gao, Dongrui Liu, Xia Hu, Wenjie Wang

TAME: A Trustworthy Test-Time Evolution of Agent Memory with Systematic Benchmarking

Abstract (English): Test-time evolution of agent memory serves as a pivotal paradigm for achieving AGI by bolstering complex reasoning through experience accumulation. However, even during benign task evolution, agent safety alignment remains vulnerable-a phenomenon known as Agent Memory Misevolution. To evaluate this phenomenon, we construct the Trust-Memevo benchmark to assess multi-dimensional trustworthiness during benign task evolution, revealing an overall decline in trustworthiness across various task domains and evaluation settings. To address this issue, we propose TAME, a dual-memory evolutionary framework that separately evolves executor memory to improve task performance by distilling generalizable methodologies, and evaluator memory to refine assessments of both safety and task utility based on historical feedback. Through a closed loop of memory filtering, draft generation, trustworthy refinement, execution, and dual-track memory updating, TAME preserves trustworthiness without sacrificing utility. Experiments demonstrate that TAME mitigates misevolution, achieving a joint improvement in both trustworthiness and task performance.

摘要（中文）: 智能体记忆在测试时期的演化是实现通用人工智能的关键范式，它通过经验积累来增强复杂推理能力。然而，即使在良性任务演化期间，智能体安全对齐仍然容易受到攻击——这种现象被称为智能体记忆误进化。为了评估这一现象，我们构建了 Trust-Memevo 基准，以评估良性任务演化期间的多维度可信度，结果表明在各种任务领域和评估设置中，可信度呈总体下降趋势。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TAME，一种双记忆演化框架，它分别演化执行器记忆以通过提炼可泛化的方法论来提高任务性能，并演化评估器记忆以基于历史反馈来完善对安全性和任务效用的评估。通过记忆过滤、草稿生成、可信细化、执行以及双轨记忆更新的闭环过程，TAME 能够在不牺牲效用的前提下保持可信度。实验表明，TAME 能够减轻误进化，实现可信度和任务性能的联合提升。

TLDR: The paper introduces TAME, a framework to mitigate agent memory misevolution during test-time evolution by using a dual-memory system to improve both task performance and trustworthiness, along with a benchmark to evaluate this phenomenon.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为TAME的框架，通过使用双内存系统来提高任务性能和可信度，从而缓解测试时演化过程中代理记忆的错误演化，并提供了一个评估此现象的基准。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yu Cheng, Jiuan Zhou, Yongkang Hu, Yihang Chen, Huichi Zhou, Mingang Chen, Zhizhong Zhang, Kun Shao, Yuan Xie, Zhaoxia Yin

Beyond Quantity: Trajectory Diversity Scaling for Code Agents

Abstract (English): As code large language models (LLMs) evolve into tool-interactive agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), their generalization is increasingly limited by low-quality synthetic data and the diminishing returns of quantity scaling. Moreover, quantity-centric scaling exhibits an early bottleneck that underutilizes trajectory data. We propose TDScaling, a Trajectory Diversity Scaling-based data synthesis framework for code agents that scales performance through diversity rather than raw volume. Under a fixed training budget, increasing trajectory diversity yields larger gains than adding more trajectories, improving the performance-cost trade-off for agent training. TDScaling integrates four innovations: (1) a Business Cluster mechanism that captures real-service logical dependencies; (2) a blueprint-driven multi-agent paradigm that enforces trajectory coherence; (3) an adaptive evolution mechanism that steers synthesis toward long-tail scenarios using Domain Entropy, Reasoning Mode Entropy, and Cumulative Action Complexity to prevent mode collapse; and (4) a sandboxed code tool that mitigates catastrophic forgetting of intrinsic coding capabilities. Experiments on general tool-use benchmarks (BFCL, tau^2-Bench) and code agent tasks (RebenchT, CodeCI, BIRD) demonstrate a win-win outcome: TDScaling improves both tool-use generalization and inherent coding proficiency. We plan to release the full codebase and the synthesized dataset (including 30,000+ tool clusters) upon publication.

摘要（中文）: 随着代码大型语言模型（LLM）通过模型上下文协议（MCP）演进成工具交互型代理，其泛化能力日益受到低质量合成数据和数量扩展的收益递减的限制。此外，以数量为中心的扩展表现出早期瓶颈，未能充分利用轨迹数据。我们提出TDScaling，一个基于轨迹多样性扩展的代码代理数据合成框架，该框架通过多样性而非原始数量来扩展性能。在固定的训练预算下，增加轨迹多样性比添加更多轨迹产生更大的收益，从而改善了代理训练的性能-成本权衡。TDScaling集成了四项创新：（1）一种捕获真实服务逻辑依赖关系的业务集群机制；（2）一种强制轨迹一致性的蓝图驱动的多代理范式；（3）一种自适应进化机制，该机制使用领域熵、推理模式熵和累积动作复杂度将合成引导至长尾场景，以防止模式崩溃；以及（4）一个沙盒代码工具，用于缓解对内在编码能力的灾难性遗忘。在通用工具使用基准测试（BFCL，tau^2-Bench）和代码代理任务（RebenchT，CodeCI，BIRD）上的实验表明，TDScaling实现了双赢的结果：既提高了工具使用的泛化能力，又提高了固有的编码能力。我们计划在发表时发布完整的代码库和合成数据集（包括30,000多个工具集群）。

TLDR: The paper introduces TDScaling, a data synthesis framework for code agents that emphasizes trajectory diversity over quantity to improve generalization and coding proficiency, using techniques like business cluster analysis and adaptive evolution.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为 TDScaling 的代码代理数据合成框架，该框架强调轨迹多样性而非数量，通过诸如业务集群分析和自适应进化等技术来提高泛化能力和编码能力。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Guhong Chen, Chenghao Sun, Cheng Fu, Qiyao Wang, Zhihong Huang, Chaopeng Wei, Guangxu Chen, Feiteng Fang, Ahmadreza Argha, Bing Zhao, Xander Xu, Qi Han, Hamid Alinejad-Rokny, Qiang Qu, Binhua Li, Shiwen Ni, Min Yang, Hu Wei, Yongbin Li

Contrastive Concept-Tree Search for LLM-Assisted Algorithm Discovery

Abstract (English): Large language Model (LLM)-assisted algorithm discovery is an iterative, black-box optimization process over programs to approximatively solve a target task, where an LLM proposes candidate programs and an external evaluator provides task feedback. Despite intense recent research on the topic and promising results, how can the LLM internal representation of the space of possible programs be maximally exploited to improve performance is an open question. Here, we introduce Contrastive Concept-Tree Search (CCTS), which extracts a hierarchical concept representation from the generated programs and learns a contrastive concept model that guides parent selection. By reweighting parents using a likelihood-ratio score between high- and low-performing solutions, CCTS biases search toward useful concept combinations and away from misleading ones, providing guidance through an explicit concept hierarchy rather than the algorithm lineage constructed by the LLM. We show that CCTS improves search efficiency over fitness-based baselines and produces interpretable, task-specific concept trees across a benchmark of open Erdős-type combinatorics problems. Our analysis indicates that the gains are driven largely by learning which concepts to avoid. We further validate these findings in a controlled synthetic algorithm-discovery environment, which reproduces qualitatively the search dynamics observed with the LLMs.

摘要（中文）: 大型语言模型（LLM）辅助的算法发现是一个迭代式的黑盒优化过程，其目标是通过程序来近似解决目标任务，其中LLM提出候选程序，而外部评估器提供任务反馈。尽管最近对此主题进行了深入研究并取得了可喜的成果，但如何最大限度地利用LLM对可能程序空间的内部表示以提高性能仍然是一个开放性问题。在此，我们引入了对比概念树搜索（CCTS），它从生成的程序中提取分层概念表示，并学习一个对比概念模型来指导父节点选择。通过使用高绩效和低绩效解决方案之间的似然比分数来重新加权父节点，CCTS将搜索偏向于有用的概念组合，并远离误导性的概念组合，从而通过显式的概念层次结构而非由LLM构建的算法谱系提供指导。我们证明，CCTS在开放式 Erdős 型组合学问题的基准测试中，提高了搜索效率，优于基于适应度的基线，并生成可解释的、特定于任务的概念树。我们的分析表明，性能提升主要归功于学习要避免哪些概念。我们进一步在受控的合成算法发现环境中验证了这些发现，该环境在质量上重现了利用 LLM 观察到的搜索动态。

TLDR: The paper introduces Contrastive Concept-Tree Search (CCTS) to improve LLM-assisted algorithm discovery by extracting a hierarchical concept representation and learning a contrastive concept model to guide parent selection. It improves search efficiency and produces interpretable concept trees.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了对比概念树搜索 (CCTS)，通过提取分层概念表示并学习对比概念模型来指导父级选择，从而改进 LLM 辅助的算法发现。它可以提高搜索效率并生成可解释的概念树。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Timothee Leleu, Sudeera Gunathilaka, Federico Ghimenti, Surya Ganguli

MAS-ProVe: Understanding the Process Verification of Multi-Agent Systems

Abstract (English): Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on Large Language Models (LLMs) often exhibit high variance in their reasoning trajectories. Process verification, which evaluates intermediate steps in trajectories, has shown promise in general reasoning settings, and has been suggested as a potential tool for guiding coordination of MAS; however, its actual effectiveness in MAS remains unclear. To fill this gap, we present MAS-ProVe, a systematic empirical study of process verification for multi-agent systems (MAS). Our study spans three verification paradigms (LLM-as-a-Judge, reward models, and process reward models), evaluated across two levels of verification granularity (agent-level and iteration-level). We further examine five representative verifiers and four context management strategies, and conduct experiments over six diverse MAS frameworks on multiple reasoning benchmarks. We find that process-level verification does not consistently improve performance and frequently exhibits high variance, highlighting the difficulty of reliably evaluating partial multi-agent trajectories. Among the methods studied, LLM-as-a-Judge generally outperforms reward-based approaches, with trained judges surpassing general-purpose LLMs. We further observe a small performance gap between LLMs acting as judges and as single agents, and identify a context-length-performance trade-off in verification. Overall, our results suggest that effective and robust process verification for MAS remains an open challenge, requiring further advances beyond current paradigms. Code is available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/MAS-ProVe.

摘要（中文）: 基于大型语言模型（LLMs）构建的多智能体系统（MAS）通常在其推理轨迹中表现出高度的差异性。过程验证，即评估轨迹中的中间步骤，已在通用推理场景中展现出潜力，并被认为是一种指导MAS协调的潜在工具；然而，其在MAS中的实际有效性仍不明确。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了MAS-ProVe，一项针对多智能体系统（MAS）过程验证的系统性实证研究。我们的研究涵盖三种验证范式（LLM作为评判者、奖励模型和过程奖励模型），并在两种验证粒度级别（智能体级别和迭代级别）上进行评估。我们进一步考察了五种代表性验证器和四种上下文管理策略，并在多个推理基准上对六个不同的MAS框架进行了实验。我们发现，过程级别的验证并没有持续地提高性能，并且经常表现出高度的差异性，突显了可靠评估部分多智能体轨迹的难度。在所研究的方法中，LLM作为评判者通常优于基于奖励的方法，并且经过训练的评判者超越了通用LLMs。我们进一步观察到，LLMs作为评判者和作为单个智能体之间的性能差距很小，并确定了验证中上下文长度与性能之间的权衡。总体而言，我们的结果表明，有效且鲁棒的MAS过程验证仍然是一个开放的挑战，需要超越当前范式的进一步发展。代码可在https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/MAS-ProVe获取。

TLDR: The paper systematically studies the effectiveness of process verification techniques within Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on LLMs, finding that current methods don't consistently improve performance and often exhibit high variance. LLM-as-a-Judge generally outperforms reward-based approaches.

简要说明: 该论文系统性地研究了过程验证技术在基于LLM的多智能体系统（MAS）中的有效性，发现当前方法并不能持续提高性能，并且经常表现出高方差。LLM作为裁判通常优于基于奖励的方法。

Authors: Vishal Venkataramani, Haizhou Shi, Zixuan Ke, Austin Xu, Xiaoxiao He, Yingbo Zhou, Semih Yavuz, Hao Wang, Shafiq Joty

CVE-Factory: Scaling Expert-Level Agentic Tasks for Code Security Vulnerability

Abstract (English): Evaluating and improving the security capabilities of code agents requires high-quality, executable vulnerability tasks. However, existing works rely on costly, unscalable manual reproduction and suffer from outdated data distributions. To address these, we present CVE-Factory, the first multi-agent framework to achieve expert-level quality in automatically transforming sparse CVE metadata into fully executable agentic tasks. Cross-validation against human expert reproductions shows that CVE-Factory achieves 95\% solution correctness and 96\% environment fidelity, confirming its expert-level quality. It is also evaluated on the latest realistic vulnerabilities and achieves a 66.2\% verified success. This automation enables two downstream contributions. First, we construct LiveCVEBench, a continuously updated benchmark of 190 tasks spanning 14 languages and 153 repositories that captures emerging threats including AI-tooling vulnerabilities. Second, we synthesize over 1,000 executable training environments, the first large-scale scaling of agentic tasks in code security. Fine-tuned Qwen3-32B improves from 5.3\% to 35.8\% on LiveCVEBench, surpassing Claude 4.5 Sonnet, with gains generalizing to Terminal Bench (12.5\% to 31.3\%). We open-source CVE-Factory, LiveCVEBench, Abacus-cve (fine-tuned model), training dataset, and leaderboard. All resources are available at https://github.com/livecvebench/CVE-Factory .

摘要（中文）: 评估和提升代码智能体的安全能力需要高质量、可执行的漏洞任务。然而，现有工作依赖于成本高昂、无法扩展的人工复现，并面临数据分布过时的问题。为解决这些问题，我们提出了CVE-Factory，首个多智能体框架，可在自动将稀疏的CVE元数据转换为完全可执行的智能体任务的过程中实现专家级质量。通过与人类专家复现结果的交叉验证表明，CVE-Factory实现了95%的解决方案正确率和96%的环境保真度，证实了其专家级质量。它还在最新的真实漏洞上进行了评估，实现了66.2%的验证成功率。这种自动化实现了两个下游贡献。首先，我们构建了LiveCVEBench，一个包含190个任务的持续更新的基准，涵盖14种语言和153个代码仓库，捕捉包括AI工具漏洞在内的新兴威胁。其次，我们合成了超过1,000个可执行的训练环境，这是代码安全领域首次大规模扩展智能体任务。微调后的Qwen3-32B在LiveCVEBench上的表现从5.3%提升到35.8%，超过了Claude 4.5 Sonnet，并且收益可以泛化到Terminal Bench（从12.5%提升到31.3%）。我们开源了CVE-Factory，LiveCVEBench，Abacus-cve（微调模型），训练数据集和排行榜。所有资源都可以在https://github.com/livecvebench/CVE-Factory 获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces CVE-Factory, a multi-agent framework for automatically generating high-quality, executable vulnerability tasks from CVE metadata, enabling the creation of benchmarks and training data for code security agents.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了CVE-Factory，一个多智能体框架，用于从CVE元数据自动生成高质量、可执行的漏洞任务，从而为代码安全智能体创建基准和训练数据。

Authors: Xianzhen Luo, Jingyuan Zhang, Shiqi Zhou, Rain Huang, Chuan Xiao, Qingfu Zhu, Zhiyuan Ma, Xing Yue, Yang Yue, Wencong Zeng, Wanxiang Che

Large Language Models Can Take False First Steps at Inference-time Planning

Abstract (English): Large language models (LLMs) have been shown to acquire sequence-level planning abilities during training, yet their planning behavior exhibited at inference time often appears short-sighted and inconsistent with these capabilities. We propose a Bayesian account for this gap by grounding planning behavior in the evolving generative context: given the subtle differences between natural language and the language internalized by LLMs, accumulated self-generated context drives a planning-shift during inference and thereby creates the appearance of compromised planning behavior. We further validate the proposed model through two controlled experiments: a random-generation task demonstrating constrained planning under human prompts and increasing planning strength as self-generated context accumulates, and a Gaussian-sampling task showing reduced initial bias when conditioning on self-generated sequences. These findings provide a theoretical explanation along with empirical evidence for characterizing how LLMs plan ahead during inference.

摘要（中文）: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已被证明在训练过程中获得了序列级规划能力，然而，它们在推理时表现出的规划行为往往显得短视，并且与这些能力不一致。我们提出了一种贝叶斯解释来解释这种差距，通过将规划行为置于不断演变的生成上下文中：鉴于自然语言与LLM内部化的语言之间存在细微差异，累积的自生成上下文会驱动推理过程中的规划转移，从而造成规划行为受损的表象。我们通过两个受控实验进一步验证了所提出的模型：一个是随机生成任务，展示了在人类提示下受约束的规划，以及随着自生成上下文的积累而不断增强的规划强度；另一个是高斯采样任务，显示了在以自生成序列为条件时初始偏差的减少。这些发现提供了一个理论解释以及经验证据，用于描述LLMs在推理过程中如何进行前瞻规划。

TLDR: This paper investigates the apparent inconsistency between LLMs' learned planning capabilities and their often short-sighted behavior at inference time, attributing it to a 'planning-shift' driven by accumulated self-generated context.

简要说明: 该论文研究了大型语言模型在训练中习得的规划能力与推理时表现出的短视行为之间的明显不一致性，并将其归因于累积的自生成上下文驱动的“规划转变”。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Haijiang Yan, Jian-Qiao Zhu, Adam Sanborn

Scaling Small Agents Through Strategy Auctions

Abstract (English): Small language models are increasingly viewed as a promising, cost-effective approach to agentic AI, with proponents claiming they are sufficiently capable for agentic workflows. However, while smaller agents can closely match larger ones on simple tasks, it remains unclear how their performance scales with task complexity, when large models become necessary, and how to better leverage small agents for long-horizon workloads. In this work, we empirically show that small agents' performance fails to scale with task complexity on deep search and coding tasks, and we introduce Strategy Auctions for Workload Efficiency (SALE), an agent framework inspired by freelancer marketplaces. In SALE, agents bid with short strategic plans, which are scored by a systematic cost-value mechanism and refined via a shared auction memory, enabling per-task routing and continual self-improvement without training a separate router or running all models to completion. Across deep search and coding tasks of varying complexity, SALE reduces reliance on the largest agent by 53%, lowers overall cost by 35%, and consistently improves upon the largest agent's pass@1 with only a negligible overhead beyond executing the final trace. In contrast, established routers that rely on task descriptions either underperform the largest agent or fail to reduce cost -- often both -- underscoring their poor fit for agentic workflows. These results suggest that while small agents may be insufficient for complex workloads, they can be effectively "scaled up" through coordinated task allocation and test-time self-improvement. More broadly, they motivate a systems-level view of agentic AI in which performance gains come less from ever-larger individual models and more from market-inspired coordination mechanisms that organize heterogeneous agents into efficient, adaptive ecosystems.

摘要（中文）: 小型语言模型正日益被视为一种有前景且经济高效的智能体AI方法，支持者声称它们足以胜任智能体工作流程。然而，虽然较小的智能体可以在简单任务上与较大的智能体相媲美，但它们在任务复杂度增加时的性能是如何扩展的，何时需要大型模型，以及如何更好地利用小型智能体进行长时程工作负载，仍然不清楚。在这项工作中，我们通过实证表明，小型智能体在深度搜索和编码任务中的性能未能随着任务复杂度的增加而扩展，并且我们引入了工作负载效率策略拍卖（SALE），这是一种受自由职业者市场启发的智能体框架。在SALE中，智能体通过简短的策略性计划进行竞标，这些计划通过系统的成本-价值机制进行评分，并通过共享的拍卖记忆进行改进，从而实现按任务路由和持续的自我提升，而无需训练单独的路由器或运行所有模型至完成。在不同复杂度的深度搜索和编码任务中，SALE将对最大智能体的依赖性降低了53%，总体成本降低了35%，并且始终在最大智能体的pass@1基础上进行了改进，仅在执行最终轨迹之外产生可忽略不计的额外开销。相比之下，依赖于任务描述的既定路由器要么表现不及最大智能体，要么无法降低成本——通常两者都是——突显了它们与智能体工作流程的不适应性。这些结果表明，虽然小型智能体可能不足以胜任复杂的工作负载，但可以通过协调的任务分配和测试时自我提升来有效地“放大”它们。更广泛地说，它们激发了对智能体AI的系统级观点，即性能提升更多地来自受市场启发的协调机制，这些机制将异构智能体组织成高效、自适应的生态系统，而不是来自越来越大的单个模型。

TLDR: This paper introduces Strategy Auctions for Workload Efficiency (SALE), a framework that uses a market-inspired mechanism to improve the performance of small language model agents on complex tasks, showing reduced reliance on large models and cost savings compared to established routers.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了工作负载效率策略拍卖（SALE）框架，该框架使用市场机制来提高小型语言模型代理在复杂任务上的性能，与已建立的路由器相比，减少了对大型模型的依赖并节省了成本。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Lisa Alazraki, William F. Shen, Yoram Bachrach, Akhil Mathur

AgentRx: Diagnosing AI Agent Failures from Execution Trajectories

Abstract (English): AI agents often fail in ways that are difficult to localize because executions are probabilistic, long-horizon, multi-agent, and mediated by noisy tool outputs. We address this gap by manually annotating failed agent runs and release a novel benchmark of 115 failed trajectories spanning structured API workflows, incident management, and open-ended web/file tasks. Each trajectory is annotated with a critical failure step and a category from a grounded-theory derived, cross-domain failure taxonomy. To mitigate the human cost of failure attribution, we present AGENTRX, an automated domain-agnostic diagnostic framework that pinpoints the critical failure step in a failed agent trajectory. It synthesizes constraints, evaluates them step-by-step, and produces an auditable validation log of constraint violations with associated evidence; an LLM-based judge uses this log to localize the critical step and category. Our framework improves step localization and failure attribution over existing baselines across three domains.

摘要（中文）: 人工智能代理通常会由于其执行过程的概率性、长时程性、多代理交互以及带有噪声的工具输出等因素而出现难以定位的故障。为了弥补这一不足，我们手动标注了失败的代理运行轨迹，并发布了一个包含 115 条失败轨迹的新基准测试，涵盖了结构化的 API 工作流程、事件管理以及开放式的网页/文件任务。每条轨迹都标有一个关键故障步骤以及一个从扎根理论推导出的跨领域故障分类中的类别。为了减轻故障归因的人力成本，我们提出了 AGENTRX，一个自动的、领域无关的诊断框架，用于精确定位失败代理轨迹中的关键故障步骤。它综合约束条件，逐步骤地评估它们，并生成一个可追溯的验证日志，其中包含约束违规行为以及相关证据；一个基于大型语言模型的评判器利用该日志来定位关键步骤和类别。我们的框架在三个领域中改进了现有基线方法的步骤定位和故障归因能力。

TLDR: The paper introduces AgentRx, a framework for diagnosing failures in AI agent execution trajectories using constraint synthesis and LLM-based judgment, along with a novel benchmark dataset of annotated failed agent runs.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了AgentRx，一个用于诊断AI Agent执行轨迹中错误的框架，它通过约束综合和基于LLM的判断来实现，并提供了一个包含标注失败Agent运行轨迹的新基准数据集。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Shraddha Barke, Arnav Goyal, Alind Khare, Avaljot Singh, Suman Nath, Chetan Bansal

Active Causal Experimentalist (ACE): Learning Intervention Strategies via Direct Preference Optimization

Abstract (English): Discovering causal relationships requires controlled experiments, but experimentalists face a sequential decision problem: each intervention reveals information that should inform what to try next. Traditional approaches such as random sampling, greedy information maximization, and round-robin coverage treat each decision in isolation, unable to learn adaptive strategies from experience. We propose Active Causal Experimentalist (ACE), which learns experimental design as a sequential policy. Our key insight is that while absolute information gains diminish as knowledge accumulates (making value-based RL unstable), relative comparisons between candidate interventions remain meaningful throughout. ACE exploits this via Direct Preference Optimization, learning from pairwise intervention comparisons rather than non-stationary reward magnitudes. Across synthetic benchmarks, physics simulations, and economic data, ACE achieves 70-71% improvement over baselines at equal intervention budgets (p < 0.001, Cohen's d ~ 2). Notably, the learned policy autonomously discovers that collider mechanisms require concentrated interventions on parent variables, a theoretically-grounded strategy that emerges purely from experience. This suggests preference-based learning can recover principled experimental strategies, complementing theory with learned domain adaptation.

摘要（中文）: 发现因果关系需要受控实验，但实验人员面临一个序贯决策问题：每一次干预都会揭示信息，这些信息应该用于指导下一步尝试什么。传统的诸如随机抽样、贪婪信息最大化和轮流覆盖等方法将每个决策孤立对待，无法从经验中学习自适应策略。我们提出了主动因果实验家（ACE），它将实验设计作为一种序贯策略来学习。我们的关键洞见是，虽然绝对的信息增益会随着知识的积累而减少（使得基于价值的强化学习不稳定），但候选干预之间的相对比较始终是有意义的。ACE通过直接偏好优化来利用这一点，从成对的干预比较中学习，而不是从非平稳的奖励幅度中学习。在合成基准、物理模拟和经济数据中，ACE在相同的干预预算下，相比基线实现了70-71%的提升（p < 0.001，Cohen's d ~ 2）。值得注意的是，学习到的策略自主地发现，对撞机制需要对父变量进行集中的干预，这是一种理论上有依据的策略，完全是从经验中产生的。这表明，基于偏好的学习可以恢复有原则的实验策略，用学习到的领域自适应来补充理论。

TLDR: The paper introduces Active Causal Experimentalist (ACE), a method for learning experimental design policies using Direct Preference Optimization to discover causal relationships more efficiently than traditional methods. It demonstrates significant improvements across various benchmarks and recovers theoretically-grounded intervention strategies.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了主动因果实验者（ACE），这是一种利用直接偏好优化学习实验设计策略的方法，比传统方法更有效地发现因果关系。它在各种基准测试中表现出显著的改进，并恢复了具有理论依据的干预策略。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Patrick Cooper, Alvaro Velasquez

Referring Industrial Anomaly Segmentation

Abstract (English): Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) is vital for manufacturing, yet traditional methods face significant challenges: unsupervised approaches yield rough localizations requiring manual thresholds, while supervised methods overfit due to scarce, imbalanced data. Both suffer from the "One Anomaly Class, One Model" limitation. To address this, we propose Referring Industrial Anomaly Segmentation (RIAS), a paradigm leveraging language to guide detection. RIAS generates precise masks from text descriptions without manual thresholds and uses universal prompts to detect diverse anomalies with a single model. We introduce the MVTec-Ref dataset to support this, designed with diverse referring expressions and focusing on anomaly patterns, notably with 95% small anomalies. We also propose the Dual Query Token with Mask Group Transformer (DQFormer) benchmark, enhanced by Language-Gated Multi-Level Aggregation (LMA) to improve multi-scale segmentation. Unlike traditional methods using redundant queries, DQFormer employs only "Anomaly" and "Background" tokens for efficient visual-textual integration. Experiments demonstrate RIAS's effectiveness in advancing IAD toward open-set capabilities. Code: https://github.com/swagger-coder/RIAS-MVTec-Ref.

摘要（中文）: 工业异常检测 (IAD) 对于制造业至关重要，然而传统方法面临诸多挑战：无监督方法产生粗糙的定位结果，需要人工设定阈值；监督方法因稀缺且不平衡的数据而容易过拟合。两者都受到“一个异常类别，一个模型”的限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于语言引导检测的范式：参考式工业异常分割 (RIAS)。 RIAS 从文本描述中生成精确的掩码，无需手动设定阈值，并使用通用提示词，用单一模型检测各种异常。为了支持该方法，我们引入了 MVTec-Ref 数据集，该数据集设计了多样化的参考表达式，并侧重于异常模式，特别是具有 95% 的小异常。我们还提出了 Dual Query Token with Mask Group Transformer (DQFormer) 基准，并通过语言门控多级聚合 (LMA) 进行了增强，以改善多尺度分割。与使用冗余查询的传统方法不同，DQFormer 仅使用“异常”和“背景”令牌来进行高效的视觉-文本集成。实验结果表明 RIAS 在推动 IAD 向开放集能力发展方面的有效性。代码：https://github.com/swagger-coder/RIAS-MVTec-Ref.

TLDR: The paper introduces Referring Industrial Anomaly Segmentation (RIAS), a language-guided approach for precise anomaly detection using text descriptions, addressing limitations of traditional IAD methods. They also introduce a new dataset and benchmark model.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了参考工业异常分割 (RIAS)，一种利用语言引导的异常检测方法，通过文本描述实现精确异常检测，解决了传统 IAD 方法的局限性。他们还介绍了一个新的数据集和基准模型。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Pengfei Yue, Xiaokang Jiang, Yilin Lu, Jianghang Lin, Shengchuan Zhang, Liujuan Cao

MM-SCALE: Grounded Multimodal Moral Reasoning via Scalar Judgment and Listwise Alignment

Abstract (English): Vision-Language Models (VLMs) continue to struggle to make morally salient judgments in multimodal and socially ambiguous contexts. Prior works typically rely on binary or pairwise supervision, which often fail to capture the continuous and pluralistic nature of human moral reasoning. We present MM-SCALE (Multimodal Moral Scale), a large-scale dataset for aligning VLMs with human moral preferences through 5-point scalar ratings and explicit modality grounding. Each image-scenario pair is annotated with moral acceptability scores and grounded reasoning labels by humans using an interface we tailored for data collection, enabling listwise preference optimization over ranked scenario sets. By moving from discrete to scalar supervision, our framework provides richer alignment signals and finer calibration of multimodal moral reasoning. Experiments show that VLMs fine-tuned on MM-SCALE achieve higher ranking fidelity and more stable safety calibration than those trained with binary signals.

摘要（中文）: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在多模态和具有社会歧义的语境中做出具有道德意义的判断时，仍然面临挑战。先前的研究通常依赖于二元或成对监督，这往往无法捕捉人类道德推理的连续性和多元性本质。我们提出了 MM-SCALE (多模态道德尺度)，这是一个大规模数据集，旨在通过 5 点标量评分和显式模态对齐，使 VLMs 与人类道德偏好相一致。 每个人类标注师通过我们专门定制的数据收集界面，对图像-场景对进行数据标注，标注内容包括道德可接受性评分和基于情境的推理标签，从而能够在排序的场景集合上进行列表式偏好优化。 通过从离散监督转向标量监督，我们的框架提供了更丰富的对齐信号和对多模态道德推理的更精细校准。 实验表明，在 MM-SCALE 上微调的 VLMs 比那些使用二元信号训练的模型获得了更高的排序保真度和更稳定的安全校准。

TLDR: The paper introduces MM-SCALE, a large-scale dataset with scalar moral ratings for vision-language models, showing improved moral reasoning and safety calibration compared to binary supervision.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 MM-SCALE，一个具有标量道德评级的大规模数据集，用于训练视觉语言模型，结果表明，与二元监督相比，该模型在道德推理和安全校准方面有所改进。

Authors: Eunkyu Park, Wesley Hanwen Deng, Cheyon Jin, Matheus Kunzler Maldaner, Jordan Wheeler, Jason I. Hong, Hong Shen, Adam Perer, Ken Holstein, Motahhare Eslami, Gunhee Kim

TIPS Over Tricks: Simple Prompts for Effective Zero-shot Anomaly Detection

Abstract (English): Anomaly detection identifies departures from expected behavior in safety-critical settings. When target-domain normal data are unavailable, zero-shot anomaly detection (ZSAD) leverages vision-language models (VLMs). However, CLIP's coarse image-text alignment limits both localization and detection due to (i) spatial misalignment and (ii) weak sensitivity to fine-grained anomalies; prior work compensates with complex auxiliary modules yet largely overlooks the choice of backbone. We revisit the backbone and use TIPS-a VLM trained with spatially aware objectives. While TIPS alleviates CLIP's issues, it exposes a distributional gap between global and local features. We address this with decoupled prompts-fixed for image-level detection and learnable for pixel-level localization-and by injecting local evidence into the global score. Without CLIP-specific tricks, our TIPS-based pipeline improves image-level performance by 1.1-3.9% and pixel-level by 1.5-6.9% across seven industrial datasets, delivering strong generalization with a lean architecture. Code is available at github.com/AlirezaSalehy/Tipsomaly.

摘要（中文）: 异常检测旨在识别安全关键环境中偏离预期行为的异常情况。当目标域正常数据不可用时，零样本异常检测（ZSAD）利用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）。然而，CLIP的粗略图像-文本对齐限制了定位和检测，原因在于(i) 空间错位和 (ii) 对细粒度异常的敏感性弱；以往工作通过复杂的辅助模块进行补偿，但很大程度上忽略了骨干网络的选择。我们重新审视了骨干网络，并使用TIPS——一种采用空间感知目标训练的VLM。虽然TIPS缓解了CLIP的问题，但它暴露了全局和局部特征之间的分布差距。我们通过解耦提示来解决这个问题——图像级别检测使用固定提示，像素级别定位使用可学习提示——并通过将局部证据注入到全局分数中。在没有CLIP特定技巧的情况下，我们基于TIPS的流水线在七个工业数据集上将图像级别性能提升了1.1-3.9%，像素级别性能提升了1.5-6.9%，以精简的架构实现了强大的泛化能力。代码可在github.com/AlirezaSalehy/Tipsomaly获取。

TLDR: This paper addresses zero-shot anomaly detection by leveraging a spatially-aware VLM (TIPS) and decoupled prompts to improve image and pixel-level anomaly detection without CLIP-specific tricks, showing enhanced performance on industrial datasets.

简要说明: 该论文通过利用空间感知VLM（TIPS）和解耦提示来解决零样本异常检测问题，从而改进图像和像素级别的异常检测，无需CLIP特定的技巧，并在工业数据集上表现出增强的性能。

Novelty: (7/10)
