Authors: Alireza Salehi, Ehsan Karami, Sepehr Noey, Sahand Noey, Makoto Yamada, Reshad Hosseini, Mohammad Sabokrou

ConsistentRFT: Reducing Visual Hallucinations in Flow-based Reinforcement Fine-Tuning

Abstract (English): Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) on flow-based models is crucial for preference alignment. However, they often introduce visual hallucinations like over-optimized details and semantic misalignment. This work preliminarily explores why visual hallucinations arise and how to reduce them. We first investigate RFT methods from a unified perspective, and reveal the core problems stemming from two aspects, exploration and exploitation: (1) limited exploration during stochastic differential equation (SDE) rollouts, leading to an over-emphasis on local details at the expense of global semantics, and (2) trajectory imitation process inherent in policy gradient methods, distorting the model's foundational vector field and its cross-step consistency. Building on this, we propose ConsistentRFT, a general framework to mitigate these hallucinations. Specifically, we design a Dynamic Granularity Rollout (DGR) mechanism to balance exploration between global semantics and local details by dynamically scheduling different noise sources. We then introduce a Consistent Policy Gradient Optimization (CPGO) that preserves the model's consistency by aligning the current policy with a more stable prior. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ConsistentRFT significantly mitigates visual hallucinations, achieving average reductions of 49\% for low-level and 38\% for high-level perceptual hallucinations. Furthermore, ConsistentRFT outperforms other RFT methods on out-of-domain metrics, showing an improvement of 5.1\% (v.s. the baseline's decrease of -0.4\%) over FLUX1.dev. This is \href{https://xiaofeng-tan.github.io/projects/ConsistentRFT}{Project Page}.

摘要（中文）: 基于流模型的强化微调（RFT）对于偏好对齐至关重要。然而，它常常引入视觉幻觉，例如过度优化的细节和语义失调。 本文初步探讨了视觉幻觉产生的原因以及如何减少它们。我们首先从统一的视角研究RFT方法，并揭示了源于探索和利用两个方面的核心问题：（1）随机微分方程（SDE）展开过程中的探索有限，导致过度强调局部细节而牺牲了全局语义； 以及（2）策略梯度方法固有的轨迹模仿过程，扭曲了模型的基础向量场及其跨步一致性。在此基础上，我们提出了ConsistentRFT，一个通用的框架来减轻这些幻觉。具体来说，我们设计了一个动态粒度展开（DGR）机制，通过动态调度不同的噪声源，来平衡全局语义和局部细节之间的探索。然后，我们引入了一致性策略梯度优化（CPGO），通过将当前策略与更稳定的先验对齐，来保持模型的一致性。 广泛的实验表明，ConsistentRFT 显著地减轻了视觉幻觉，在低级和高级感知幻觉方面分别实现了平均49%和38%的减少。此外，ConsistentRFT 在域外指标上优于其他 RFT 方法，与 FLUX1.dev 相比，显示出 5.1% 的提升（基线下降了 -0.4%）。项目主页：\href{https://xiaofeng-tan.github.io/projects/ConsistentRFT}{Project Page}。

TLDR: The paper introduces ConsistentRFT, a novel Reinforcement Fine-Tuning framework, which mitigates visual hallucinations in flow-based models by dynamically balancing exploration and aligning policy optimization, leading to significant reductions in both low-level and high-level perceptual hallucinations.

简要说明: 该论文提出了ConsistentRFT，一种新型的强化微调框架，通过动态平衡探索和对齐策略优化来缓解基于流模型的视觉幻觉，从而显著减少低级和高级感知幻觉。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Xiaofeng Tan, Jun Liu, Yuanting Fan, Bin-Bin Gao, Xi Jiang, Xiaochen Chen, Jinlong Peng, Chengjie Wang, Hongsong Wang, Feng Zheng

FSOD-VFM: Few-Shot Object Detection with Vision Foundation Models and Graph Diffusion

Abstract (English): In this paper, we present FSOD-VFM: Few-Shot Object Detectors with Vision Foundation Models, a framework that leverages vision foundation models to tackle the challenge of few-shot object detection. FSOD-VFM integrates three key components: a universal proposal network (UPN) for category-agnostic bounding box generation, SAM2 for accurate mask extraction, and DINOv2 features for efficient adaptation to new object categories. Despite the strong generalization capabilities of foundation models, the bounding boxes generated by UPN often suffer from overfragmentation, covering only partial object regions and leading to numerous small, false-positive proposals rather than accurate, complete object detections. To address this issue, we introduce a novel graph-based confidence reweighting method. In our approach, predicted bounding boxes are modeled as nodes in a directed graph, with graph diffusion operations applied to propagate confidence scores across the network. This reweighting process refines the scores of proposals, assigning higher confidence to whole objects and lower confidence to local, fragmented parts. This strategy improves detection granularity and effectively reduces the occurrence of false-positive bounding box proposals. Through extensive experiments on Pascal-5$^i$, COCO-20$^i$, and CD-FSOD datasets, we demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing approaches, achieving superior performance without requiring additional training. Notably, on the challenging CD-FSOD dataset, which spans multiple datasets and domains, our FSOD-VFM achieves 31.6 AP in the 10-shot setting, substantially outperforming previous training-free methods that reach only 21.4 AP. Code is available at: https://intellindust-ai-lab.github.io/projects/FSOD-VFM.

摘要（中文）: 本文提出FSOD-VFM：基于视觉基础模型的少样本目标检测器，一个利用视觉基础模型解决少样本目标检测挑战的框架。FSOD-VFM集成了三个关键组件：用于类别无关边界框生成的通用提议网络（UPN）、用于精确掩码提取的SAM2，以及用于高效适应新目标类别的DINOv2特征。尽管基础模型具有强大的泛化能力，但UPN生成的边界框常常出现过度分割现象，仅覆盖部分目标区域，从而导致大量小型、假阳性提议框，而非准确、完整的目标检测。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的基于图的置信度重加权方法。在我们的方法中，预测的边界框被建模为有向图中的节点，通过图扩散操作在网络中传播置信度分数。此重加权过程细化了提议框的分数，将更高的置信度分配给完整的目标，并将更低的置信度分配给局部、分割的部分。这种策略提高了检测粒度，并有效地减少了假阳性边界框提议的出现。通过在Pascal-5$^i$、COCO-20$^i$和CD-FSOD数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法显著优于现有方法，无需额外训练即可实现卓越的性能。值得注意的是，在跨越多个数据集和领域的具有挑战性的CD-FSOD数据集上，我们的FSOD-VFM在10-shot设置中达到了31.6 AP，远超之前仅达到21.4 AP的无训练方法。 代码可在以下网址获取：https://intellindust-ai-lab.github.io/projects/FSOD-VFM.

TLDR: This paper introduces FSOD-VFM, a few-shot object detection framework leveraging vision foundation models and graph diffusion to improve detection accuracy and reduce false positives, achieving state-of-the-art results on multiple datasets without additional training.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了FSOD-VFM，一个少样本目标检测框架，利用视觉基础模型和图扩散来提高检测精度并减少误报，在多个数据集上实现了最先进的结果，且无需额外训练。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Chen-Bin Feng, Youyang Sha, Longfei Liu, Yongjun Yu, Chi Man Vong, Xuanlong Yu, Xi Shen

Neural Predictor-Corrector: Solving Homotopy Problems with Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): The Homotopy paradigm, a general principle for solving challenging problems, appears across diverse domains such as robust optimization, global optimization, polynomial root-finding, and sampling. Practical solvers for these problems typically follow a predictor-corrector (PC) structure, but rely on hand-crafted heuristics for step sizes and iteration termination, which are often suboptimal and task-specific. To address this, we unify these problems under a single framework, which enables the design of a general neural solver. Building on this unified view, we propose Neural Predictor-Corrector (NPC), which replaces hand-crafted heuristics with automatically learned policies. NPC formulates policy selection as a sequential decision-making problem and leverages reinforcement learning to automatically discover efficient strategies. To further enhance generalization, we introduce an amortized training mechanism, enabling one-time offline training for a class of problems and efficient online inference on new instances. Experiments on four representative homotopy problems demonstrate that our method generalizes effectively to unseen instances. It consistently outperforms classical and specialized baselines in efficiency while demonstrating superior stability across tasks, highlighting the value of unifying homotopy methods into a single neural framework.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种神经预测校正(NPC)方法，它用自动学习的策略取代了手工设计的启发式方法。NPC将策略选择形式化为一个序列决策问题，并利用强化学习自动发现高效策略。为了进一步增强泛化能力，我们引入了一种摊销训练机制，可对一类问题进行一次性的离线训练，并对新的实例进行高效的在线推理。在四个具有代表性的同伦问题上的实验表明，我们的方法能够有效地泛化到未见过的实例。它在效率方面始终优于经典和专门的基线，同时在各种任务中表现出卓越的稳定性，突出了将同伦方法统一到一个单一的神经框架的价值。

TLDR: The paper introduces Neural Predictor-Corrector (NPC), a reinforcement learning-based method that automatically learns efficient strategies for solving Homotopy problems, outperforming hand-crafted heuristics and specialized baselines across multiple tasks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了神经预测-校正器（NPC），一种基于强化学习的方法，可以自动学习解决同伦问题的有效策略，在多个任务中优于手工设计的启发式方法和专门的基线。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Jiayao Mai, Bangyan Liao, Zhenjun Zhao, Yingping Zeng, Haoang Li, Javier Civera, Tailin Wu, Yi Zhou, Peidong Liu

SceneLinker: Compositional 3D Scene Generation via Semantic Scene Graph from RGB Sequences

Abstract (English): We introduce SceneLinker, a novel framework that generates compositional 3D scenes via semantic scene graph from RGB sequences. To adaptively experience Mixed Reality (MR) content based on each user's space, it is essential to generate a 3D scene that reflects the real-world layout by compactly capturing the semantic cues of the surroundings. Prior works struggled to fully capture the contextual relationship between objects or mainly focused on synthesizing diverse shapes, making it challenging to generate 3D scenes aligned with object arrangements. We address these challenges by designing a graph network with cross-check feature attention for scene graph prediction and constructing a graph-variational autoencoder (graph-VAE), which consists of a joint shape and layout block for 3D scene generation. Experiments on the 3RScan/3DSSG and SG-FRONT datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, even in complex indoor environments and under challenging scene graph constraints. Our work enables users to generate consistent 3D spaces from their physical environments via scene graphs, allowing them to create spatial MR content. Project page is https://scenelinker2026.github.io.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了SceneLinker，一种新颖的框架，它通过来自RGB序列的语义场景图生成组合式的3D场景。为了根据每个用户的空间自适应地体验混合现实（MR）内容，生成一个能通过紧凑地捕捉周围环境的语义线索来反映真实世界布局的3D场景至关重要。以往的研究难以完全捕捉对象之间的上下文关系，或主要侧重于合成多样化的形状，使得生成与对象排列对齐的3D场景具有挑战性。我们通过设计一个带有交叉验证特征注意力机制的图网络来进行场景图预测，以及构建一个图变分自编码器（graph-VAE）来应对这些挑战，该自编码器由用于3D场景生成的联合形状和布局模块组成。在3RScan/3DSSG和SG-FRONT数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性评估中都优于最先进的方法，即使在复杂的室内环境中和具有挑战性的场景图约束下也是如此。我们的工作使得用户能够通过场景图，从他们的物理环境中生成一致的3D空间，从而允许他们创建空间MR内容。项目主页是https://scenelinker2026.github.io。

TLDR: SceneLinker generates compositional 3D scenes from RGB sequences using a novel graph network and graph-VAE architecture, outperforming existing methods on standard datasets.

简要说明: SceneLinker 使用一种新型Graph网络和Graph-VAE架构，从RGB序列生成组合的3D场景，并在标准数据集上优于现有方法。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Seok-Young Kim, Dooyoung Kim, Woojin Cho, Hail Song, Suji Kang, Woontack Woo

The Role of Target Update Frequencies in Q-Learning

Abstract (English): The target network update frequency (TUF) is a central stabilization mechanism in (deep) Q-learning. However, their selection remains poorly understood and is often treated merely as another tunable hyperparameter rather than as a principled design decision. This work provides a theoretical analysis of target fixing in tabular Q-learning through the lens of approximate dynamic programming. We formulate periodic target updates as a nested optimization scheme in which each outer iteration applies an inexact Bellman optimality operator, approximated by a generic inner loop optimizer. Rigorous theory yields a finite-time convergence analysis for the asynchronous sampling setting, specializing to stochastic gradient descent in the inner loop. Our results deliver an explicit characterization of the bias-variance trade-off induced by the target update period, showing how to optimally set this critical hyperparameter. We prove that constant target update schedules are suboptimal, incurring a logarithmic overhead in sample complexity that is entirely avoidable with adaptive schedules. Our analysis shows that the optimal target update frequency increases geometrically over the course of the learning process.

摘要（中文）: 目标网络更新频率（TUF）是（深度）Q学习中的一个核心稳定机制。然而，对它的选择仍然缺乏深入理解，并且常常被简单地视为另一个可调超参数，而非一个基于原则的设计决策。本文通过近似动态规划的视角，对表格Q学习中的目标固定进行了理论分析。我们将周期性目标更新公式化为一个嵌套优化方案，其中每个外部迭代应用一个非精确Bellman最优算子，该算子由一个通用的内部循环优化器近似。严格的理论为异步采样环境下的有限时间收敛性分析提供了基础，并专门针对内部循环中的随机梯度下降进行了分析。我们的结果给出了由目标更新周期引起的偏差-方差权衡的显式刻画，并展示了如何最佳地设置这个关键的超参数。我们证明了固定目标更新策略并非最优，会导致样本复杂度的对数开销，而这种开销可以通过自适应策略完全避免。我们的分析表明，最佳目标更新频率在学习过程中以几何方式增长。

TLDR: This paper theoretically analyzes target network update frequencies in Q-learning, proving that constant updates are suboptimal and adaptive schedules are more efficient, providing an optimal update strategy.

简要说明: 本文从理论上分析了Q学习中目标网络更新频率，证明了恒定更新并非最优解，自适应调度更为高效，并提供了一种最优更新策略。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Simon Weissmann, Tilman Aach, Benedikt Wille, Sebastian Kassing, Leif Döring

Soft-Radial Projection for Constrained End-to-End Learning

Abstract (English): Integrating hard constraints into deep learning is essential for safety-critical systems. Yet existing constructive layers that project predictions onto constraint boundaries face a fundamental bottleneck: gradient saturation. By collapsing exterior points onto lower-dimensional surfaces, standard orthogonal projections induce rank-deficient Jacobians, which nullify gradients orthogonal to active constraints and hinder optimization. We introduce Soft-Radial Projection, a differentiable reparameterization layer that circumvents this issue through a radial mapping from Euclidean space into the interior of the feasible set. This construction guarantees strict feasibility while preserving a full-rank Jacobian almost everywhere, thereby preventing the optimization stalls typical of boundary-based methods. We theoretically prove that the architecture retains the universal approximation property and empirically show improved convergence behavior and solution quality over state-of-the-art optimization- and projection-based baselines.

摘要（中文）: 将硬约束集成到深度学习中对于安全攸关系统至关重要。然而，现有的将预测投影到约束边界上的构造层面临着一个根本性的瓶颈：梯度饱和。通过将外部点坍缩到低维表面上，标准正交投影会诱导秩亏的雅可比矩阵，从而消除与活动约束正交的梯度，并阻碍优化。我们引入了软径向投影，这是一种可微分的重参数化层，它通过从欧几里得空间到可行集内部的径向映射来规避这个问题。这种构造保证了严格的可行性，同时几乎在所有地方都保留了满秩的雅可比矩阵，从而避免了基于边界的方法中常见的优化停滞。我们从理论上证明了该架构保留了通用逼近性质，并通过实验证明了相比于最先进的基于优化和基于投影的基线方法，它具有改进的收敛行为和解决方案质量。

TLDR: The paper introduces Soft-Radial Projection, a novel differentiable layer for incorporating hard constraints into deep learning models, addressing the gradient saturation issue of existing projection methods by maintaining a full-rank Jacobian. It demonstrates improved convergence and solution quality.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种新型可微层——Soft-Radial Projection，用于将硬约束集成到深度学习模型中。它通过维持满秩雅可比矩阵来解决现有投影方法的梯度饱和问题，并展示了改进的收敛性和solution质量。

Authors: Philipp J. Schneider, Daniel Kuhn

medR: Reward Engineering for Clinical Offline Reinforcement Learning via Tri-Drive Potential Functions

Abstract (English): Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a powerful framework for optimizing dynamic treatment regimes (DTRs). However, clinical RL is fundamentally bottlenecked by reward engineering: the challenge of defining signals that safely and effectively guide policy learning in complex, sparse offline environments. Existing approaches often rely on manual heuristics that fail to generalize across diverse pathologies. To address this, we propose an automated pipeline leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) for offline reward design and verification. We formulate the reward function using potential functions consisted of three core components: survival, confidence, and competence. We further introduce quantitative metrics to rigorously evaluate and select the optimal reward structure prior to deployment. By integrating LLM-driven domain knowledge, our framework automates the design of reward functions for specific diseases while significantly enhancing the performance of the resulting policies.

摘要（中文）: 强化学习（RL）为优化动态治疗方案（DTRs）提供了一个强大的框架。然而，临床RL从根本上受限于奖励工程：即在复杂的、稀疏的离线环境中，定义能够安全有效地指导策略学习的信号所面临的挑战。现有方法通常依赖于手动启发式方法，这些方法无法在不同的病理学中推广。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种自动化流水线，利用大型语言模型（LLMs）进行离线奖励设计和验证。我们使用由三个核心组件：生存、置信度和能力组成的势函数来构建奖励函数。我们进一步引入了定量指标，以在部署之前严格评估和选择最佳奖励结构。通过整合LLM驱动的领域知识，我们的框架可以自动设计针对特定疾病的奖励函数，同时显著提高最终策略的性能。

TLDR: The paper introduces medR, an automated pipeline leveraging LLMs for reward engineering in clinical offline reinforcement learning by using potential functions consisting of survival, confidence, and competence to improve policy performance and generalizability.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了medR，一个利用大型语言模型（LLM）进行临床离线强化学习中奖励工程的自动化流程，通过包含生存、信心和能力的潜在函数来提高策略的性能和泛化能力。

Authors: Qianyi Xu, Gousia Habib, Feng Wu, Yanrui Du, Zhihui Chen, Swapnil Mishra, Dilruk Perera, Mengling Feng

StepScorer: Accelerating Reinforcement Learning with Step-wise Scoring and Psychological Regret Modeling

Abstract (English): Reinforcement learning algorithms often suffer from slow convergence due to sparse reward signals, particularly in complex environments where feedback is delayed or infrequent. This paper introduces the Psychological Regret Model (PRM), a novel approach that accelerates learning by incorporating regret-based feedback signals after each decision step. Rather than waiting for terminal rewards, PRM computes a regret signal based on the difference between the expected value of the optimal action and the value of the action taken in each state. This transforms sparse rewards into dense feedback signals through a step-wise scoring framework, enabling faster convergence. We demonstrate that PRM achieves stable performance approximately 36\% faster than traditional Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in benchmark environments such as Lunar Lander. Our results indicate that PRM is particularly effective in continuous control tasks and environments with delayed feedback, making it suitable for real-world applications such as robotics, finance, and adaptive education where rapid policy adaptation is critical. The approach formalizes human-inspired counterfactual thinking as a computable regret signal, bridging behavioral economics and reinforcement learning.

摘要（中文）: 强化学习算法常常因为稀疏的奖励信号而导致收敛缓慢，尤其是在反馈延迟或不频繁的复杂环境中。本文介绍了一种名为心理后悔模型（PRM）的新方法，它通过在每个决策步骤后纳入基于后悔的反馈信号来加速学习。PRM 不等待最终奖励，而是基于每个状态下最优动作的期望值与所采取动作的价值之间的差异来计算后悔信号。这通过逐步评分框架将稀疏奖励转化为密集的反馈信号，从而实现更快的收敛。我们证明了 PRM 在诸如 Lunar Lander 等基准测试环境中，比传统的近端策略优化（PPO）算法快约 36\% 达到稳定性能。我们的结果表明，PRM 在连续控制任务和具有延迟反馈的环境中尤其有效，使其适用于机器人、金融和自适应教育等实际应用，在这些应用中，快速策略适应至关重要。该方法将受人类启发式的反事实思维形式化为可计算的后悔信号，从而连接了行为经济学和强化学习。

TLDR: The paper introduces a Psychological Regret Model (PRM) to accelerate reinforcement learning by using step-wise regret-based feedback, achieving faster convergence than PPO in benchmark environments.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种心理后悔模型 (PRM)，通过使用步进式基于后悔的反馈来加速强化学习，在基准环境中实现了比 PPO 更快的收敛速度。

Authors: Zhe Xu

SATORIS-N: Spectral Analysis based Traffic Observation Recovery via Informed Subspaces and Nuclear-norm minimization

Abstract (English): Traffic-density matrices from different days exhibit both low rank and stable correlations in their singular-vector subspaces. Leveraging this, we introduce SATORIS-N, a framework for imputing partially observed traffic-density by informed subspace priors from neighboring days. Our contribution is a subspace-aware semidefinite programming (SDP)} formulation of nuclear norm that explicitly informs the reconstruction with prior singular-subspace information. This convex formulation jointly enforces low rank and subspace alignment, providing a single global optimum and substantially improving accuracy under medium and high occlusion. We also study a lightweight implicit subspace-alignment} strategy in which matrices from consecutive days are concatenated to encourage alignment of spatial or temporal singular directions. Although this heuristic offers modest gains when missing rates are low, the explicit SDP approach is markedly more robust when large fractions of entries are missing. Across two real-world datasets (Beijing and Shanghai), SATORIS-N consistently outperforms standard matrix-completion methods such as SoftImpute, IterativeSVD, statistical, and even deep learning baselines at high occlusion levels. The framework generalizes to other spatiotemporal settings in which singular subspaces evolve slowly over time. In the context of intelligent vehicles and vehicle-to-everything (V2X) systems, accurate traffic-density reconstruction enables critical applications including cooperative perception, predictive routing, and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) communication optimization. When infrastructure sensors or vehicle-reported observations are incomplete - due to communication dropouts, sensor occlusions, or sparse connected vehicle penetration-reliable imputation becomes essential for safe and efficient autonomous navigation.

摘要（中文）: 来自不同日期的交通密度矩阵在其奇异向量子空间中表现出低秩性和稳定的相关性。 基于此，我们提出了SATORIS-N，一个通过来自邻近日期的知情子空间先验来推算部分观测到的交通密度的框架。 我们的贡献在于核范数的子空间感知半定规划（SDP）公式，该公式利用先前的奇异子空间信息显式地指导重建。 这种凸公式联合强制低秩性和子空间对齐，提供单一的全局最优解，并在中高遮挡下显著提高准确性。 我们还研究了一种轻量级的隐式子空间对齐策略，其中将连续日期的矩阵连接起来，以鼓励空间或时间奇异方向的对齐。 虽然这种启发式方法在缺失率较低时提供了适度的增益，但当大部分条目缺失时，显式SDP方法明显更稳健。 在两个真实世界数据集（北京和上海）上，在高遮挡水平下，SATORIS-N始终优于标准矩阵补全方法，如SoftImpute、IterativeSVD、统计基线甚至深度学习基线。 该框架可推广到奇异子空间随时间缓慢演变的其他时空场景。 在智能车辆和车对一切（V2X）系统的背景下，准确的交通密度重建能够实现关键应用，包括协同感知、预测性路径选择和车对基础设施（V2I）通信优化。 当基础设施传感器或车辆报告的观测数据不完整时（由于通信丢包、传感器遮挡或稀疏的联网车辆渗透率），可靠的推算是安全高效的自主导航的关键。

TLDR: The paper introduces SATORIS-N, a novel framework leveraging subspace priors and nuclear-norm minimization for accurate traffic density imputation, demonstrating superior performance over existing methods, especially under high occlusion conditions. This is relevant for intelligent vehicles and V2X systems.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 SATORIS-N，一种新颖的框架，利用子空间先验和核范数最小化来实现准确的交通密度估算，在现有方法中表现出卓越的性能，尤其是在高遮挡条件下。 这与智能车辆和 V2X 系统相关。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Sampad Mohanty, Bhaskar Krishnamachari

Clarify Before You Draw: Proactive Agents for Robust Text-to-CAD Generation

Abstract (English): Large language models have recently enabled text-to-CAD systems that synthesize parametric CAD programs (e.g., CadQuery) from natural language prompts. In practice, however, geometric descriptions can be under-specified or internally inconsistent: critical dimensions may be missing and constraints may conflict. Existing fine-tuned models tend to reactively follow user instructions and hallucinate dimensions when the text is ambiguous. To address this, we propose a proactive agentic framework for text-to-CadQuery generation, named ProCAD, that resolves specification issues before code synthesis. Our framework pairs a proactive clarifying agent, which audits the prompt and asks targeted clarification questions only when necessary to produce a self-consistent specification, with a CAD coding agent that translates the specification into an executable CadQuery program. We fine-tune the coding agent on a curated high-quality text-to-CadQuery dataset and train the clarifying agent via agentic SFT on clarification trajectories. Experiments show that proactive clarification significantly improves robustness to ambiguous prompts while keeping interaction overhead low. ProCAD outperforms frontier closed-source models, including Claude Sonnet 4.5, reducing the mean Chamfer distance by 79.9 percent and lowering the invalidity ratio from 4.8 percent to 0.9 percent. Our code and datasets will be made publicly available.

摘要（中文）: 近年来，大型语言模型使得文本到CAD系统成为可能，该系统能够从自然语言提示中合成参数化CAD程序（例如，CadQuery）。然而，在实践中，几何描述可能欠规范或内部不一致：关键尺寸可能缺失，约束可能冲突。现有的微调模型往往被动地遵循用户指令，并在文本模糊时虚构尺寸。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于文本到CadQuery生成的主动式Agent框架，名为ProCAD，它在代码合成之前解决规范问题。我们的框架将一个主动澄清Agent与一个CAD编码Agent配对，前者审核提示，并仅在必要时提出有针对性的澄清问题，以生成一个自洽的规范，后者将规范翻译成可执行的CadQuery程序。我们利用精心策划的高质量文本到CadQuery数据集对编码Agent进行微调，并通过在澄清轨迹上进行Agent式SFT来训练澄清Agent。实验表明，主动澄清能显著提高对模糊提示的鲁棒性，同时保持较低的交互开销。ProCAD优于前沿的闭源模型，包括Claude Sonnet 4.5，将平均倒角距离降低了79.9%，并将无效率从4.8%降低到0.9%。我们的代码和数据集将公开发布。

TLDR: This paper introduces ProCAD, a proactive agentic framework that uses a clarifying agent to resolve specification issues in text-to-CAD generation before code synthesis, improving robustness and accuracy.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为ProCAD的主动代理框架，该框架采用澄清代理在代码合成之前解决文本到 CAD 生成中的规范问题，从而提高鲁棒性和准确性。

Authors: Bo Yuan, Zelin Zhao, Petr Molodyk, Bin Hu, Yongxin Chen

Co2PO: Coordinated Constrained Policy Optimization for Multi-Agent RL

Abstract (English): Constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) faces a fundamental tension between exploration and safety-constrained optimization. Existing leading approaches, such as Lagrangian methods, typically rely on global penalties or centralized critics that react to violations after they occur, often suppressing exploration and leading to over-conservatism. We propose Co2PO, a novel MARL communication-augmented framework that enables coordination-driven safety through selective, risk-aware communication. Co2PO introduces a shared blackboard architecture for broadcasting positional intent and yield signals, governed by a learned hazard predictor that proactively forecasts potential violations over an extended temporal horizon. By integrating these forecasts into a constrained optimization objective, Co2PO allows agents to anticipate and navigate collective hazards without the performance trade-offs inherent in traditional reactive constraints. We evaluate Co2PO across a suite of complex multi-agent safety benchmarks, where it achieves higher returns compared to leading constrained baselines while converging to cost-compliant policies at deployment. Ablation studies further validate the necessity of risk-triggered communication, adaptive gating, and shared memory components.

摘要（中文）: 受约束的多智能体强化学习(MARL)面临着探索与安全约束优化之间的根本矛盾。现有的领先方法，如拉格朗日方法，通常依赖于全局惩罚或集中式评论家，在违规行为发生后做出反应，这常常会抑制探索并导致过度保守。我们提出Co2PO，一种新颖的MARL通信增强框架，通过选择性的、风险感知的通信来实现协调驱动的安全性。Co2PO引入了一种共享黑板架构，用于广播位置意图和收益信号，由一个学习到的危险预测器控制，该预测器可在较长的时间范围内主动预测潜在的违规行为。通过将这些预测整合到受约束的优化目标中，Co2PO允许智能体在不影响传统反应式约束固有性能的情况下，预见并规避集体危险。我们在一系列复杂的多智能体安全基准测试中评估了Co2PO，结果表明，与领先的受约束基线相比，它获得了更高的回报，并在部署时收敛到成本合规的策略。消融研究进一步验证了风险触发通信、自适应门控和共享记忆组件的必要性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Co2PO, a communication-augmented MARL framework that uses proactive risk prediction and selective communication to improve safety and performance in constrained multi-agent environments, outperforming traditional reactive constraint methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Co2PO，一个通信增强的MARL框架，通过主动风险预测和选择性通信来提高约束多智能体环境中的安全性和性能，优于传统的被动约束方法。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Overall: (7/10)

Authors: Shrenik Patel, Christine Truong

Human-Centric Traffic Signal Control for Equity: A Multi-Agent Action Branching Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach

Abstract (English): Coordinating traffic signals along multimodal corridors is challenging because many multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approaches remain vehicle-centric and struggle with high-dimensional discrete action spaces. We propose MA2B-DDQN, a human-centric multi-agent action-branching double Deep Q-Network (DQN) framework that explicitly optimizes traveler-level equity. Our key contribution is an action-branching discrete control formulation that decomposes corridor control into (i) local, per-intersection actions that allocate green time between the next two phases and (ii) a single global action that selects the total duration of those phases. This decomposition enables scalable coordination under discrete control while reducing the effective complexity of joint decision-making. We also design a human-centric reward that penalizes the number of delayed individuals in the corridor, accounting for pedestrians, vehicle occupants, and transit passengers. Extensive evaluations across seven realistic traffic scenarios in Melbourne, Australia, demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces the number of impacted travelers, outperforming existing DRL and baseline methods. Experiments confirm the robustness of our model, showing minimal variance across diverse settings. This framework not only advocates for a fairer traffic signal system but also provides a scalable solution adaptable to varied urban traffic conditions.

摘要（中文）: 协调多模式交通走廊的交通信号灯极具挑战，因为许多多智能体深度强化学习（DRL）方法仍然是以车辆为中心，并且难以应对高维离散动作空间。我们提出MA2B-DDQN，一种以人为中心的多智能体动作分支双层深度Q网络（DQN）框架，该框架明确优化出行者层面的公平性。我们的主要贡献是一种动作分支离散控制公式，该公式将走廊控制分解为（i）局部的、每个交叉口的动作，用于分配接下来两个相位的绿灯时间，以及（ii）单个全局动作，用于选择这些相位的总持续时间。这种分解实现了离散控制下的可扩展协调，同时降低了联合决策的有效复杂度。我们还设计了一种以人为中心的回报函数，该函数惩罚走廊上延误个体的数量，包括行人、车辆乘客和公交乘客。在澳大利亚墨尔本的七种真实交通场景中进行的大量评估表明，我们的方法显著减少了受影响的出行者数量，优于现有的DRL方法和基线方法。实验证实了我们模型的鲁棒性，显示了不同设置下的最小方差。该框架不仅提倡更公平的交通信号灯系统，还提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，能够适应各种城市交通状况。

TLDR: The paper introduces a human-centric multi-agent action-branching DRL framework (MA2B-DDQN) for traffic signal control to optimize equity, demonstrating improved performance in reducing the number of impacted travelers compared to existing approaches.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种以人为本的多智能体动作分支DRL框架(MA2B-DDQN)用于交通信号控制，以优化公平性，并通过实验证明与现有方法相比，在减少受影响旅客数量方面表现更优。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Xiaocai Zhang, Neema Nassir, Lok Sang Chan, Milad Haghani

How Does the Lagrangian Guide Safe Reinforcement Learning through Diffusion Models?

Abstract (English): Diffusion policy sampling enables reinforcement learning (RL) to represent multimodal action distributions beyond suboptimal unimodal Gaussian policies. However, existing diffusion-based RL methods primarily focus on offline settings for reward maximization, with limited consideration of safety in online settings. To address this gap, we propose Augmented Lagrangian-Guided Diffusion (ALGD), a novel algorithm for off-policy safe RL. By revisiting optimization theory and energy-based model, we show that the instability of primal-dual methods arises from the non-convex Lagrangian landscape. In diffusion-based safe RL, the Lagrangian can be interpreted as an energy function guiding the denoising dynamics. Counterintuitively, direct usage destabilizes both policy generation and training. ALGD resolves this issue by introducing an augmented Lagrangian that locally convexifies the energy landscape, yielding a stabilized policy generation and training process without altering the distribution of the optimal policy. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments demonstrate that ALGD is both theoretically grounded and empirically effective, achieving strong and stable performance across diverse environments.

摘要（中文）: 扩散策略采样使强化学习（RL）能够表示超出次优单峰高斯策略的多模态动作分布。然而，现有的基于扩散的RL方法主要关注离线环境下的奖励最大化，对在线环境中的安全性考虑有限。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种名为增强拉格朗日引导扩散（ALGD）的新算法，用于离策略安全RL。通过重新审视最优化理论和基于能量的模型，我们表明原始-对偶方法的不稳定性源于非凸拉格朗日地形。在基于扩散的安全RL中，拉格朗日可以被解释为引导去噪过程的能量函数。反直觉的是，直接使用会破坏策略生成和训练的稳定性。ALGD通过引入局部凸化能量地形的增强拉格朗日来解决这个问题，从而在不改变最优策略分布的情况下，实现稳定的策略生成和训练过程。理论分析和大量实验表明，ALGD具有理论基础和经验有效性，在各种环境中实现了强大而稳定的性能。

TLDR: This paper introduces Augmented Lagrangian-Guided Diffusion (ALGD), a novel off-policy safe RL algorithm that stabilizes policy generation and training by convexifying the Lagrangian energy landscape within a diffusion framework.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种新的名为Augmented Lagrangian-Guided Diffusion (ALGD) 的 off-policy 安全强化学习算法，通过凸化扩散框架内的拉格朗日能量景观来稳定策略生成和训练。

Authors: Xiaoyuan Cheng, Wenxuan Yuan, Boyang Li, Yuanchao Xu, Yiming Yang, Hao Liang, Bei Peng, Robert Loftin, Zhuo Sun, Yukun Hu

Trust Region Continual Learning as an Implicit Meta-Learner

Abstract (English): Continual learning aims to acquire tasks sequentially without catastrophic forgetting, yet standard strategies face a core tradeoff: regularization-based methods (e.g., EWC) can overconstrain updates when task optima are weakly overlapping, while replay-based methods can retain performance but drift due to imperfect replay. We study a hybrid perspective: \emph{trust region continual learning} that combines generative replay with a Fisher-metric trust region constraint. We show that, under local approximations, the resulting update admits a MAML-style interpretation with a single implicit inner step: replay supplies an old-task gradient signal (query-like), while the Fisher-weighted penalty provides an efficient offline curvature shaping (support-like). This yields an emergent meta-learning property in continual learning: the model becomes an initialization that rapidly \emph{re-converges} to prior task optima after each task transition, without explicitly optimizing a bilevel objective. Empirically, on task-incremental diffusion image generation and continual diffusion-policy control, trust region continual learning achieves the best final performance and retention, and consistently recovers early-task performance faster than EWC, replay, and continual meta-learning baselines.

摘要（中文）: 持续学习旨在按顺序获取任务，同时避免灾难性遗忘。然而，标准策略面临一个核心权衡：基于正则化的方法（例如，EWC）在任务最优解重叠较弱时可能过度约束更新，而基于回放的方法可以保持性能，但会因不完美的回放而产生偏移。我们研究了一种混合视角：\emph{信任域持续学习}，它将生成式回放与 Fisher 度量信任域约束相结合。我们表明，在局部近似下，所得更新允许进行单次隐式内循环的 MAML 式解释：回放提供旧任务梯度信号（类似于查询），而 Fisher 加权惩罚则提供有效的离线曲率塑造（类似于支持）。这在持续学习中产生了一种涌现的元学习属性：模型成为一种初始化，在每次任务转换后快速\emph{重新收敛}到先前的任务最优解，而无需显式优化双层目标。在经验上，在任务增量扩散图像生成和持续扩散策略控制方面，信任域持续学习实现了最佳的最终性能和保持率，并且始终比 EWC、回放和持续元学习基线更快地恢复早期任务的性能。

TLDR: The paper proposes a trust region continual learning method that combines generative replay with a Fisher-metric trust region constraint, demonstrating improved performance and faster re-convergence on task-incremental diffusion image generation and continual diffusion-policy control tasks.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种信任域持续学习方法，结合了生成式重放和Fisher度量信任域约束，并在任务增量扩散图像生成和持续扩散策略控制任务中展示了更好的性能和更快的重收敛。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Zekun Wang, Anant Gupta, Christopher J. MacLellan

Multi-Player, Multi-Strategy Quantum Game Model for Interaction-Aware Decision-Making in Autonomous Driving

Abstract (English): Although significant progress has been made in decision-making for automated driving, challenges remain for deployment in the real world. One challenge lies in addressing interaction-awareness. Most existing approaches oversimplify interactions between the ego vehicle and surrounding agents, and often neglect interactions among the agents themselves. A common solution is to model these interactions using classical game theory. However, its formulation assumes rational players, whereas human behavior is frequently uncertain or irrational. To address these challenges, we propose the Quantum Game Decision-Making (QGDM) model, a novel framework that combines classical game theory with quantum mechanics principles (such as superposition, entanglement, and interference) to tackle multi-player, multi-strategy decision-making problems. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first studies to apply quantum game theory to decision-making for automated driving. QGDM runs in real time on a standard computer, without requiring quantum hardware. We evaluate QGDM in simulation across various scenarios, including roundabouts, merging, and highways, and compare its performance with multiple baseline methods. Results show that QGDM significantly improves success rates and reduces collision rates compared to classical approaches, particularly in scenarios with high interaction.

摘要（中文）: 虽然自动驾驶决策取得了显著进展，但在现实世界部署方面仍然存在挑战。其中一个挑战在于解决交互感知问题。大多数现有方法过于简化了自车和周围智能体之间的交互，并且常常忽略智能体之间的交互。一个常见的解决方案是使用经典博弈论来建模这些交互。然而，其公式假定参与者是理性的，而人类行为常常是不确定或非理性的。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了量子博弈决策模型（QGDM），这是一个新颖的框架，它将经典博弈论与量子力学原理（例如叠加、纠缠和干涉）相结合，以解决多人、多策略的决策问题。据我们所知，这是首次将量子博弈论应用于自动驾驶决策的研究之一。 QGDM可以在标准计算机上实时运行，无需量子硬件。我们在各种场景（包括环岛、汇合和高速公路）的模拟中评估了 QGDM，并将其性能与多种基线方法进行了比较。结果表明，与经典方法相比，QGDM 显著提高了成功率并降低了碰撞率，尤其是在具有高度交互的场景中。

TLDR: This paper introduces a Quantum Game Decision-Making (QGDM) model for autonomous driving that leverages quantum mechanics principles to improve interaction-aware decision-making in multi-agent scenarios and demonstrates improved performance over classical methods in simulation.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶的量子博弈决策（QGDM）模型，该模型利用量子力学原理来改进多智能体场景中的交互感知决策，并在仿真中表现出比经典方法更好的性能。

Relevance: (4/10)

Authors: Karim Essalmi, Fernando Garrido, Fawzi Nashashibi

Manipulation via Force Distribution at Contact

Abstract (English): Efficient and robust trajectories play a crucial role in contact-rich manipulation, which demands accurate mod- eling of object-robot interactions. Many existing approaches rely on point contact models due to their computational effi- ciency. Simple contact models are computationally efficient but inherently limited for achieving human-like, contact-rich ma- nipulation, as they fail to capture key frictional dynamics and torque generation observed in human manipulation. This study introduces a Force-Distributed Line Contact (FDLC) model in contact-rich manipulation and compares it against conventional point contact models. A bi-level optimization framework is constructed, in which the lower-level solves an optimization problem for contact force computation, and the upper-level optimization applies iLQR for trajectory optimization. Through this framework, the limitations of point contact are demon- strated, and the benefits of the FDLC in generating efficient and robust trajectories are established. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated by a box rotating task, demonstrating that FDLC enables trajectories generated via non-uniform force distributions along the contact line, while requiring lower control effort and less motion of the robot.

摘要（中文）: 高效且鲁棒的轨迹在富接触操作中起着至关重要的作用，这需要对物体-机器人交互进行精确建模。许多现有方法由于其计算效率而依赖于点接触模型。简单的接触模型计算效率高，但本质上限制了实现类人的富接触操作，因为它们无法捕捉到人类操作中观察到的关键摩擦动力学和扭矩生成。本研究在富接触操作中引入了一种力分布线接触（FDLC）模型，并将其与传统的点接触模型进行了比较。构建了一个双层优化框架，其中下层解决接触力计算的优化问题，上层优化应用iLQR进行轨迹优化。通过该框架，证明了点接触的局限性，并确立了FDLC在生成高效且鲁棒轨迹方面的优势。通过盒子旋转任务验证了所提出方法的有效性，结果表明FDLC能够生成沿接触线具有非均匀力分布的轨迹，同时降低了控制力并减少了机器人的运动。

TLDR: This paper introduces a Force-Distributed Line Contact (FDLC) model for contact-rich manipulation, demonstrating its superiority over point contact models in generating efficient and robust trajectories through a bi-level optimization framework.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于丰富接触操作的力分布线接触（FDLC）模型，并通过一个双层优化框架，证明了其在生成高效和鲁棒轨迹方面优于点接触模型。

Authors: Haegu Lee, Yitaek Kim, Casper Hewson Rask, Christoffer Sloth

Modular Isoperimetric Soft Robotic Truss for Lunar Applications

Abstract (English): We introduce a large-scale robotic system designed as a lightweight, modular, and reconfigurable structure for lunar applications. The system consists of truss-like robotic triangles formed by continuous inflated fabric tubes routed through two robotic roller units and a connecting unit. A newly developed spherical joint enables up to three triangles to connect at a vertex, allowing construction of truss assemblies beyond a single octahedron. When deflated, the triangles compact to approximately the volume of the roller units, achieving a stowed-to-deployed volume ratio of 1:18.3. Upon inflation, the roller units pinch the tubes, locally reducing bending stiffness to form effective joints. Electric motors then translate the roller units along the tube, shifting the pinch point by lengthening one edge while shortening another at the same rate, thereby preserving a constant perimeter (isoperimetric). This shape-changing process requires no additional compressed air, enabling untethered operation after initial inflation. We demonstrate the system as a 12-degree-of-freedom solar array capable of tilting up to 60 degrees and sweeping 360 degrees, and as a 14-degree-of-freedom locomotion device using a step-and-slide gait. This modular, shape-adaptive system addresses key challenges for sustainable lunar operations and future space missions.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种大规模机器人系统，该系统设计为用于月球应用的轻量化、模块化和可重构结构。该系统由桁架状机器人三角形组成，这些三角形由连续充气织物管构成，织物管穿过两个机器人滚轮单元和一个连接单元。一种新开发的球形关节允许至多三个三角形在顶点处连接，从而能够构建超出单个八面体的桁架组件。放气时，三角形压缩到大约滚轮单元的体积，实现 1:18.3 的收纳到展开的体积比。充气后，滚轮单元夹紧管子，局部降低弯曲刚度，形成有效的关节。然后，电机沿管子平移滚轮单元，通过以相同的速率延长一条边，同时缩短另一条边来移动夹紧点，从而保持恒定的周长（等周）。这种形状改变过程不需要额外的压缩空气，从而可以在初始充气后实现无束缚操作。我们展示了该系统作为具有 12 个自由度的太阳能阵列，能够倾斜高达 60 度和扫动 360 度，以及作为使用步进和滑动步态的 14 个自由度的运动设备。这种模块化的、形状自适应的系统解决了可持续月球作业和未来太空任务的关键挑战。

TLDR: This paper introduces a modular, reconfigurable soft robotic truss system for lunar applications, demonstrating its use in solar array manipulation and locomotion via shape-changing isoperimetric movements.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种用于月球应用的可重构模块化软体机器人桁架系统，展示了其通过等周运动进行形状改变，在太阳能电池阵列操作和运动中的应用。

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Mihai Stanciu, Isaac Weaver, Adam Rose, James Wade, Kaden Paxton, Chris Paul, Spencer Stowell, Nathan Usevitch

Notes on the Reward Representation of Posterior Updates

Abstract (English): Many ideas in modern control and reinforcement learning treat decision-making as inference: start from a baseline distribution and update it when a signal arrives. We ask when this can be made literal rather than metaphorical. We study the special case where a KL-regularized soft update is exactly a Bayesian posterior inside a single fixed probabilistic model, so the update variable is a genuine channel through which information is transmitted. In this regime, behavioral change is driven only by evidence carried by that channel: the update must be explainable as an evidence reweighing of the baseline. This yields a sharp identification result: posterior updates determine the relative, context-dependent incentive signal that shifts behavior, but they do not uniquely determine absolute rewards, which remain ambiguous up to context-specific baselines. Requiring one reusable continuation value across different update directions adds a further coherence constraint linking the reward descriptions associated with different conditioning orders.

摘要（中文）: 现代控制和强化学习中的许多思想将决策视为推断：从一个基准分布开始，并在收到信号时更新它。我们探究何时能将这种比喻转化为字面意义。我们研究了一种特殊情况，即KL正则化的软更新严格来说是一个固定概率模型内的贝叶斯后验，因此更新变量是一个真正的“通道”，信息通过该通道传输。在这种情况下，行为的改变仅由该通道携带的证据驱动：该更新必须可以解释为对基线的证据重加权。 这产生了一个明确的识别结果：后验更新确定了推动行为改变的相对的、与上下文相关的激励信号，但它们不能唯一地确定绝对奖励，因为绝对奖励在上下文中仍然存在不确定性，直到特定于上下文的基线值。要求在不同的更新方向上使用一个可重用的持续价值（continuation value）增加了进一步的连贯性约束，将与不同条件顺序相关的奖励描述联系起来。

TLDR: The paper investigates reward representation in Bayesian decision-making as inference, showing posterior updates define relative incentive signals while absolute rewards are ambiguous. It links reward descriptions across different conditioning orders with a coherence constraint.

简要说明: 本文研究了贝叶斯决策中作为推理的奖励表征，表明后验更新定义了相对激励信号，而绝对奖励是模糊的。它利用连贯性约束将不同条件顺序的奖励描述联系起来。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Pedro A. Ortega

From Tokens to Numbers: Continuous Number Modeling for SVG Generation

Abstract (English): For certain image generation tasks, vector graphics such as Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs) offer clear benefits such as increased flexibility, size efficiency, and editing ease, but remain less explored than raster-based approaches. A core challenge is that the numerical, geometric parameters, which make up a large proportion of SVGs, are inefficiently encoded as long sequences of tokens. This slows training, reduces accuracy, and hurts generalization. To address these problems, we propose Continuous Number Modeling (CNM), an approach that directly models numbers as first-class, continuous values rather than discrete tokens. This formulation restores the mathematical elegance of the representation by aligning the model's inputs with the data's continuous nature, removing discretization artifacts introduced by token-based encoding. We then train a multimodal transformer on 2 million raster-to-SVG samples, followed by fine-tuning via reinforcement learning using perceptual feedback to further improve visual quality. Our approach improves training speed by over 30% while maintaining higher perceptual fidelity compared to alternative approaches. This work establishes CNM as a practical and efficient approach for high-quality vector generation, with potential for broader applications. We make our code available http://github.com/mikeogezi/CNM.

摘要（中文）: 对于某些图像生成任务而言，诸如可缩放矢量图形（SVG）之类的矢量图形具有明显的优势，例如更高的灵活性、更高的尺寸效率和更易于编辑，但与基于栅格的方法相比，其探索程度仍然较低。一个核心挑战在于，构成 SVG 大部分内容的数值几何参数被低效地编码成长串标记（token）。这减慢了训练速度，降低了准确性，并损害了泛化能力。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种连续数值建模（CNM）方法，该方法直接将数字建模为一等的、连续的值，而不是离散的标记。这种公式通过将模型的输入与数据的连续性质对齐，恢复了表示的数学优雅性，消除了基于标记编码引入的离散化伪影。然后，我们在 200 万个栅格到 SVG 的样本上训练一个多模态 Transformer，随后通过使用感知反馈的强化学习进行微调，以进一步提高视觉质量。与替代方法相比，我们的方法可在保持更高感知保真度的同时，将训练速度提高 30% 以上。这项工作将 CNM 确立为一种实用且高效的高质量矢量生成方法，并具有更广泛的应用潜力。我们的代码可在 http://github.com/mikeogezi/CNM 上获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces Continuous Number Modeling (CNM) for efficient and high-quality SVG generation by directly modeling geometric parameters as continuous values, improving training speed and perceptual fidelity compared to token-based methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了连续数字建模（CNM），通过直接将几何参数建模为连续值，实现高效且高质量的SVG生成，与基于令牌的方法相比，提高了训练速度和感知保真度。

Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Michael Ogezi, Martin Bell, Freda Shi, Ethan Smith

3D-Aware Implicit Motion Control for View-Adaptive Human Video Generation

Abstract (English): Existing methods for human motion control in video generation typically rely on either 2D poses or explicit 3D parametric models (e.g., SMPL) as control signals. However, 2D poses rigidly bind motion to the driving viewpoint, precluding novel-view synthesis. Explicit 3D models, though structurally informative, suffer from inherent inaccuracies (e.g., depth ambiguity and inaccurate dynamics) which, when used as a strong constraint, override the powerful intrinsic 3D awareness of large-scale video generators. In this work, we revisit motion control from a 3D-aware perspective, advocating for an implicit, view-agnostic motion representation that naturally aligns with the generator's spatial priors rather than depending on externally reconstructed constraints. We introduce 3DiMo, which jointly trains a motion encoder with a pretrained video generator to distill driving frames into compact, view-agnostic motion tokens, injected semantically via cross-attention. To foster 3D awareness, we train with view-rich supervision (i.e., single-view, multi-view, and moving-camera videos), forcing motion consistency across diverse viewpoints. Additionally, we use auxiliary geometric supervision that leverages SMPL only for early initialization and is annealed to zero, enabling the model to transition from external 3D guidance to learning genuine 3D spatial motion understanding from the data and the generator's priors. Experiments confirm that 3DiMo faithfully reproduces driving motions with flexible, text-driven camera control, significantly surpassing existing methods in both motion fidelity and visual quality.

摘要（中文）: 现有视频生成中人体运动控制的方法通常依赖于2D姿态或显式3D参数模型（例如SMPL）作为控制信号。然而，2D姿态将运动刚性地绑定到驱动视角，从而排除了新视角合成。显式3D模型虽然在结构上具有信息性，但却存在固有的不准确性（例如，深度模糊和不准确的动力学），当用作强约束时，会覆盖大规模视频生成器强大的内在3D感知能力。在这项工作中，我们从3D感知的角度重新审视运动控制，提倡一种隐式、视角无关的运动表示，该表示能够自然地与生成器的空间先验对齐，而不是依赖于外部重建的约束。我们提出了3DiMo，它将运动编码器与预训练的视频生成器联合训练，以将驱动帧提炼成紧凑的、视角无关的运动令牌，并通过交叉注意力在语义上注入。为了培养3D感知，我们采用丰富的视角监督（即单视角、多视角和运动相机视频）进行训练，从而迫使运动在不同的视角之间保持一致性。此外，我们使用辅助几何监督，该监督仅利用SMPL进行早期初始化，并将其退火到零，使模型能够从外部3D指导过渡到从数据和生成器的先验中学习真正的3D空间运动理解。实验证实，3DiMo能够忠实地再现驱动运动，并具有灵活的、文本驱动的相机控制能力，在运动保真度和视觉质量方面均显著超越了现有方法。

TLDR: The paper introduces 3DiMo, a method for 3D-aware human video generation leveraging view-agnostic motion representation trained with multi-view supervision and annealed SMPL guidance, achieving improved motion fidelity and visual quality with flexible camera control.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了3DiMo，一种3D感知的视频生成方法，它利用视图无关的运动表示，通过多视图监督和退火SMPL指导进行训练，从而在灵活的相机控制下实现更高的运动保真度和视觉质量。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Zhixue Fang, Xu He, Songlin Tang, Haoxian Zhang, Qingfeng Li, Xiaoqiang Liu, Pengfei Wan, Kun Gai

Multi-Objective Optimization for Synthetic-to-Real Style Transfer

Abstract (English): Semantic segmentation networks require large amounts of pixel-level annotated data, which are costly to obtain for real-world images. Computer graphics engines can generate synthetic images alongside their ground-truth annotations. However, models trained on such images can perform poorly on real images due to the domain gap between real and synthetic images. Style transfer methods can reduce this difference by applying a realistic style to synthetic images. Choosing effective data transformations and their sequence is difficult due to the large combinatorial search space of style transfer operators. Using multi-objective genetic algorithms, we optimize pipelines to balance structural coherence and style similarity to target domains. We study the use of paired-image metrics on individual image samples during evolution to enable rapid pipeline evaluation, as opposed to standard distributional metrics that require the generation of many images. After optimization, we evaluate the resulting Pareto front using distributional metrics and segmentation performance. We apply this approach to standard datasets in synthetic-to-real domain adaptation: from the video game GTA5 to real image datasets Cityscapes and ACDC, focusing on adverse conditions. Results demonstrate that evolutionary algorithms can propose diverse augmentation pipelines adapted to different objectives. The contribution of this work is the formulation of style transfer as a sequencing problem suitable for evolutionary optimization and the study of efficient metrics that enable feasible search in this space. The source code is available at: https://github.com/echigot/MOOSS.

摘要（中文）: 语义分割网络需要大量的像素级标注数据，而对于真实世界的图像来说，获取这些数据代价高昂。计算机图形引擎可以生成合成图像及其对应的真实标注。然而，由于真实图像和合成图像之间的领域差异，在这些合成图像上训练的模型在真实图像上的表现可能很差。风格迁移方法可以通过将真实的风格应用于合成图像来减小这种差异。由于风格迁移算子的组合搜索空间巨大，因此选择有效的数据变换及其序列是很困难的。我们使用多目标遗传算法来优化流程，以平衡结构连贯性和与目标领域的风格相似性。我们研究了在进化过程中使用针对单个图像样本的成对图像度量来实现快速的流程评估，而不是需要生成大量图像的标准分布度量。优化之后，我们使用分布度量和分割性能来评估得到的帕累托前沿。我们将此方法应用于合成到真实图像领域自适应的标准数据集：从视频游戏GTA5到真实图像数据集Cityscapes和ACDC，重点关注不利条件。结果表明，进化算法可以提出适应不同目标的多样化增强流程。这项工作的贡献在于将风格迁移形式化为一个适用于进化优化的排序问题，并研究了能够在该空间中进行可行搜索的高效度量。源代码可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/echigot/MOOSS。

TLDR: This paper uses multi-objective genetic algorithms to optimize style transfer pipelines for synthetic-to-real domain adaptation in semantic segmentation, balancing structural coherence and style similarity using efficient paired-image metrics. It shows that evolution can discover effective augmentation pipelines.

简要说明: 本文使用多目标遗传算法优化风格迁移流程，用于语义分割中从合成到真实的域适应，通过有效的配对图像指标平衡结构一致性和风格相似性。结果表明，进化算法可以发现有效的增强流程。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Estelle Chigot, Thomas Oberlin, Manon Huguenin, Dennis Wilson

Constrained Dynamic Gaussian Splatting

Abstract (English): While Dynamic Gaussian Splatting enables high-fidelity 4D reconstruction, its deployment is severely hindered by a fundamental dilemma: unconstrained densification leads to excessive memory consumption incompatible with edge devices, whereas heuristic pruning fails to achieve optimal rendering quality under preset Gaussian budgets. In this work, we propose Constrained Dynamic Gaussian Splatting (CDGS), a novel framework that formulates dynamic scene reconstruction as a budget-constrained optimization problem to enforce a strict, user-defined Gaussian budget during training. Our key insight is to introduce a differentiable budget controller as the core optimization driver. Guided by a multi-modal unified importance score, this controller fuses geometric, motion, and perceptual cues for precise capacity regulation. To maximize the utility of this fixed budget, we further decouple the optimization of static and dynamic elements, employing an adaptive allocation mechanism that dynamically distributes capacity based on motion complexity. Furthermore, we implement a three-phase training strategy to seamlessly integrate these constraints, ensuring precise adherence to the target count. Coupled with a dual-mode hybrid compression scheme, CDGS not only strictly adheres to hardware constraints (error < 2%}) but also pushes the Pareto frontier of rate-distortion performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CDGS delivers optimal rendering quality under varying capacity limits, achieving over 3x compression compared to state-of-the-art methods.

摘要（中文）: 动态高斯溅射虽然能够实现高保真的4D重建，但其部署受到一个根本性难题的严重阻碍：无约束的稠密化会导致过度的内存消耗，与边缘设备不兼容；而启发式剪枝则无法在预设的高斯预算下实现最佳的渲染质量。在这项工作中，我们提出了约束动态高斯溅射（CDGS），这是一种新颖的框架，将动态场景重建形式化为预算约束的优化问题，以在训练期间强制执行严格的、用户定义的高斯预算。我们的关键洞察在于引入一个可微的预算控制器作为核心优化驱动因素。该控制器在多模态统一重要性评分的指导下，融合了几何、运动和感知线索，以实现精确的容量调节。为了最大化此固定预算的效用，我们进一步解耦了静态和动态元素的优化，采用了一种自适应分配机制，该机制根据运动复杂度动态分配容量。此外，我们实施了一个三阶段训练策略，以无缝集成这些约束，确保精确地符合目标计数。结合双模混合压缩方案，CDGS不仅严格遵守硬件约束（误差 < 2%}），还推动了率失真性能的帕累托前沿。大量实验表明，CDGS在不同的容量限制下都能提供最佳的渲染质量，与最先进的方法相比，实现了超过3倍的压缩率。

TLDR: The paper introduces Constrained Dynamic Gaussian Splatting (CDGS) to improve dynamic scene reconstruction by optimizing Gaussian budgets, achieving better compression and rendering quality, especially on edge devices.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了约束动态高斯溅射 (CDGS)，通过优化高斯预算来改进动态场景重建，尤其是在边缘设备上实现了更好的压缩和渲染质量。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Zihan Zheng, Zhenglong Wu, Xuanxuan Wang, Houqiang Zhong, Xiaoyun Zhang, Qiang Hu, Guangtao Zhai, Wenjun Zhang

From Single Scan to Sequential Consistency: A New Paradigm for LIDAR Relocalization

Abstract (English): LiDAR relocalization aims to estimate the global 6-DoF pose of a sensor in the environment. However, existing regression-based approaches are prone to dynamic or ambiguous scenarios, as they either solely rely on single-frame inference or neglect the spatio-temporal consistency across scans. In this paper, we propose TempLoc, a new LiDAR relocalization framework that enhances the robustness of localization by effectively modeling sequential consistency. Specifically, a Global Coordinate Estimation module is first introduced to predict point-wise global coordinates and associated uncertainties for each LiDAR scan. A Prior Coordinate Generation module is then presented to estimate inter-frame point correspondences by the attention mechanism. Lastly, an Uncertainty-Guided Coordinate Fusion module is deployed to integrate both predictions of point correspondence in an end-to-end fashion, yielding a more temporally consistent and accurate global 6-DoF pose. Experimental results on the NCLT and Oxford Robot-Car benchmarks show that our TempLoc outperforms stateof-the-art methods by a large margin, demonstrating the effectiveness of temporal-aware correspondence modeling in LiDAR relocalization. Our code will be released soon.

摘要（中文）: 激光雷达重定位旨在估计传感器在环境中的全局六自由度位姿。然而，现有的基于回归的方法容易受到动态或模糊场景的影响，因为它们要么仅依赖于单帧推理，要么忽略了扫描之间的时间空间一致性。在本文中，我们提出TempLoc，一种新的激光雷达重定位框架，通过有效地建模序列一致性来增强定位的鲁棒性。具体而言，首先引入一个全局坐标估计模块来预测每个激光雷达扫描点级的全局坐标以及相关的不确定性。然后，提出一个先验坐标生成模块，通过注意力机制估计帧间点的对应关系。最后，部署一个不确定性引导的坐标融合模块，以端到端的方式整合这两个点对应关系的预测，从而产生在时间上更一致和更准确的全局六自由度位姿。在NCLT和Oxford Robot-Car数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的TempLoc大幅优于最先进的方法，证明了时间感知的对应关系建模在激光雷达重定位中的有效性。我们的代码即将发布。

TLDR: The paper introduces TempLoc, a new LiDAR relocalization framework that leverages sequential scan consistency and uncertainty-aware fusion to achieve improved pose estimation accuracy compared to existing methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为TempLoc的新的激光雷达重定位框架，该框架利用序列扫描一致性和不确定性感知融合，与现有方法相比，实现了更高的姿态估计精度。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Minghang Zhu, Zhijing Wang, Yuxin Guo, Wen Li, Sheng Ao, Cheng Wang

On the Sample Efficiency of Inverse Dynamics Models for Semi-Supervised Imitation Learning

Abstract (English): Semi-supervised imitation learning (SSIL) consists in learning a policy from a small dataset of action-labeled trajectories and a much larger dataset of action-free trajectories. Some SSIL methods learn an inverse dynamics model (IDM) to predict the action from the current state and the next state. An IDM can act as a policy when paired with a video model (VM-IDM) or as a label generator to perform behavior cloning on action-free data (IDM labeling). In this work, we first show that VM-IDM and IDM labeling learn the same policy in a limit case, which we call the IDM-based policy. We then argue that the previously observed advantage of IDM-based policies over behavior cloning is due to the superior sample efficiency of IDM learning, which we attribute to two causes: (i) the ground-truth IDM tends to be contained in a lower complexity hypothesis class relative to the expert policy, and (ii) the ground-truth IDM is often less stochastic than the expert policy. We argue these claims based on insights from statistical learning theory and novel experiments, including a study of IDM-based policies using recent architectures for unified video-action prediction (UVA). Motivated by these insights, we finally propose an improved version of the existing LAPO algorithm for latent action policy learning.

摘要（中文）: 半监督模仿学习(SSIL)是指从少量带动作标签的轨迹数据集和大量不带动作标签的轨迹数据集中学习策略。一些SSIL方法学习一个逆动力学模型(IDM)来从当前状态和下一个状态预测动作。IDM可以与视频模型配对（VM-IDM）时作为策略，或者作为标签生成器在无动作数据上执行行为克隆（IDM标注）。在这项工作中，我们首先表明VM-IDM和IDM标注在一种极限情况下学习相同的策略，我们称之为基于IDM的策略。然后，我们认为之前观察到的基于IDM的策略优于行为克隆的原因是IDM学习具有更高的样本效率，我们将其归因于两个原因：(i)相对于专家策略，真实的IDM倾向于包含在复杂度更低的假设类中，以及(ii)真实的IDM通常比专家策略随机性更低。我们基于统计学习理论的见解和新的实验论证这些主张，包括使用最新的统一视频-动作预测(UVA)架构对基于IDM的策略进行的研究。受这些见解的启发，我们最终提出了现有潜在动作策略学习(LAPO)算法的改进版本。

TLDR: This paper analyzes why Inverse Dynamics Models (IDMs) are more sample-efficient than behavior cloning in semi-supervised imitation learning, attributing it to lower complexity and stochasticity. They propose an improved version of the LAPO algorithm based on their analysis.

简要说明: 本文分析了在半监督模仿学习中，逆动力学模型(IDM)比行为克隆更具样本效率的原因，将其归因于较低的复杂性和随机性。 他们在分析的基础上提出了LAPO算法的改进版本。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)

Authors: Sacha Morin, Moonsub Byeon, Alexia Jolicoeur-Martineau, Sébastien Lachapelle

Energy-Efficient Neuromorphic Computing for Edge AI: A Framework with Adaptive Spiking Neural Networks and Hardware-Aware Optimization

Abstract (English): Edge AI applications increasingly require ultra-low-power, low-latency inference. Neuromorphic computing based on event-driven spiking neural networks (SNNs) offers an attractive path, but practical deployment on resource-constrained devices is limited by training difficulty, hardware-mapping overheads, and sensitivity to temporal dynamics. We present NeuEdge, a framework that combines adaptive SNN models with hardware-aware optimization for edge deployment. NeuEdge uses a temporal coding scheme that blends rate and spike-timing patterns to reduce spike activity while preserving accuracy, and a hardware-aware training procedure that co-optimizes network structure and on-chip placement to improve utilization on neuromorphic processors. An adaptive threshold mechanism adjusts neuron excitability from input statistics, reducing energy consumption without degrading performance. Across standard vision and audio benchmarks, NeuEdge achieves 91-96% accuracy with up to 2.3 ms inference latency on edge hardware and an estimated 847 GOp/s/W energy efficiency. A case study on an autonomous-drone workload shows up to 312x energy savings relative to conventional deep neural networks while maintaining real-time operation.

摘要（中文）: 边缘人工智能应用对超低功耗、低延迟推理的需求日益增长。基于事件驱动脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的神经形态计算提供了一条引人注目的路径，但受限于训练难度、硬件映射开销以及对时间动态的敏感性，在资源受限设备上的实际部署受到限制。我们提出了NeuEdge，一个将自适应SNN模型与硬件感知优化相结合的边缘部署框架。NeuEdge使用一种融合了速率和脉冲时间模式的时间编码方案，以减少脉冲活动，同时保持准确性；以及一种硬件感知的训练过程，该过程共同优化网络结构和片上放置，以提高神经形态处理器上的利用率。一种自适应阈值机制根据输入统计数据调整神经元兴奋性，从而降低能耗，而不会降低性能。在标准视觉和音频基准测试中，NeuEdge在边缘硬件上实现了91-96%的准确率，推理延迟高达2.3毫秒，并估计具有847 GOp/s/W的能量效率。一个关于自主无人机工作负载的案例研究表明，相对于传统的深度神经网络，能量节省高达312倍，同时保持实时运行。

TLDR: The paper presents NeuEdge, a framework combining adaptive spiking neural networks and hardware-aware optimization for energy-efficient Edge AI, demonstrating significant energy savings compared to traditional DNNs while maintaining accuracy and low latency.

简要说明: 该论文提出了NeuEdge，一个结合自适应脉冲神经网络和硬件感知优化的框架，用于实现节能的边缘AI。实验表明，与传统的DNN相比，该框架在保持准确性和低延迟的同时，显著节省了能源。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Olaf Yunus Laitinen Imanov, Derya Umut Kulali, Taner Yilmaz, Duygu Erisken, Rana Irem Turhan

Human-in-the-Loop Failure Recovery with Adaptive Task Allocation

Abstract (English): Since the recent Covid-19 pandemic, mobile manipulators and humanoid assistive robots with higher levels of autonomy have increasingly been adopted for patient care and living assistance. Despite advancements in autonomy, these robots often struggle to perform reliably in dynamic and unstructured environments and require human intervention to recover from failures. Effective human-robot collaboration is essential to enable robots to receive assistance from the most competent operator, in order to reduce their workload and minimize disruptions in task execution. In this paper, we propose an adaptive method for allocating robotic failures to human operators (ARFA). Our proposed approach models the capabilities of human operators, and continuously updates these beliefs based on their actual performance for failure recovery. For every failure to be resolved, a reward function calculates expected outcomes based on operator capabilities and historical data, task urgency, and current workload distribution. The failure is then assigned to the operator with the highest expected reward. Our simulations and user studies show that ARFA outperforms random allocation, significantly reducing robot idle time, improving overall system performance, and leading to a more distributed workload among operators.

摘要（中文）: 自近期新冠疫情以来，具有更高自主性的移动机械臂和人形辅助机器人，越来越多地被应用于病人护理和生活辅助。尽管自主性有所提升，但这些机器人往往难以在动态和非结构化环境中可靠地执行任务，并且需要人工干预才能从故障中恢复。有效的人机协作对于使机器人能够得到最有能力的 оператора 的帮助至关重要，从而减少机器人的工作量并最大程度地减少任务执行中的中断。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于将机器人故障分配给人工 操作员 的自适应方法 (ARFA)。我们提出的方法模拟了人工操作员的能力，并根据他们实际的故障恢复表现持续更新这些置信度。对于每个需要解决的故障，一个奖励函数会根据操作员的能力和历史数据、任务的紧迫性以及当前的工作量分布来计算预期结果。然后，故障将被分配给预期奖励最高的操作员。我们的模拟和用户研究表明，ARFA 的性能优于随机分配，显著减少了机器人的空闲时间，提高了整体系统性能，并实现了操作员之间更均衡的工作量分配。

TLDR: This paper introduces ARFA, an adaptive method for allocating robot failures to human operators based on their capabilities, task urgency, and workload, showing improved performance over random allocation in simulations and user studies.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种自适应方法ARFA，用于根据人类操作员的能力、任务紧迫性和工作负载将机器人故障分配给他们。仿真和用户研究表明，该方法比随机分配表现更好。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Lorena Maria Genua, Nikita Boguslavskii, Zhi Li

Beyond the Vehicle: Cooperative Localization by Fusing Point Clouds for GPS-Challenged Urban Scenarios

Abstract (English): Accurate vehicle localization is a critical challenge in urban environments where GPS signals are often unreliable. This paper presents a cooperative multi-sensor and multi-modal localization approach to address this issue by fusing data from vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) systems. Our approach integrates cooperative data with a point cloud registration-based simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm. The system processes point clouds generated from diverse sensor modalities, including vehicle-mounted LiDAR and stereo cameras, as well as sensors deployed at intersections. By leveraging shared data from infrastructure, our method significantly improves localization accuracy and robustness in complex, GPS-noisy urban scenarios.

摘要（中文）: 在GPS信号通常不可靠的城市环境中，精确的车辆定位是一项关键挑战。本文提出了一种协同的多传感器和多模态定位方法，通过融合车对车（V2V）和车对基础设施（V2I）系统的数据来解决这个问题。我们的方法将协同数据与基于点云配准的同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）算法相结合。该系统处理来自多种传感器模态生成的点云，包括车辆搭载的激光雷达和立体相机，以及部署在交叉路口的传感器。通过利用来自基础设施的共享数据，我们的方法在复杂的、GPS噪声干扰严重的城市场景中显著提高了定位精度和鲁棒性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a cooperative localization method that fuses point cloud data from V2V and V2I systems to enhance localization accuracy in GPS-denied urban environments, using a point cloud registration-based SLAM algorithm.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种协同定位方法，该方法融合来自V2V和V2I系统的点云数据，以提高GPS受限城市环境中的定位精度，并使用基于点云配准的SLAM算法。

Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Kuo-Yi Chao, Ralph Rasshofer, Alois Christian Knoll

Formal Evidence Generation for Assurance Cases for Robotic Software Models

Abstract (English): Robotics and Autonomous Systems are increasingly deployed in safety-critical domains, so that demonstrating their safety is essential. Assurance Cases (ACs) provide structured arguments supported by evidence, but generating and maintaining this evidence is labour-intensive, error-prone, and difficult to keep consistent as systems evolve. We present a model-based approach to systematically generating AC evidence by embedding formal verification into the assurance workflow. The approach addresses three challenges: systematically deriving formal assertions from natural language requirements using templates, orchestrating multiple formal verification tools to handle diverse property types, and integrating formal evidence production into the workflow. Leveraging RoboChart, a domain-specific modelling language with formal semantics, we combine model checking and theorem proving in our approach. Structured requirements are automatically transformed into formal assertions using predefined templates, and verification results are automatically integrated as evidence. Case studies demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 机器人技术和自主系统正越来越多地部署在安全关键领域，因此证明其安全性至关重要。保障案例（ACs）提供由证据支持的结构化论证，但生成和维护这些证据需要大量的人力，容易出错，并且很难在系统演变时保持一致。我们提出一种基于模型的方法，通过将形式化验证嵌入到保障工作流程中，来系统地生成AC证据。该方法解决了三个挑战：使用模板从自然语言需求中系统地推导出形式化断言，协调多个形式化验证工具以处理不同的属性类型，以及将形式化证据的生成集成到工作流程中。利用RoboChart，一种具有形式化语义的领域特定建模语言，我们在我们的方法中结合了模型检查和定理证明。结构化需求使用预定义的模板自动转换为形式化断言，并且验证结果自动集成为证据。案例研究证明了我们方法的有效性。

TLDR: This paper presents a model-based approach for automatically generating evidence for assurance cases in robotic software using formal verification and RoboChart, aiming to improve safety demonstration in safety-critical robotics domains.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于模型的方法，利用形式化验证和RoboChart自动生成机器人软件保障案例的证据，旨在提高安全关键机器人领域中的安全性论证。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Fang Yan, Simon Foster, Ana Cavalcanti, Ibrahim Habli, James Baxter

Model-based Optimal Control for Rigid-Soft Underactuated Systems

Abstract (English): Continuum soft robots are inherently underactuated and subject to intrinsic input constraints, making dynamic control particularly challenging, especially in hybrid rigid-soft robots. While most existing methods focus on quasi-static behaviors, dynamic tasks such as swing-up require accurate exploitation of continuum dynamics. This has led to studies on simple low-order template systems that often fail to capture the complexity of real continuum deformations. Model-based optimal control offers a systematic solution; however, its application to rigid-soft robots is often limited by the computational cost and inaccuracy of numerical differentiation for high-dimensional models. Building on recent advances in the Geometric Variable Strain model that enable analytical derivatives, this work investigates three optimal control strategies for underactuated soft systems-Direct Collocation, Differential Dynamic Programming, and Nonlinear Model Predictive Control-to perform dynamic swing-up tasks. To address stiff continuum dynamics and constrained actuation, implicit integration schemes and warm-start strategies are employed to improve numerical robustness and computational efficiency. The methods are evaluated in simulation on three Rigid-Soft and high-order soft benchmark systems-the Soft Cart-Pole, the Soft Pendubot, and the Soft Furuta Pendulum- highlighting their performance and computational trade-offs.

摘要（中文）: 连续体软体机器人天生欠驱动且受内在输入约束，这使得动态控制极具挑战性，尤其是在刚柔混合机器人中。虽然大多数现有方法侧重于准静态行为，但像摆动起立这样的动态任务需要精确利用连续体动力学。这促使人们研究简单的低阶模板系统，但这些系统通常无法捕捉真实连续体变形的复杂性。基于模型的优化控制提供了一种系统性的解决方案；然而，由于高维模型数值微分的计算成本和不准确性，其在刚柔混合机器人上的应用通常受到限制。基于几何变量应变模型近期在实现解析导数方面的进展，这项工作研究了三种用于欠驱动软体系统的优化控制策略——直接配位法、微分动态规划法和非线性模型预测控制——以执行动态摆动起立任务。为了解决刚性的连续体动力学和受约束的驱动，采用了隐式积分方案和热启动策略，以提高数值鲁棒性和计算效率。这些方法通过仿真在三个刚柔混合和高阶软体基准系统上进行了评估——软体倒立摆、软体双摆机器人和软体富尔塔摆——突出了它们的性能和计算折衷。

TLDR: This paper explores model-based optimal control strategies for dynamic tasks on underactuated rigid-soft robots, leveraging analytical derivatives from the Geometric Variable Strain model and implicit integration schemes for robustness and efficiency.

简要说明: 本文探索了基于模型的优化控制策略，用于欠驱动刚柔混合机器人的动态任务。该方法利用几何可变应变模型的解析导数和隐式积分方案，以提高鲁棒性和效率。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)

Authors: Daniele Caradonna, Nikhil Nair, Anup Teejo Mathew, Daniel Feliu Talegón, Imran Afgan, Egidio Falotico, Cosimo Della Santina, Federico Renda

Deep-Learning-Based Control of a Decoupled Two-Segment Continuum Robot for Endoscopic Submucosal Dissection

Abstract (English): Manual endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) is technically demanding, and existing single-segment robotic tools offer limited dexterity. These limitations motivate the development of more advanced solutions. To address this, DESectBot, a novel dual segment continuum robot with a decoupled structure and integrated surgical forceps, enabling 6 degrees of freedom (DoFs) tip dexterity for improved lesion targeting in ESD, was developed in this work. Deep learning controllers based on gated recurrent units (GRUs) for simultaneous tip position and orientation control, effectively handling the nonlinear coupling between continuum segments, were proposed. The GRU controller was benchmarked against Jacobian based inverse kinematics, model predictive control (MPC), a feedforward neural network (FNN), and a long short-term memory (LSTM) network. In nested-rectangle and Lissajous trajectory tracking tasks, the GRU achieved the lowest position/orientation RMSEs: 1.11 mm/ 4.62° and 0.81 mm/ 2.59°, respectively. For orientation control at a fixed position (four target poses), the GRU attained a mean RMSE of 0.14 mm and 0.72°, outperforming all alternatives. In a peg transfer task, the GRU achieved a 100% success rate (120 success/120 attempts) with an average transfer time of 11.8s, the STD significantly outperforms novice-controlled systems. Additionally, an ex vivo ESD demonstration grasping, elevating, and resecting tissue as the scalpel completed the cut confirmed that DESectBot provides sufficient stiffness to divide thick gastric mucosa and an operative workspace adequate for large lesions.These results confirm that GRU-based control significantly enhances precision, reliability, and usability in ESD surgical training scenarios.

摘要（中文）: 人工内镜黏膜下剥离术（ESD）在技术上要求很高，而现有的单段式机器人工具的灵活性有限。这些局限性促使人们开发更先进的解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本研究开发了一种新型双段连续体机器人 DESectBot，具有解耦结构和集成手术钳，可实现6个自由度（DoFs）的末端灵活性，从而提高ESD中病灶靶向的精确性。提出了基于门控循环单元（GRU）的深度学习控制器，用于同步末端位置和姿态控制，有效处理连续体段之间的非线性耦合。GRU控制器与基于雅可比矩阵的逆运动学、模型预测控制（MPC）、前馈神经网络（FNN）和长短期记忆（LSTM）网络进行了基准测试。在嵌套矩形和利萨茹轨迹跟踪任务中，GRU实现了最低的位置/姿态均方根误差（RMSE）：分别为1.11毫米/ 4.62° 和 0.81毫米/ 2.59°。对于固定位置的姿态控制（四个目标姿态），GRU 达到了 0.14 毫米和 0.72°的平均RMSE，优于所有其他方案。在插钉任务中，GRU 实现了 100% 的成功率（120 次成功/120 次尝试），平均转移时间为 11.8 秒，标准差明显优于新手控制的系统。此外，离体 ESD 演示，抓取、提起和切除组织，同时手术刀完成切割，证实了 DESectBot 提供了足够的刚度来分离厚的胃黏膜，以及足够大的手术空间来处理大的病灶。这些结果证实，基于 GRU 的控制显著提高了 ESD 手术训练场景中的精度、可靠性和可用性。

TLDR: This paper presents a deep-learning-based control system using GRUs for a novel dual-segment continuum robot (DESectBot) designed for endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD), demonstrating improved precision and reliability compared to other control methods and manual systems.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习（使用 GRU）的控制系统，用于新型双段连续体机器人 (DESectBot)，该机器人专为内镜粘膜下剥离 (ESD) 设计，与其它控制方法和手动系统相比，展现了更高的精度和可靠性。

Authors: Yuancheng Shao, Yao Zhang, Jia Gu, Zixi Chen, Di Wu, Yuqiao Chen, Bo Lu, Wenjie Liu, Cesare Stefanini, Peng Qi

LEVIO: Lightweight Embedded Visual Inertial Odometry for Resource-Constrained Devices

Abstract (English): Accurate, infrastructure-less sensor systems for motion tracking are essential for mobile robotics and augmented reality (AR) applications. The most popular state-of-the-art visual-inertial odometry (VIO) systems, however, are too computationally demanding for resource-constrained hardware, such as micro-drones and smart glasses. This work presents LEVIO, a fully featured VIO pipeline optimized for ultra-low-power compute platforms, allowing six-degrees-of-freedom (DoF) real-time sensing. LEVIO incorporates established VIO components such as Oriented FAST and Rotated BRIEF (ORB) feature tracking and bundle adjustment, while emphasizing a computationally efficient architecture with parallelization and low memory usage to suit embedded microcontrollers and low-power systems-on-chip (SoCs). The paper proposes and details the algorithmic design choices and the hardware-software co-optimization approach, and presents real-time performance on resource-constrained hardware. LEVIO is validated on a parallel-processing ultra-low-power RISC-V SoC, achieving 20 FPS while consuming less than 100 mW, and benchmarked against public VIO datasets, offering a compelling balance between efficiency and accuracy. To facilitate reproducibility and adoption, the complete implementation is released as open-source.

摘要（中文）: 用于运动追踪的精确、无需基础设施的传感器系统对于移动机器人和增强现实(AR)应用至关重要。然而，最先进的视觉惯性里程计（VIO）系统通常计算量过大，难以在资源受限的硬件上运行，例如微型无人机和智能眼镜。 本文提出LEVIO，一个为超低功耗计算平台优化的全功能VIO流程，能够实现六自由度(6DoF)实时感知。 LEVIO融合了成熟的VIO组件，例如Oriented FAST and Rotated BRIEF (ORB)特征跟踪和捆绑调整，同时强调一个计算效率高的架构，通过并行化和低内存占用，以适应嵌入式微控制器和低功耗片上系统(SoC)。 本文提出并详细介绍了算法设计选择和软硬件协同优化方法，并展示了在资源受限硬件上的实时性能。 LEVIO在一个并行处理的超低功耗RISC-V SoC上进行了验证，实现了20 FPS的帧率，功耗低于100 mW，并通过公共VIO数据集进行了基准测试，在效率和精度之间取得了令人信服的平衡。 为了方便复现和采用，完整的实现已开源发布。

TLDR: LEVIO is a lightweight, open-source visual-inertial odometry (VIO) pipeline optimized for resource-constrained devices, achieving real-time performance with low power consumption on a RISC-V SoC.

简要说明: LEVIO是一个轻量级的开源视觉惯性里程计（VIO）流水线，针对资源受限设备进行了优化，在RISC-V SoC上实现了低功耗的实时性能。

Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Jonas Kühne, Christian Vogt, Michele Magno, Luca Benini

Omnidirectional Solid-State mmWave Radar Perception for UAV Power Line Collision Avoidance

Abstract (English): Detecting and estimating distances to power lines is a challenge for both human UAV pilots and autonomous systems, which increases the risk of unintended collisions. We present a mmWave radar-based perception system that provides spherical sensing coverage around a small UAV for robust power line detection and avoidance. The system integrates multiple compact solid-state mmWave radar modules to synthesize an omnidirectional field of view while remaining lightweight. We characterize the sensing behavior of this omnidirectional radar arrangement in power line environments and develop a robust detection-and-avoidance algorithm tailored to that behavior. Field experiments on real power lines demonstrate reliable detection at ranges up to 10 m, successful avoidance maneuvers at flight speeds upwards of 10 m/s, and detection of wires as thin as 1.2 mm in diameter. These results indicate the approach's suitability as an additional safety layer for both autonomous and manual UAV flight.

摘要（中文）: 检测和估算到电力线的距离对于人工无人机驾驶员和自主系统来说都是一项挑战，这增加了意外碰撞的风险。我们提出了一种基于毫米波雷达的感知系统，该系统围绕小型无人机提供球形传感覆盖范围，从而实现稳健的电力线检测和规避。该系统集成了多个紧凑型固态毫米波雷达模块，以合成全向视野，同时保持轻量化。我们描述了这种全向雷达装置在电力线环境中的传感行为，并开发了一种针对该行为量身定制的稳健的检测-规避算法。在真实电力线上的现场实验表明，在高达 10 米的范围内实现了可靠的检测，在飞行速度超过 10 米/秒的情况下成功进行了规避机动，并且检测到了直径小至 1.2 毫米的电线。这些结果表明该方法适合作为自主和人工无人机飞行的额外安全层。

TLDR: This paper presents a mmWave radar-based system for UAVs to detect and avoid power lines, achieving reliable detection and avoidance in real-world experiments.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于毫米波雷达的无人机系统，用于检测和避让高压电线，并在实际环境中实现了可靠的检测和避让。

Authors: Nicolaj Haarhøj Malle, Emad Ebeid

Towards Considerate Embodied AI: Co-Designing Situated Multi-Site Healthcare Robots from Abstract Concepts to High-Fidelity Prototypes

Abstract (English): Co-design is essential for grounding embodied artificial intelligence (AI) systems in real-world contexts, especially high-stakes domains such as healthcare. While prior work has explored multidisciplinary collaboration, iterative prototyping, and support for non-technical participants, few have interwoven these into a sustained co-design process. Such efforts often target one context and low-fidelity stages, limiting the generalizability of findings and obscuring how participants' ideas evolve. To address these limitations, we conducted a 14-week workshop with a multidisciplinary team of 22 participants, centered around how embodied AI can reduce non-value-added task burdens in three healthcare settings: emergency departments, long-term rehabilitation facilities, and sleep disorder clinics. We found that the iterative progression from abstract brainstorming to high-fidelity prototypes, supported by educational scaffolds, enabled participants to understand real-world trade-offs and generate more deployable solutions. We propose eight guidelines for co-designing more considerate embodied AI: attuned to context, responsive to social dynamics, mindful of expectations, and grounded in deployment. Project Page: https://byc-sophie.github.io/Towards-Considerate-Embodied-AI/

摘要（中文）: 协同设计对于将具身人工智能(AI)系统植根于现实世界环境至关重要，尤其是在医疗保健等高风险领域。虽然先前的工作已经探索了多学科协作、迭代原型设计以及对非技术参与者的支持，但很少有人将这些融入到持续的协同设计过程中。此类努力通常针对单一背景和低保真阶段，限制了研究结果的普适性，并掩盖了参与者想法的演变过程。为了解决这些局限性，我们与一个由22名参与者组成的多学科团队进行了一个为期14周的研讨会，其中心议题是具身AI如何减少急诊科、长期康复机构和睡眠障碍诊所这三个医疗保健环境中的非增值任务负担。我们发现，在教育支架的支持下，从抽象的头脑风暴到高保真原型的迭代进展，能够使参与者理解现实世界的权衡，并产生更具可部署性的解决方案。我们提出了八项指导原则，用于协同设计更周全的具身AI：适应环境、响应社会动态、注意期望，以及扎根于部署。项目页面：https://byc-sophie.github.io/Towards-Considerate-Embodied-AI/

TLDR: This paper presents a 14-week co-design workshop for embodied AI in healthcare settings, resulting in eight guidelines for designing "considerate" robots. The focus is on multidisciplinary collaboration and iterative prototyping to generate deployable solutions.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一个为期 14 周的具身人工智能协同设计研讨会，该研讨会针对医疗保健环境，并最终提出了八项设计"体贴"机器人的指导原则。重点在于多学科协作和迭代原型设计，以生成可部署的解决方案。

Authors: Yuanchen Bai, Ruixiang Han, Niti Parikh, Wendy Ju, Angelique Taylor

Fast Near Time-Optimal Motion Planning for Holonomic Vehicles in Structured Environments

Abstract (English): This paper proposes a novel and efficient optimization-based method for generating near time-optimal trajectories for holonomic vehicles navigating through complex but structured environments. The approach aims to solve the problem of motion planning for planar motion systems using magnetic levitation that can be used in assembly lines, automated laboratories or clean-rooms. In these applications, time-optimal trajectories that can be computed in real-time are required to increase productivity and allow the vehicles to be reactive if needed. The presented approach encodes the environment representation using free-space corridors and represents the motion of the vehicle through such a corridor using a motion primitive. These primitives are selected heuristically and define the trajectory with a limited number of degrees of freedom, which are determined in an optimization problem. As a result, the method achieves significantly lower computation times compared to the state-of-the-art, most notably solving a full Optimal Control Problem (OCP), OMG-tools or VP-STO without significantly compromising optimality within a fixed corridor sequence. The approach is benchmarked extensively in simulation and is validated on a real-world Beckhoff XPlanar system

摘要（中文）: 本文提出了一种新颖且高效的基于优化的方法，用于生成在复杂但结构化环境中导航的全向车辆的近似时间最优轨迹。该方法旨在解决平面运动系统的运动规划问题，该系统使用磁悬浮技术，可应用于装配线、自动化实验室或洁净室。在这些应用中，需要能够实时计算的时间最优轨迹，以提高生产力并使车辆在需要时能够做出反应。本文提出的方法使用自由空间走廊对环境进行表示，并使用运动基元表示车辆通过此类走廊的运动。这些基元是经过启发式选择的，并以有限的自由度定义轨迹，而这些自由度在优化问题中确定。因此，该方法相比目前最先进的技术，实现了显著更低的计算时间，最值得注意的是，它无需显著牺牲固定走廊序列中的最优性，即可解决完整的最佳控制问题 (OCP)、OMG-tools或VP-STO。该方法已在仿真中进行了广泛的基准测试，并在真实的倍福 XPlanar 系统上进行了验证。

TLDR: This paper presents a fast, optimization-based motion planning method for holonomic vehicles in structured environments, achieving near time-optimal trajectories with significantly reduced computation time compared to existing methods and validating on real-world systems.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种快速的、基于优化的运动规划方法，用于在结构化环境中运行的全向车辆，实现了接近时间最优的轨迹，并且与现有方法相比，计算时间显著减少，并在真实世界系统中进行了验证。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
