Authors: Louis Callens, Bastiaan Vandewal, Ibrahim Ibrahim, Jan Swevers, Wilm Decré

Sub-optimality bounds for certainty equivalent policies in partially observed systems

Abstract (English): In this paper, we present a generalization of the certainty equivalence principle of stochastic control. One interpretation of the classical certainty equivalence principle for linear systems with output feedback and quadratic costs is as follows: the optimal action at each time is obtained by evaluating the optimal state-feedback policy of the stochastic linear system at the minimum mean square error (MMSE) estimate of the state. Motivated by this interpretation, we consider certainty equivalent policies for general (non-linear) partially observed stochastic systems that allow for any state estimate rather than restricting to MMSE estimates. In such settings, the certainty equivalent policy is not optimal. For models where the cost and the dynamics are smooth in an appropriate sense, we derive upper bounds on the sub-optimality of certainty equivalent policies. We present several examples to illustrate the results.

摘要（中文）: 本文提出了一种随机控制中确定性等价原理的推广。经典确定性等价原理对于具有输出反馈和二次代价的线性系统的一种解释如下：每个时刻的最优行动是通过在状态的最小均方误差（MMSE）估计值处评估随机线性系统的最优状态反馈策略而得到的。受到这种解释的启发，我们考虑了适用于一般（非线性）部分可观测随机系统的确定性等价策略，其允许任何状态估计，而不仅仅局限于MMSE估计。在这种情况下，确定性等价策略并非最优。对于成本和动力学在适当意义下是光滑的模型，我们推导了确定性等价策略的次优性的上界。 我们提供几个例子来说明这些结果。

TLDR: This paper generalizes the certainty equivalence principle for partially observed stochastic systems, providing sub-optimality bounds for certainty equivalent policies using arbitrary state estimates and illustrating the results with examples.

简要说明: 该论文推广了部分可观察随机系统中的确定性等价原理，为使用任意状态估计的确定性等价策略提供了次优性界限，并通过示例说明了结果。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Berk Bozkurt, Aditya Mahajan, Ashutosh Nayyar, Yi Ouyang

WebSentinel: Detecting and Localizing Prompt Injection Attacks for Web Agents

Abstract (English): Prompt injection attacks manipulate webpage content to cause web agents to execute attacker-specified tasks instead of the user's intended ones. Existing methods for detecting and localizing such attacks achieve limited effectiveness, as their underlying assumptions often do not hold in the web-agent setting. In this work, we propose WebSentinel, a two-step approach for detecting and localizing prompt injection attacks in webpages. Given a webpage, Step I extracts \emph{segments of interest} that may be contaminated, and Step II evaluates each segment by checking its consistency with the webpage content as context. We show that WebSentinel is highly effective, substantially outperforming baseline methods across multiple datasets of both contaminated and clean webpages that we collected. Our code is available at: https://github.com/wxl-lxw/WebSentinel.

摘要（中文）: 提示注入攻击篡改网页内容，导致网络代理执行攻击者指定的任务，而非用户预期的任务。现有的检测和定位此类攻击的方法效果有限，因为它们的基本假设通常不适用于网络代理环境。在这项工作中，我们提出了 WebSentinel，一种用于检测和定位网页中提示注入攻击的两步方法。给定一个网页，第一步提取可能被污染的“感兴趣片段”，第二步通过检查每个片段与网页内容作为上下文的一致性来评估该片段。我们证明了 WebSentinel 高效有效，在多个我们收集的受污染和干净网页数据集上，显著优于基线方法。我们的代码可在：https://github.com/wxl-lxw/WebSentinel 获取。

TLDR: WebSentinel is a two-step approach for detecting and localizing prompt injection attacks in webpages by extracting segments of interest and checking consistency with webpage context, outperforming existing methods.

简要说明: WebSentinel是一种两步法，通过提取感兴趣的片段并检查与网页上下文的一致性来检测和定位网页中的提示注入攻击，性能优于现有方法。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Xilong Wang, Yinuo Liu, Zhun Wang, Dawn Song, Neil Gong

Efficient Sequential Neural Network with Spatial-Temporal Attention and Linear LSTM for Robust Lane Detection Using Multi-Frame Images

Abstract (English): Lane detection is a crucial perception task for all levels of automated vehicles (AVs) and Advanced Driver Assistance Systems, particularly in mixed-traffic environments where AVs must interact with human-driven vehicles (HDVs) and challenging traffic scenarios. Current methods lack versatility in delivering accurate, robust, and real-time compatible lane detection, especially vision-based methods often neglect critical regions of the image and their spatial-temporal (ST) salience, leading to poor performance in difficult circumstances such as serious occlusion and dazzle lighting. This study introduces a novel sequential neural network model with a spatial-temporal attention mechanism to focus on key features of lane lines and exploit salient ST correlations among continuous image frames. The proposed model, built on a standard encoder-decoder structure and common neural network backbones, is trained and evaluated on three large-scale open-source datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate the strength and robustness of the proposed model, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in various testing scenarios. Furthermore, with the ST attention mechanism, the developed sequential neural network models exhibit fewer parameters and reduced Multiply-Accumulate Operations (MACs) compared to baseline sequential models, highlighting their computational efficiency. Relevant data, code, and models are released at https://doi.org/10.4121/4619cab6-ae4a-40d5-af77-582a77f3d821.

摘要（中文）: 车道线检测是所有级别自动驾驶车辆(AVs)和高级驾驶辅助系统的一项至关重要的感知任务，尤其是在混合交通环境中，自动驾驶车辆必须与人类驾驶车辆(HDVs)以及具有挑战性的交通场景进行交互。目前的方法在提供准确、稳健和实时兼容的车道线检测方面缺乏通用性，尤其是基于视觉的方法通常忽略图像的关键区域及其时空(ST)显著性，导致在严重遮挡和眩光照明等困难情况下表现不佳。本研究引入了一种新型的具有时空注意力机制的序列神经网络模型，以关注车道线的关键特征并利用连续图像帧之间的显著时空相关性。所提出的模型基于标准编码器-解码器结构和通用神经网络骨干网络构建，并在三个大型开源数据集上进行训练和评估。大量的实验证明了所提出模型的优势和鲁棒性，在各种测试场景中优于最先进的方法。此外，借助时空注意力机制，所开发的序列神经网络模型与基线序列模型相比，展现出更少的参数和更低的乘加累计操作(MACs)，突出了其计算效率。相关数据、代码和模型已在https://doi.org/10.4121/4619cab6-ae4a-40d5-af77-582a77f3d821上发布。

TLDR: This paper introduces an efficient sequential neural network with spatial-temporal attention and a linear LSTM for robust lane detection, demonstrating superior performance, robustness, and computational efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种高效的序列神经网络，该网络具有时空注意力和线性LSTM，用于稳健的车道检测。该模型在性能、鲁棒性和计算效率方面均优于最先进的方法。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Sandeep Patil, Yongqi Dong, Haneen Farah, Hans Hellendoorn

Spatiotemporal Decision Transformer for Traffic Coordination

Abstract (English): Traffic signal control is a critical challenge in urban transportation, requiring coordination among multiple intersections to optimize network-wide traffic flow. While reinforcement learning has shown promise for adaptive signal control, existing methods struggle with multi-agent coordination and sample efficiency. We introduce MADT (Multi-Agent Decision Transformer), a novel approach that reformulates multi-agent traffic signal control as a sequence modeling problem. MADT extends the Decision Transformer paradigm to multi-agent settings by incorporating: (1) a graph attention mechanism for modeling spatial dependencies between intersections, (2) a|temporal transformer encoder for capturing traffic dynamics, and (3) return-to-go conditioning for target performance specification. Our approach enables offline learning from historical traffic data, with architecture design that facilitates potential online fine-tuning. Experiments on synthetic grid networks and real-world traffic scenarios demonstrate that MADT achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing average travel time by 5-6% compared to the strongest baseline while exhibiting superior coordination among adjacent intersections.

摘要（中文）: 交通信号控制是城市交通中的一项关键挑战，需要在多个路口之间进行协调，以优化整个网络的交通流量。虽然强化学习在自适应信号控制方面显示出潜力，但现有方法难以应对多智能体协调和样本效率问题。我们引入了MADT（多智能体决策Transformer），一种将多智能体交通信号控制重新定义为序列建模问题的新方法。MADT通过以下方式将决策Transformer范式扩展到多智能体环境：（1） 用于建模路口之间空间依赖关系的图注意力机制；（2） 用于捕获交通动态的时间Transformer编码器；以及（3） 用于目标性能规范的剩余回报调节。我们的方法能够利用历史交通数据进行离线学习，其架构设计有利于潜在的在线微调。在合成网格网络和真实交通场景中的实验表明，MADT实现了最先进的性能，与最强的基线相比，平均出行时间减少了5-6%，并且在相邻路口之间表现出卓越的协调性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Multi-Agent Decision Transformer (MADT) for traffic signal control, leveraging graph attention and temporal transformers for improved coordination and performance in offline learning settings.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了用于交通信号控制的多智能体决策Transformer (MADT)，利用图注意力机制和时间Transformer来提高离线学习环境中的协调性和性能。

Authors: Haoran Su, Yandong Sun, Hanxiao Deng

Minimal Computational Preconditions for Subjective Perspective in Artificial Agents

Abstract (English): This study operationalizes subjective perspective in artificial agents by grounding it in a minimal, phenomenologically motivated internal structure. The perspective is implemented as a slowly evolving global latent state that modulates fast policy dynamics without being directly optimized for behavioral consequences. In a reward-free environment with regime shifts, this latent structure exhibits direction-dependent hysteresis, while policy-level behavior remains comparatively reactive. I argue that such hysteresis constitutes a measurable signature of perspective-like subjectivity in machine systems.

摘要（中文）: 本研究通过将主观视角根植于一个最小化的、现象学驱动的内部结构，从而在人工智能体中实现主观视角的运作化。该视角被实现为一个缓慢演化的全局潜在状态，它调制快速的策略动态，但不会直接针对行为后果进行优化。在一个具有状态转换的无奖励环境中，这种潜在结构表现出方向依赖的滞后效应，而策略层面的行为则保持相对的反应性。我认为这种滞后效应构成了机器系统中类视角主观性的一种可测量特征。

TLDR: This paper explores a minimal computational structure for subjective perspective in AI agents, implemented as a slowly evolving latent state modulating policy dynamics, and suggests hysteresis as a measurable signature of subjectivity.

简要说明: 本文探讨了人工智能体中主观视角的最小计算结构，该结构被实现为缓慢演变的潜在状态，调节策略动态，并提出滞后现象作为可测量的主观性特征。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Hongju Pae

Multi-Resolution Alignment for Voxel Sparsity in Camera-Based 3D Semantic Scene Completion

Abstract (English): Camera-based 3D semantic scene completion (SSC) offers a cost-effective solution for assessing the geometric occupancy and semantic labels of each voxel in the surrounding 3D scene with image inputs, providing a voxel-level scene perception foundation for the perception-prediction-planning autonomous driving systems. Although significant progress has been made in existing methods, their optimization rely solely on the supervision from voxel labels and face the challenge of voxel sparsity as a large portion of voxels in autonomous driving scenarios are empty, which limits both optimization efficiency and model performance. To address this issue, we propose a \textit{Multi-Resolution Alignment (MRA)} approach to mitigate voxel sparsity in camera-based 3D semantic scene completion, which exploits the scene and instance level alignment across multi-resolution 3D features as auxiliary supervision. Specifically, we first propose the Multi-resolution View Transformer module, which projects 2D image features into multi-resolution 3D features and aligns them at the scene level through fusing discriminative seed features. Furthermore, we design the Cubic Semantic Anisotropy module to identify the instance-level semantic significance of each voxel, accounting for the semantic differences of a specific voxel against its neighboring voxels within a cubic area. Finally, we devise a Critical Distribution Alignment module, which selects critical voxels as instance-level anchors with the guidance of cubic semantic anisotropy, and applies a circulated loss for auxiliary supervision on the critical feature distribution consistency across different resolutions. The code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/MRA_TIP.

摘要（中文）: 基于相机的3D语义场景补全（SSC）提供了一种经济高效的解决方案，用于评估周围3D场景中每个体素的几何占用和语义标签，通过图像输入，从而为感知-预测-规划自动驾驶系统提供体素级别的场景感知基础。尽管现有方法已经取得了显著进展，但它们的优化仅依赖于体素标签的监督，并且面临体素稀疏性的挑战，因为在自动驾驶场景中大部分体素是空的，这限制了优化效率和模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种\textit{多分辨率对齐 (MRA)}方法，以减轻基于相机的3D语义场景补全中的体素稀疏性，该方法利用跨多分辨率3D特征的场景和实例级别对齐作为辅助监督。具体来说，我们首先提出了多分辨率视图变换模块，该模块将2D图像特征投影到多分辨率3D特征中，并通过融合判别性种子特征在场景级别上对齐它们。此外，我们设计了立方体语义各向异性模块，用于识别每个体素的实例级别语义重要性，考虑特定体素相对于立方体区域内相邻体素的语义差异。最后，我们设计了一个关键分布对齐模块，该模块以立方体语义各向异性为指导，选择关键体素作为实例级别的锚点，并应用循环损失对不同分辨率之间关键特征分布的一致性进行辅助监督。代码可在https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/MRA_TIP上获取。

TLDR: This paper introduces a Multi-Resolution Alignment (MRA) approach to address voxel sparsity in camera-based 3D semantic scene completion (SSC) by incorporating scene and instance level alignment as auxiliary supervision.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种多分辨率对齐（MRA）方法，通过结合场景和实例级别的对齐作为辅助监督，来解决基于相机的3D语义场景补全（SSC）中出现的体素稀疏性问题。

Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Zhiwen Yang, Yuxin Peng

FARTrack: Fast Autoregressive Visual Tracking with High Performance

Abstract (English): Inference speed and tracking performance are two critical evaluation metrics in the field of visual tracking. However, high-performance trackers often suffer from slow processing speeds, making them impractical for deployment on resource-constrained devices. To alleviate this issue, we propose FARTrack, a Fast Auto-Regressive Tracking framework. Since autoregression emphasizes the temporal nature of the trajectory sequence, it can maintain high performance while achieving efficient execution across various devices. FARTrack introduces Task-Specific Self-Distillation and Inter-frame Autoregressive Sparsification, designed from the perspectives of shallow-yet-accurate distillation and redundant-to-essential token optimization, respectively. Task-Specific Self-Distillation achieves model compression by distilling task-specific tokens layer by layer, enhancing the model's inference speed while avoiding suboptimal manual teacher-student layer pairs assignments. Meanwhile, Inter-frame Autoregressive Sparsification sequentially condenses multiple templates, avoiding additional runtime overhead while learning a temporally-global optimal sparsification strategy. FARTrack demonstrates outstanding speed and competitive performance. It delivers an AO of 70.6% on GOT-10k in real-time. Beyond, our fastest model achieves a speed of 343 FPS on the GPU and 121 FPS on the CPU.

摘要（中文）: 推理速度和跟踪性能是视觉跟踪领域中两个关键的评价指标。然而，高性能的跟踪器通常面临处理速度慢的问题，使其难以部署在资源受限的设备上。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了FARTrack，一个快速自回归跟踪框架。由于自回归强调轨迹序列的时间特性，因此它可以在保持高性能的同时，在各种设备上实现高效执行。FARTrack引入了任务特定的自蒸馏和帧间自回归稀疏化，分别从浅层但精确的蒸馏和冗余到精简的令牌优化两个角度进行设计。任务特定的自蒸馏通过逐层提炼任务特定令牌来实现模型压缩，在提升模型推理速度的同时避免了次优的手动师生层对分配。同时，帧间自回归稀疏化顺序地浓缩多个模板，避免了额外的运行时开销，同时学习到一种时间全局最优的稀疏化策略。FARTrack展示了卓越的速度和有竞争力的性能。它在GOT-10k上实现了70.6%的AO，并且达到实时性。此外，我们最快的模型在GPU上达到了343 FPS的速度，在CPU上达到了121 FPS的速度。

TLDR: FARTrack introduces a fast, autoregressive visual tracking framework utilizing task-specific self-distillation and inter-frame autoregressive sparsification to achieve real-time performance with competitive accuracy on GOT-10k.

简要说明: FARTrack 提出了一个快速的自回归视觉跟踪框架，它利用特定于任务的自蒸馏和帧间自回归稀疏化，在 GOT-10k 上实现了具有竞争力的准确性的实时性能。

Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Guijie Wang, Tong Lin, Yifan Bai, Anjia Cao, Shiyi Liang, Wangbo Zhao, Xing Wei

Self-Supervised Uncalibrated Multi-View Video Anonymization in the Operating Room

Abstract (English): Privacy preservation is a prerequisite for using video data in Operating Room (OR) research. Effective anonymization relies on the exhaustive localization of every individual; even a single missed detection necessitates extensive manual correction. However, existing approaches face two critical scalability bottlenecks: (1) they usually require manual annotations of each new clinical site for high accuracy; (2) while multi-camera setups have been widely adopted to address single-view ambiguity, camera calibration is typically required whenever cameras are repositioned. To address these problems, we propose a novel self-supervised multi-view video anonymization framework consisting of whole-body person detection and whole-body pose estimation, without annotation or camera calibration. Our core strategy is to enhance the single-view detector by "retrieving" false negatives using temporal and multi-view context, and conducting self-supervised domain adaptation. We first run an off-the-shelf whole-body person detector in each view with a low-score threshold to gather candidate detections. Then, we retrieve the low-score false negatives that exhibit consistency with the high-score detections via tracking and self-supervised uncalibrated multi-view association. These recovered detections serve as pseudo labels to iteratively fine-tune the whole-body detector. Finally, we apply whole-body pose estimation on each detected person, and fine-tune the pose model using its own high-score predictions. Experiments on the 4D-OR dataset of simulated surgeries and our dataset of real surgeries show the effectiveness of our approach achieving over 97% recall. Moreover, we train a real-time whole-body detector using our pseudo labels, achieving comparable performance and highlighting our method's practical applicability. Code is available at https://github.com/CAMMA-public/OR_anonymization.

摘要（中文）: 隐私保护是在手术室(OR)研究中使用视频数据的先决条件。有效的匿名化依赖于对每个个体的全面定位；即使是单个遗漏的检测也需要进行大量的人工校正。然而，现有方法面临两个关键的可扩展性瓶颈：（1）它们通常需要对每个新的临床站点进行手动标注才能获得高精度；（2）虽然多摄像头设置已被广泛采用以解决单视图歧义，但通常需要在每次重新定位摄像头时进行摄像头标定。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督多视图视频匿名化框架，该框架包含全身人体检测和全身姿态估计，无需标注或摄像头标定。我们的核心策略是通过使用时间和多视图上下文“检索”假阴性来增强单视图检测器，并进行自监督领域自适应。我们首先在每个视图中运行一个现成的低分阈值全身人体检测器，以收集候选检测结果。然后，我们通过跟踪和自监督未标定的多视图关联来检索与高分检测结果一致的低分假阴性。这些恢复的检测结果充当伪标签，用于迭代微调全身检测器。最后，我们对每个检测到的人应用全身姿态估计，并使用自身的高分预测来微调姿态模型。在模拟手术的4D-OR数据集和我们的真实手术数据集上的实验表明了我们方法的有效性，实现了超过97%的的召回率。此外，我们使用我们的伪标签训练了一个实时的全身检测器，实现了可比较的性能，突出了我们方法的实际应用性。代码可在https://github.com/CAMMA-public/OR_anonymization获得。

TLDR: The paper proposes a self-supervised multi-view video anonymization framework for operating rooms that does not require manual annotation or camera calibration, achieving high recall and practical applicability.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于手术室的自监督多视角视频匿名化框架，无需手动标注或相机校准，实现了高召回率和实际应用性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Keqi Chen, Vinkle Srivastav, Armine Vardazaryan, Cindy Rolland, Didier Mutter, Nicolas Padoy

Conditional Flow Matching for Visually-Guided Acoustic Highlighting

Abstract (English): Visually-guided acoustic highlighting seeks to rebalance audio in alignment with the accompanying video, creating a coherent audio-visual experience. While visual saliency and enhancement have been widely studied, acoustic highlighting remains underexplored, often leading to misalignment between visual and auditory focus. Existing approaches use discriminative models, which struggle with the inherent ambiguity in audio remixing, where no natural one-to-one mapping exists between poorly-balanced and well-balanced audio mixes. To address this limitation, we reframe this task as a generative problem and introduce a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) framework. A key challenge in iterative flow-based generation is that early prediction errors -- in selecting the correct source to enhance -- compound over steps and push trajectories off-manifold. To address this, we introduce a rollout loss that penalizes drift at the final step, encouraging self-correcting trajectories and stabilizing long-range flow integration. We further propose a conditioning module that fuses audio and visual cues before vector field regression, enabling explicit cross-modal source selection. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations show that our method consistently surpasses the previous state-of-the-art discriminative approach, establishing that visually-guided audio remixing is best addressed through generative modeling.

摘要（中文）: 视觉引导的声学增强旨在根据随附的视频重新平衡音频，从而创建连贯的视听体验。尽管视觉显著性和增强已得到广泛研究，但声学增强仍未得到充分探索，常常导致视觉焦点和听觉焦点之间的不一致。现有方法使用判别模型，这些模型难以应对音频重混的内在模糊性，因为在平衡不良和平衡良好的音频混音之间不存在自然的一对一映射。为了解决这个限制，我们将这项任务重新定义为生成问题，并引入了一个条件流匹配（CFM）框架。迭代的基于流的生成的一个关键挑战是，早期预测错误（在选择要增强的正确音源时）会在多个步骤中累积，并将轨迹推离流形。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个回滚损失，以惩罚最后一步的漂移，从而鼓励自我纠正的轨迹并稳定长程流积分。我们进一步提出一个条件模块，该模块在向量场回归之前融合音频和视觉线索，从而实现显式的跨模态音源选择。大量的定量和定性评估表明，我们的方法始终优于先前的最佳判别方法，证实了视觉引导的音频重混通过生成建模可以最好地解决。

TLDR: This paper introduces a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) framework for visually-guided acoustic highlighting, addressing the limitations of discriminative models by reframing the task as a generative problem with a rollout loss and a cross-modal conditioning module.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种条件流匹配（CFM）框架，用于视觉引导的音频突出显示，通过将任务重构为生成问题，并结合rollout损失和跨模态调节模块，解决了判别模型的局限性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Hugo Malard, Gael Le Lan, Daniel Wong, David Lou Alon, Yi-Chiao Wu, Sanjeel Parekh

Probe-then-Commit Multi-Objective Bandits: Theoretical Benefits of Limited Multi-Arm Feedback

Abstract (English): We study an online resource-selection problem motivated by multi-radio access selection and mobile edge computing offloading. In each round, an agent chooses among $K$ candidate links/servers (arms) whose performance is a stochastic $d$-dimensional vector (e.g., throughput, latency, energy, reliability). The key interaction is \emph{probe-then-commit (PtC)}: the agent may probe up to $q>1$ candidates via control-plane measurements to observe their vector outcomes, but must execute exactly one candidate in the data plane. This limited multi-arm feedback regime strictly interpolates between classical bandits ($q=1$) and full-information experts ($q=K$), yet existing multi-objective learning theory largely focuses on these extremes. We develop \textsc{PtC-P-UCB}, an optimistic probe-then-commit algorithm whose technical core is frontier-aware probing under uncertainty in a Pareto mode, e.g., it selects the $q$ probes by approximately maximizing a hypervolume-inspired frontier-coverage potential and commits by marginal hypervolume gain to directly expand the attained Pareto region. We prove a dominated-hypervolume frontier error of $\tilde{O} (K_P d/\sqrt{qT})$, where $K_P$ is the Pareto-frontier size and $T$ is the horizon, and scalarized regret $\tilde{O} (L_φd\sqrt{(K/q)T})$, where $φ$ is the scalarizer. These quantify a transparent $1/\sqrt{q}$ acceleration from limited probing. We further extend to \emph{multi-modal probing}: each probe returns $M$ modalities (e.g., CSI, queue, compute telemetry), and uncertainty fusion yields variance-adaptive versions of the above bounds via an effective noise scale.

摘要（中文）: 我们研究了一个在线资源选择问题，该问题受到多无线电接入选择和移动边缘计算卸载的启发。在每一轮中，一个代理从$K$个候选链路/服务器（臂）中进行选择，它们的性能是一个随机的$d$维向量（例如，吞吐量、延迟、能量、可靠性）。关键的交互是\emph{探测-然后-提交(PtC)}：代理可以通过控制平面测量来探测至多$q > 1$个候选对象，以观察它们的向量结果，但必须在数据平面中执行恰好一个候选对象。这种受限的多臂反馈机制严格地插值在经典bandit算法($q=1$)和全信息专家算法($q=K$)之间，但现有的多目标学习理论主要集中在这些极端情况上。我们开发了\textsc{PtC-P-UCB}，这是一种乐观的探测-然后-提交算法，其技术核心是在Pareto模式下，对不确定性进行前沿感知探测，例如，它通过近似最大化一个受超体积启发的边界覆盖势来选择这$q$个探测，并通过边际超体积增益来提交，以直接扩展已获得的Pareto区域。我们证明了$\tilde{O} (K_P d/\sqrt{qT})$的受支配超体积边界误差，其中$K_P$是Pareto边界大小，$T$是时间范围；以及$\tilde{O} (L_φd\sqrt{(K/q)T})$的标量化后悔值，其中$φ$是标量化函数。这些量化了来自有限探测的透明的$1/\sqrt{q}$加速。我们进一步扩展到\emph{多模态探测}：每次探测返回$M$种模态（例如，CSI、队列、计算遥测数据），并且不确定性融合通过有效的噪声尺度产生上述边界的方差自适应版本。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new multi-objective bandit algorithm, PtC-P-UCB, for resource selection with limited multi-arm feedback, achieving improved performance demonstrated through theoretical bounds. The algorithm is particularly relevant in scenarios like mobile edge computing offloading and multi-radio access selection where trade-offs between objectives like throughput, latency, and energy efficiency exist.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种新的多目标bandit算法PtC-P-UCB，用于资源选择，具有有限的多臂反馈，并通过理论界限证明了其改进的性能。 该算法特别适用于移动边缘计算卸载和多无线电接入选择等场景，在这种场景中，吞吐量，延迟和能源效率等目标之间存在权衡。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ming Shi

Conflict-Aware Client Selection for Multi-Server Federated Learning

Abstract (English): Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a promising distributed machine learning (ML) that enables collaborative model training across clients without exposing raw data, thereby preserving user privacy and reducing communication costs. Despite these benefits, traditional single-server FL suffers from high communication latency due to the aggregation of models from a large number of clients. While multi-server FL distributes workloads across edge servers, overlapping client coverage and uncoordinated selection often lead to resource contention, causing bandwidth conflicts and training failures. To address these limitations, we propose a decentralized reinforcement learning with conflict risk prediction, named RL CRP, to optimize client selection in multi-server FL systems. Specifically, each server estimates the likelihood of client selection conflicts using a categorical hidden Markov model based on its sparse historical client selection sequence. Then, a fairness-aware reward mechanism is incorporated to promote long-term client participation for minimizing training latency and resource contention. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed RL-CRP framework effectively reduces inter-server conflicts and significantly improves training efficiency in terms of convergence speed and communication cost.

摘要（中文）: 联邦学习（FL）已成为一种有前景的分布式机器学习（ML）方法，它能够在不暴露原始数据的情况下进行跨客户端的协同模型训练，从而保护用户隐私并降低通信成本。尽管有所述优点，但传统的单服务器FL由于需要聚合来自大量客户端的模型，因此面临着高通信延迟的问题。虽然多服务器FL将工作负载分配到边缘服务器上，但客户端覆盖范围的重叠以及未协调的选择往往会导致资源争用，进而引发带宽冲突和训练失败。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种基于冲突风险预测的去中心化强化学习方法，名为RL-CRP，以优化多服务器FL系统中的客户端选择。具体而言，每个服务器使用基于其稀疏历史客户端选择序列的分类隐马尔可夫模型来估计客户端选择冲突的可能性。然后，结合一种公平感知奖励机制，以促进长期客户端参与，从而最大限度地减少训练延迟和资源争用。大量实验表明，所提出的RL-CRP框架能有效减少服务器间的冲突，并在收敛速度和通信成本方面显著提高训练效率。

TLDR: This paper proposes a decentralized reinforcement learning approach (RL-CRP) for client selection in multi-server federated learning to reduce inter-server conflicts and improve training efficiency by predicting conflicts and promoting fairness.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种去中心化的强化学习方法(RL-CRP)，用于多服务器联邦学习中的客户端选择，通过预测冲突并促进公平性来减少服务器间冲突并提高训练效率。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Mingwei Hong, Zheng Lin, Zehang Lin, Lin Li, Miao Yang, Xia Du, Zihan Fang, Zhaolu Kang, Dianxin Luan, Shunzhi Zhu

Maximizing Reliability with Bayesian Optimization

Abstract (English): Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular, sample-efficient technique for expensive, black-box optimization. One such problem arising in manufacturing is that of maximizing the reliability, or equivalently minimizing the probability of a failure, of a design which is subject to random perturbations - a problem that can involve extremely rare failures ($P_\mathrm{fail} = 10^{-6}-10^{-8}$). In this work, we propose two BO methods based on Thompson sampling and knowledge gradient, the latter approximating the one-step Bayes-optimal policy for minimizing the logarithm of the failure probability. Both methods incorporate importance sampling to target extremely small failure probabilities. Empirical results show the proposed methods outperform existing methods in both extreme and non-extreme regimes.

摘要（中文）: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种流行的、具有样本高效性的技术，用于解决昂贵且黑盒的优化问题。在制造业中，一个此类问题是如何最大化设计的可靠性，或等价地最小化设计在随机扰动下的失效概率——这个问题可能涉及极其罕见的失效 ($P_\mathrm{fail} = 10^{-6}-10^{-8}$)。 在这项工作中，我们提出了两种基于 Thompson 采样和知识梯度的 BO 方法，后者近似于一步贝叶斯最优策略，用于最小化失效概率的对数。两种方法都结合了重要性采样，以针对极小的失效概率。 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在极端和非极端情况下都优于现有方法。

TLDR: This paper introduces two Bayesian Optimization (BO) methods using Thompson sampling and knowledge gradient, incorporating importance sampling to maximize reliability (minimize failure probability) in designs, particularly in scenarios with extremely rare failures, demonstrating improved performance over existing methods.

简要说明: 本文提出了两种贝叶斯优化(BO)方法，采用Thompson采样和知识梯度，并结合重要性采样，以最大化设计可靠性（最小化故障概率），尤其是在极罕见故障的情况下，实验表明其性能优于现有方法。

Authors: Jack M. Buckingham, Ivo Couckuyt, Juergen Branke

Input-to-State Safe Backstepping: Robust Safety-Critical Control with Unmatched Uncertainties

Abstract (English): Guaranteeing safety in the presence of unmatched disturbances -- uncertainties that cannot be directly canceled by the control input -- remains a key challenge in nonlinear control. This paper presents a constructive approach to safety-critical control of nonlinear systems with unmatched disturbances. We first present a generalization of the input-to-state safety (ISSf) framework for systems with these uncertainties using the recently developed notion of an Optimal Decay CBF, which provides more flexibility for satisfying the associated Lyapunov-like conditions for safety. From there, we outline a procedure for constructing ISSf-CBFs for two relevant classes of systems with unmatched uncertainties: i) strict-feedback systems; ii) dual-relative-degree systems, which are similar to differentially flat systems. Our theoretical results are illustrated via numerical simulations of an inverted pendulum and planar quadrotor.

摘要（中文）: 在存在非匹配扰动（控制输入无法直接消除的不确定性）的情况下保证安全性，仍然是非线性控制领域的一个关键挑战。本文提出了一种针对具有非匹配扰动非线性系统安全关键控制的构造性方法。我们首先提出了输入状态安全性（ISSf）框架的一种推广，用于处理具有此类不确定性的系统，该推广利用了最新发展的最优衰减CBF的概念，为满足相关的类李雅普诺夫安全性条件提供了更大的灵活性。进而，我们概述了针对两类相关的具有非匹配不确定性的系统构造ISSf-CBF的过程：i) 严格反馈系统；ii) 双相对阶系统，该类系统类似于微分平坦系统。我们的理论结果通过倒立摆和平坦四旋翼的数值仿真进行了验证。

TLDR: This paper presents a method for safety-critical control of nonlinear systems with unmatched disturbances using input-to-state safety (ISSf) and Optimal Decay CBFs, demonstrated on an inverted pendulum and planar quadrotor. The method generalizes ISSf framework.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种使用输入到状态安全 (ISSf) 和最优衰减 CBF 的非线性系统安全关键控制方法，适用于具有不匹配扰动的情况，并在倒立摆和平板四旋翼飞行器上进行了演示。该方法推广了 ISSf 框架。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Max H. Cohen, Pio Ong, Aaron D. Ames

Investigating the Influence of Spatial Ability in Augmented Reality-assisted Robot Programming

Abstract (English): Augmented Reality (AR) offers promising opportunities to enhance learning, but its mechanisms and effects are not yet fully understood. As learning becomes increasingly personalized, considering individual learner characteristics becomes more important. This study investigates the moderating effect of spatial ability on learning experience with AR in the context of robot programming. A between-subjects experiment ($N=71$) compared conventional robot programming to an AR-assisted approach using a head-mounted display. Participants' spatial ability was assessed using the Mental Rotation Test. The learning experience was measured through the System Usability Scale (SUS) and cognitive load. The results indicate that AR support does not significantly improve the learning experience compared to the conventional approach. However, AR appears to have a compensatory effect on the influence of spatial ability. In the control group, spatial ability was significantly positively associated with SUS scores and negatively associated with extraneous cognitive load, indicating that higher spatial ability predicts a better learning experience. In the AR condition, these relationships were not observable, suggesting that AR mitigated the disadvantage typically experienced by learners with lower spatial abilities. These findings suggest that AR can serve a compensatory function by reducing the influence of learner characteristics. Future research should further explore this compensatory role of AR to guide the design of personalized learning environments that address diverse learner needs and reduce barriers for learners with varying cognitive profiles.

摘要（中文）: 增强现实（AR）为提升学习效果提供了充满希望的机会，但其机制和作用尚未被完全理解。随着学习日益个性化，考虑个体学习者特征变得愈发重要。本研究调查了空间能力在机器人编程情境下对AR学习体验的调节作用。一项被试间实验（$N=71$）对比了传统的机器人编程方法和使用头戴式显示器的AR辅助方法。参与者的空间能力通过心理旋转测试进行评估。学习体验通过系统可用性量表（SUS）和认知负荷进行测量。结果表明，与传统方法相比，AR支持并未显著改善学习体验。然而，AR似乎对空间能力的影响具有补偿作用。在控制组中，空间能力与SUS得分呈显著正相关，与无关认知负荷呈显著负相关，表明较高的空间能力预示着更好的学习体验。在AR条件下，这些关系不可观察，这表明AR减轻了通常空间能力较低的学习者所经历的不利影响。这些发现表明，AR可以通过减少学习者特征的影响发挥补偿功能。未来的研究应进一步探索AR的这种补偿作用，以指导个性化学习环境的设计，从而满足不同的学习者需求，并减少具有不同认知特征的学习者的障碍。

TLDR: This paper investigates if AR-assisted robot programming can compensate for lower spatial abilities in learners, finding that AR mitigates the correlation between spatial ability and learning experience as measured by SUS and cognitive load.

简要说明: 本文研究了AR辅助机器人编程是否可以弥补学习者较低的空间能力，发现AR减轻了空间能力与学习体验之间的相关性，学习体验通过系统可用性量表 (SUS) 和认知负荷来衡量。

Authors: Nicolas Leins, Jana Gonnermann-Müller, Malte Teichmann, Sebastian Pokutta

Estimation of Ground Reaction Forces from Kinematic Data during Locomotion

Abstract (English): Ground reaction forces (GRFs) provide fundamental insight into human gait mechanics and are widely used to assess joint loading, limb symmetry, balance control, and motor function. Despite their clinical relevance, the use of GRF remains underutilised in clinical workflows due to the practical limitations of force plate systems. In this work, we present a force-plate-free approach for estimating GRFs using only marker-based motion capture data. This kinematics only method to estimate and decompose GRF makes it well suited for widespread clinical depolyment. By using kinematics from sixteen body segments, we estimate the centre of mass (CoM) and compute GRFs, which are subsequently decomposed into individual components through a minimization-based approach. Through this framework, we can identify gait stance phases and provide access to clinically meaningful kinetic measures without a dedicated force plate system. Experimental results demonstrate the viability of CoM and GRF estimation based solely on kinematic data, supporting force-plate-free gait analysis.

摘要（中文）: 地面反作用力（GRF）提供了对人体步态力学的基本洞察，并被广泛用于评估关节负荷、肢体对称性、平衡控制和运动功能。尽管其具有临床相关性，但由于测力台系统的实际局限性，GRF的应用在临床流程中仍未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无需测力台的方法，仅使用基于标记点的运动捕捉数据来估计GRF。这种仅基于运动学数据估计和分解GRF的方法非常适合广泛的临床应用。通过使用来自十六个身体节段的运动学数据，我们估计质心（CoM）并计算GRF，随后通过基于最小化的方法将其分解为各个分量。通过这个框架，我们可以识别步态站立期，并提供对临床有意义的动力学指标的访问，而无需专用的测力台系统。实验结果表明，仅基于运动学数据进行CoM和GRF估计是可行的，支持了无需测力台的步态分析。

TLDR: This paper introduces a method to estimate ground reaction forces (GRFs) from kinematic data alone, eliminating the need for force plates in gait analysis and potentially enabling wider clinical use.

简要说明: 这篇论文介绍了一种仅从运动学数据估计地面反作用力（GRF）的方法，无需测力台进行步态分析，并可能在临床上更广泛地应用。

Authors: Gautami Golani, Dong Anh Khoa To, Ananda Sidarta, Arun-Kumar Kaliya-Perumal, Oliver Roberts, Lek Syn Lim, Jim Patton, Domenico Campolo

Multi-function Robotized Surgical Dissector for Endoscopic Pulmonary Thromboendarterectomy: Preclinical Study and Evaluation

Abstract (English): Patients suffering chronic severe pulmonary thromboembolism need Pulmonary Thromboendarterectomy (PTE) to remove the thromb and intima located inside pulmonary artery (PA). During the surgery, a surgeon holds tweezers and a dissector to delicately strip the blockage, but available tools for this surgery are rigid and straight, lacking distal dexterity to access into thin branches of PA. Therefore, this work presents a novel robotized dissector based on concentric push/pull robot (CPPR) structure, enabling entering deep thin branch of tortuous PA. Compared with conventional rigid dissectors, our design characterizes slenderness and dual-segment-bending dexterity. Owing to the hollow and thin-walled structure of the CPPR-based dissector as it has a slender body of 3.5mm in diameter, the central lumen accommodates two channels for irrigation and tip tool, and space for endoscopic camera's signal wire. To provide accurate surgical manipulation, optimization-based kinematics model was established, realizing a 2mm accuracy in positioning the tip tool (60mm length) under open-loop control strategy. As such, with the endoscopic camera, traditional PTE is possible to be upgraded as endoscopic PTE. Basic physic performance of the robotized dissector including stiffness, motion accuracy and maneuverability was evaluated through experiments. Surgery simulation on ex vivo porcine lung also demonstrates its dexterity and notable advantages in PTE.

摘要（中文）: 患有慢性严重肺血栓栓塞的患者需要进行肺动脉血栓内膜剥脱术 (PTE) 以移除肺动脉 (PA) 内的血栓和内膜。 手术过程中，外科医生使用镊子和剥离器精细地剥离阻塞物，但目前的手术工具刚性且笔直，缺乏进入肺动脉细小分支的远端灵活性。 因此，本研究提出了一种基于同轴推/拉机器人 (CPPR) 结构的新型机器人剥离器，能够深入弯曲的肺动脉细小分支。 与传统的刚性剥离器相比，我们的设计具有纤细性和双段弯曲的灵活性。 基于 CPPR 的剥离器具有中空薄壁结构，其纤细的机身直径为 3.5 毫米，中央腔容纳用于灌注和末端工具的两个通道，以及用于内窥镜摄像头信号线的空间。为了提供精确的手术操作，建立了基于优化的运动学模型，在开环控制策略下实现了末端工具（长度 60 毫米）2 毫米的定位精度。 这样，借助内窥镜摄像头，传统的 PTE 有可能升级为内窥镜 PTE。 通过实验评估了该机器人剥离器的基本物理性能，包括刚度、运动精度和可操作性。 在离体猪肺上进行的手术模拟也证明了其灵活性和在 PTE 中的显著优势。

TLDR: The paper introduces a novel robotized surgical dissector for endoscopic pulmonary thromboendarterectomy, featuring a slender design and dual-segment-bending dexterity, validated through experiments and surgery simulation.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种用于内窥镜肺动脉血栓切除术的新型机器人手术解剖器，该解剖器具有纤细的设计和双段弯曲灵活性，并通过实验和手术模拟进行了验证。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Runfeng Zhu, Xin Zhong, Qingxiang Zhao, Jing Lin, Zhong Wu, Kang Li

AROLA: A Modular Layered Architecture for Scaled Autonomous Racing

Abstract (English): Autonomous racing has advanced rapidly, particularly on scaled platforms, and software stacks must evolve accordingly. In this work, AROLA is introduced as a modular, layered software architecture in which fragmented and monolithic designs are reorganized into interchangeable layers and components connected through standardized ROS 2 interfaces. The autonomous-driving pipeline is decomposed into sensing, pre-processing, perception, localization and mapping, planning, behavior, control, and actuation, enabling rapid module replacement and objective benchmarking without reliance on custom message definitions. To support consistent performance evaluation, a Race Monitor framework is introduced as a lightweight system through which lap timing, trajectory quality, and computational load are logged in real time and standardized post-race analyses are generated. AROLA is validated in simulation and on hardware using the RoboRacer platform, including deployment at the 2025 RoboRacer IV25 competition. Together, AROLA and Race Monitor demonstrate that modularity, transparent interfaces, and systematic evaluation can accelerate development and improve reproducibility in scaled autonomous racing.

摘要（中文）: 自主赛车技术发展迅速，尤其是在比例平台上，软件栈也必须相应发展。本文介绍了 AROLA，一种模块化、分层软件架构，它将碎片化和单体式设计重组为可互换的层和组件，并通过标准化的 ROS 2 接口连接。自动驾驶流水线被分解为感知、预处理、感知、定位与建图、规划、行为、控制和执行等环节，从而能够在不依赖于自定义消息定义的情况下快速替换模块并进行客观的基准测试。为了支持一致的性能评估，我们引入了一个 Race Monitor 框架，作为一个轻量级系统，它能实时记录单圈计时、轨迹质量和计算负载，并生成标准化的赛后分析报告。AROLA 在仿真和硬件上，使用 RoboRacer 平台进行了验证，包括在 2025 RoboRacer IV25 比赛中的部署。AROLA 和 Race Monitor 共同证明了模块化、透明接口和系统性评估能够加速比例自主赛车的开发并提高其可重复性。

TLDR: The paper introduces AROLA, a modular and layered software architecture for scaled autonomous racing, along with a Race Monitor framework for standardized performance evaluation, aiming to improve development speed and reproducibility.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 AROLA，一种用于小型自动驾驶赛车的模块化分层软件架构，以及用于标准化性能评估的 Race Monitor 框架，旨在提高开发速度和可重复性。

Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Fam Shihata, Mohammed Abdelazim, Ahmed Hussein

Evaluating False Alarm and Missing Attacks in CAN IDS

Abstract (English): Modern vehicles rely on electronic control units (ECUs) interconnected through the Controller Area Network (CAN), making in-vehicle communication a critical security concern. Machine learning (ML)-based intrusion detection systems (IDS) are increasingly deployed to protect CAN traffic, yet their robustness against adversarial manipulation remains largely unexplored. We present a systematic adversarial evaluation of CAN IDS using the ROAD dataset, comparing four shallow learning models with a deep neural network-based detector. Using protocol-compliant, payload-level perturbations generated via FGSM, BIM and PGD, we evaluate adversarial effects on both benign and malicious CAN frames. While all models achieve strong baseline performance under benign conditions, adversarial perturbations reveal substantial vulnerabilities. Although shallow and deep models are robust to false-alarm induction, with the deep neural network (DNN) performing best on benign traffic, all architectures suffer significant increases in missed attacks. Notably, under gradient-based attacks, the shallow model extra trees (ET) demonstrates improved robustness to missed-attack induction compared to the other models. Our results demonstrate that adversarial manipulation can simultaneously trigger false alarms and evade detection, underscoring the need for adversarial robustness evaluation in safety-critical automotive IDS.

摘要（中文）: 现代车辆依赖于通过控制器局域网（CAN）互连的电子控制单元（ECU），这使得车载通信成为一个关键的安全问题。基于机器学习（ML）的入侵检测系统（IDS）正日益被部署以保护CAN流量，但它们对抗对抗性操纵的鲁棒性在很大程度上仍未被探索。我们使用ROAD数据集对CAN IDS进行系统的对抗性评估，比较了四种浅层学习模型和一个基于深度神经网络的检测器。通过FGSM、BIM和PGD生成符合协议的、有效载荷级别的扰动，我们评估了良性和恶意CAN帧上的对抗性影响。虽然所有模型在良性条件下都取得了强大的基准性能，但对抗性扰动揭示了大量的漏洞。尽管浅层和深度模型对误报的诱导具有鲁棒性，其中深度神经网络（DNN）在良性流量上表现最佳，但所有架构都遭受了显著的攻击漏报增加。值得注意的是，在基于梯度的攻击下，浅层模型的极端随机树（ET）相比其他模型，在攻击漏报诱导方面表现出更好的鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，对抗性操纵能够同时触发误报并逃避检测，强调了在安全关键的汽车IDS中进行对抗鲁棒性评估的必要性。

TLDR: The paper systematically evaluates the adversarial robustness of different machine learning-based CAN intrusion detection systems (IDS) in vehicles, finding significant vulnerabilities to gradient-based attacks. Shallow models show surprising robustness in certain attack scenarios.

简要说明: 该论文系统地评估了车辆中基于机器学习的CAN入侵检测系统（IDS）的对抗鲁棒性，发现其对基于梯度的攻击存在重大漏洞。 在某些攻击场景中，浅层模型表现出令人惊讶的鲁棒性。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (4/10)

Authors: Nirab Hossain, Pablo Moriano

From Pre- to Intra-operative MRI: Predicting Brain Shift in Temporal Lobe Resection for Epilepsy Surgery

Abstract (English): Introduction: In neurosurgery, image-guided Neurosurgery Systems (IGNS) highly rely on preoperative brain magnetic resonance images (MRI) to assist surgeons in locating surgical targets and determining surgical paths. However, brain shift invalidates the preoperative MRI after dural opening. Updated intraoperative brain MRI with brain shift compensation is crucial for enhancing the precision of neuronavigation systems and ensuring the optimal outcome of surgical interventions. Methodology: We propose NeuralShift, a U-Net-based model that predicts brain shift entirely from pre-operative MRI for patients undergoing temporal lobe resection. We evaluated our results using Target Registration Errors (TREs) computed on anatomical landmarks located on the resection side and along the midline, and DICE scores comparing predicted intraoperative masks with masks derived from intraoperative MRI. Results: Our experimental results show that our model can predict the global deformation of the brain (DICE of 0.97) with accurate local displacements (achieve landmark TRE as low as 1.12 mm), compensating for large brain shifts during temporal lobe removal neurosurgery. Conclusion: Our proposed model is capable of predicting the global deformation of the brain during temporal lobe resection using only preoperative images, providing potential opportunities to the surgical team to increase safety and efficiency of neurosurgery and better outcomes to patients. Our contributions will be publicly available after acceptance in https://github.com/SurgicalDataScienceKCL/NeuralShift.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 引言：在神经外科中，图像引导神经外科系统（IGNS）高度依赖术前脑部磁共振成像（MRI），以辅助外科医生定位手术目标并确定手术路径。然而，脑移位会在硬脑膜打开后使术前MRI失效。更新的、具有脑移位补偿的术中脑部MRI对于提高神经导航系统的精度并确保手术干预的最佳结果至关重要。方法：我们提出NeuralShift，一种基于U-Net的模型，完全从颞叶切除术患者的术前MRI预测脑移位。我们使用靶标配准误差（TREs）评估我们的结果，该误差在切除侧和沿中线的解剖标志物上计算，并使用DICE系数比较预测的术中掩膜与从术中MRI导出的掩膜。结果：我们的实验结果表明，我们的模型可以预测大脑的全局形变（DICE系数为0.97），并具有准确的局部位移（实现低至1.12毫米的标志物TRE），从而补偿颞叶切除神经外科手术期间的大脑大幅移位。结论：我们提出的模型能够仅使用术前图像预测颞叶切除术期间大脑的全局形变，为手术团队提供了潜在的机会，以提高神经外科手术的安全性和效率，并为患者带来更好的结果。我们的贡献将在被接受后在https://github.com/SurgicalDataScienceKCL/NeuralShift上公开。

TLDR: The paper introduces NeuralShift, a U-Net model predicting intraoperative brain shift from preoperative MRI during temporal lobe resection, achieving high accuracy in global deformation and local displacement prediction.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了NeuralShift，一个基于U-Net的模型，用于预测颞叶切除术中术前MRI的术中脑移位，并在全局变形和局部位移预测方面实现了高精度。

Authors: Jingjing Peng, Giorgio Fiore, Yang Liu, Ksenia Ellum, Debayan Daspupta, Keyoumars Ashkan, Andrew McEvoy, Anna Miserocchi, Sebastien Ourselin, John Duncan, Alejandro Granados

See-through: Single-image Layer Decomposition for Anime Characters

Abstract (English): We introduce a framework that automates the transformation of static anime illustrations into manipulatable 2.5D models. Current professional workflows require tedious manual segmentation and the artistic ``hallucination'' of occluded regions to enable motion. Our approach overcomes this by decomposing a single image into fully inpainted, semantically distinct layers with inferred drawing orders. To address the scarcity of training data, we introduce a scalable engine that bootstraps high-quality supervision from commercial Live2D models, capturing pixel-perfect semantics and hidden geometry. Our methodology couples a diffusion-based Body Part Consistency Module, which enforces global geometric coherence, with a pixel-level pseudo-depth inference mechanism. This combination resolves the intricate stratification of anime characters, e.g., interleaving hair strands, allowing for dynamic layer reconstruction. We demonstrate that our approach yields high-fidelity, manipulatable models suitable for professional, real-time animation applications.

摘要（中文）: 我们介绍了一种框架，可自动将静态动漫插图转换为可操控的 2.5D 模型。目前专业的流程需要繁琐的手动分割，以及对遮挡区域进行艺术性的“幻构”，才能实现运动。我们的方法通过将单张图像分解为完全修复的、语义上不同的图层并推断绘制顺序来克服这一问题。为了解决训练数据稀缺的问题，我们引入了一个可扩展的引擎，该引擎从商业 Live2D 模型中引导高质量的监督信息，从而捕获像素级的完美语义和隐藏几何结构。我们的方法结合了一个基于扩散的身体部位一致性模块，该模块强制执行全局几何连贯性，以及一个像素级的伪深度推理机制。这种组合解决了动漫人物复杂的层级结构，例如交错的发丝，从而允许动态图层重建。我们证明了我们的方法可以生成适用于专业实时动画应用的高保真、可操控的模型。

TLDR: This paper presents a framework for decomposing single anime images into manipulatable 2.5D models using a diffusion-based approach and a pseudo-depth inference mechanism, addressing the need for automated animation workflows.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种将单个动漫图像分解为可操作的2.5D模型框架，该框架使用基于扩散的方法和伪深度推理机制，旨在解决自动化动画工作流程的需求。

Authors: Jian Lin, Chengze Li, Haoyun Qin, Kwun Wang Chan, Yanghua Jin, Hanyuan Liu, Stephen Chun Wang Choy, Xueting Liu

Fisheye Stereo Vision: Depth and Range Error

Abstract (English): This study derives analytical expressions for the depth and range error of fisheye stereo vision systems as a function of object distance, specifically accounting for accuracy at large angles.

摘要（中文）: 本研究推导了鱼眼立体视觉系统的深度和测距误差的解析表达式，作为物体距离的函数，特别考虑了大角度下的精度。

TLDR: The paper presents analytical expressions for depth and range error in fisheye stereo vision, focusing on accuracy at large angles.

简要说明: 该论文提出了鱼眼立体视觉系统中深度和范围误差的解析表达式，重点关注大角度下的精度。

Novelty: (5/10)

Authors: Leaf Jiang, Matthew Holzel, Bernhard Kaplan, Hsiou-Yuan Liu, Sabyasachi Paul, Karen Rankin, Piotr Swierczynski

Real-time topology-aware M-mode OCT segmentation for robotic deep anterior lamellar keratoplasty (DALK) guidance

Abstract (English): Robotic deep anterior lamellar keratoplasty (DALK) requires accurate real time depth feedback to approach Descemet's membrane (DM) without perforation. M-mode intraoperative optical coherence tomography (OCT) provides high temporal resolution depth traces, but speckle noise, attenuation, and instrument induced shadowing often result in discontinuous or ambiguous layer interfaces that challenge anatomically consistent segmentation at deployment frame rates. We present a lightweight, topology aware M-mode segmentation pipeline based on UNeXt that incorporates anatomical topology regularization to stabilize boundary continuity and layer ordering under low signal to noise ratio conditions. The proposed system achieves end to end throughput exceeding 80 Hz measured over the complete preprocessing inference overlay pipeline on a single GPU, demonstrating practical real time guidance beyond model only timing. This operating margin provides temporal headroom to reject low quality or dropout frames while maintaining a stable effective depth update rate. Evaluation on a standard rabbit eye M-mode dataset using an established baseline protocol shows improved qualitative boundary stability compared with topology agnostic controls, while preserving deployable real time performance.

摘要（中文）: 机器人深板层角膜移植术（DALK）需要精确的实时深度反馈，以在不发生穿孔的情况下接近后弹力层（DM）。M型术中光学相干断层扫描（OCT）提供高时间分辨率的深度轨迹，但散斑噪声、衰减和仪器引起的阴影常常导致不连续或模糊的层界面，这给以部署帧率进行解剖学上一致的分割带来了挑战。我们提出了一种轻量级的、拓扑感知的基于UNext的M型分割流程，该流程结合了解剖学拓扑结构正则化，以在低信噪比条件下稳定边界连续性和层排序。所提出的系统在单个GPU上的完整预处理-推理-叠加流程中，实现了超过80Hz的端到端吞吐量，证明了在模型单独计时之外具有实际的实时引导能力。这种运行裕度提供了时间余量，可以在保持稳定的有效深度更新率的同时，拒绝低质量或丢帧。使用已建立的基线协议，在标准兔子眼M型数据集上的评估表明，与拓扑结构不可知的对照组相比，边界稳定性在质量上有所提高，同时保持了可部署的实时性能。

TLDR: This paper presents a real-time UNeXt-based segmentation pipeline for M-mode OCT images used in robotic DALK surgery, incorporating topology regularization for improved boundary stability under noisy conditions.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于UNext的实时分割流水线，用于机器人DALK手术中的M模式OCT图像，该流水线结合了拓扑正则化，以在噪声条件下提高边界稳定性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)

Authors: Rosalinda Xiong, Jinglun Yu, Yaning Wang, Ziyi Huang, Jin U. Kang

Automated Dysphagia Screening Using Noninvasive Neck Acoustic Sensing

Abstract (English): Pharyngeal health plays a vital role in essential human functions such as breathing, swallowing, and vocalization. Early detection of swallowing abnormalities, also known as dysphagia, is crucial for timely intervention. However, current diagnostic methods often rely on radiographic imaging or invasive procedures. In this study, we propose an automated framework for detecting dysphagia using portable and noninvasive acoustic sensing coupled with applied machine learning. By capturing subtle acoustic signals from the neck during swallowing tasks, we aim to identify patterns associated with abnormal physiological conditions. Our approach achieves promising test-time abnormality detection performance, with an AUC-ROC of 0.904 under 5 independent train-test splits. This work demonstrates the feasibility of using noninvasive acoustic sensing as a practical and scalable tool for pharyngeal health monitoring.

摘要（中文）: 咽部健康在呼吸、吞咽和发声等重要人体功能中起着至关重要的作用。早期发现吞咽异常，即吞咽困难，对于及时干预至关重要。然而，目前的诊断方法通常依赖于放射影像或侵入性操作。在本研究中，我们提出了一种自动化框架，利用便携式和非侵入性声学传感结合应用机器学习来检测吞咽困难。通过捕获吞咽任务期间颈部发出的细微声学信号，我们的目标是识别与异常生理状态相关的模式。我们的方法在测试时实现了有希望的异常检测性能，在 5 个独立的训练-测试分割下，AUC-ROC 达到了 0.904。这项工作证明了使用非侵入性声学传感作为咽部健康监测的实用且可扩展工具的可行性。

TLDR: This paper proposes an automated, noninvasive dysphagia screening method using acoustic sensing and machine learning, achieving an AUC-ROC of 0.904. It explores practical pharyngeal health monitoring.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于声学传感和机器学习的自动化、无创吞咽困难筛查方法，AUC-ROC达到0.904。该研究探索了实际的咽部健康监测方法。

Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Jade Chng, Rong Xing, Yunfei Luo, Kristen Linnemeyer-Risser, Tauhidur Rahman, Andrew Yousef, Philip A Weissbrod

Ethical Asymmetry in Human-Robot Interaction - An Empirical Test of Sparrow's Hypothesis

Abstract (English): The ethics of human-robot interaction (HRI) have been discussed extensively based on three traditional frameworks: deontology, consequentialism, and virtue ethics. We conducted a mixed within/between experiment to investigate Sparrow's proposed ethical asymmetry hypothesis in human treatment of robots. The moral permissibility of action (MPA) was manipulated as a subject grouping variable, and virtue type (prudence, justice, courage, and temperance) was controlled as a within-subjects factor. We tested moral stimuli using an online questionnaire with Perceived Moral Permissibility of Action (PMPA) and Perceived Virtue Scores (PVS) as response measures. The PVS measure was based on an adaptation of the established Questionnaire on Cardinal Virtues (QCV), while the PMPA was based on Malle et al. [39] work. We found that the MPA significantly influenced the PMPA and perceived virtue scores. The best-fitting model to describe the relationship between PMPA and PVS was cubic, which is symmetrical in nature. Our study did not confirm Sparrow's asymmetry hypothesis. The adaptation of the QCV is expected to have utility for future studies, pending additional psychometric property assessments.

摘要（中文）: 基于三种传统框架（义务论、结果论和德性伦理），人机交互（HRI）的伦理学已被广泛讨论。我们进行了一项混合的组内/组间实验，以调查斯帕罗提出的关于人类对待机器人时的伦理不对称假设。将行为的道德许可性（MPA）作为受试者分组变量进行操纵，并将德性类型（审慎、公正、勇敢和节制）作为组内因子进行控制。我们使用在线问卷测试了道德刺激，将感知的行为道德许可性（PMPA）和感知的德性分数（PVS）作为反应指标。PVS测量是基于对已建立的枢德问卷（QCV）的改编，而PMPA是基于Malle等人[39]的研究。我们发现，MPA显著影响了PMPA和感知的德性分数。描述PMPA和PVS之间关系的最佳拟合模型是三次函数，其本质上是对称的。我们的研究没有证实斯帕罗的不对称假设。QCV的改编预计将在未来的研究中发挥作用，但有待进一步的心理测量属性评估。

TLDR: This paper empirically tests the ethical asymmetry hypothesis in human-robot interaction using an online questionnaire, finding no support for the hypothesis. While not directly related to the core of my research, the adaptation of QCV for HRI might be interesting for future studies related to value alignment.

简要说明: 本文通过在线问卷调查，实证检验了人机交互中的伦理不对称假设，但未发现支持该假设的证据。虽然与我的核心研究方向不直接相关，但QCV在人机交互领域的应用可能对未来与价值观对齐相关的研究有借鉴意义。

Authors: Minyi Wang, Christoph Bartneck, Michael-John Turp, David Kaber
